name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: This doesn’t pass the smell test
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

When it comes to polling, there's certain organizations you simply can't trust.

I know that better than anyone...

**[As President Trump’s campaign manager in 2016, I saw firsthand just how wildly wrong the mainstream media’s polls were!](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/OngcuHzQabCJVcaWcIUUA2zWAgy1vbwBtArQpMHFgMyPczm4HmyHKQK2bQDu29WvR5OVZafRK1mbOBOSz_2DKjamSwr_kZ8Bsu0xwBg_JlGMkkXLj0rnlM8Vg9iPN4nQgVczsaBEXECZjC3tHtFx6vM8ndSA0JANcI7InjnfCAEna38SKJpxwJP6NajMljIu9oVvo2TiEjMA6CDaJyqVcmkMLKboD6Hk1zu7m4bleGkxhGelE1SSL67CLz8Zf2bNifwKql7Zyzq22zkhTFW8c6Z2NwcgCo0D0fgXeioSqu5u9SQ2LXNiVHPZhMESK4530OuJz9g9_xDyWsg-XJkjB7DJ-GgADQEcqwCXfikd8AIHdVC6Hs0uBCQdIXvzhBJlbwEw-uGNvb8eqZbrByMVa64bORqlIxy1im6DtpyX6a_SjVwJx9AygiOi_6T-4yz2HyBupli1cWHPkGi6SoJ_TjQNbHYcHm7fAELhxZAmAd6-iO5Nq59xrtqleO7ZVVtj6U9sOz97RwVH9JfyxJ1T0NJR3_kOvCgVo-Oe9gumPdlT71XryGnPPmOAJCh6SRXWx7knOhfVc4wyEhXJh5OHPQcKHrMFbvE0BEsPQir6IeVVGyGAqERdULIyx7RtvD3nBrgYkUd4qvG7NOR6wJM4eKT0zuQvMIbnMRERt8j5bXUV4TY1YFGmPchjvYc2hyk9GZ9XFXZQILE2K5OsnV5wqTEJ-f5QqRoCW9WQO6Kkp5Ed14ppxxS4Z_7i_sY6btqnwceqlDaET2E4-cYNRq7bRHQngiJenC3r8VRHeBXcFpnYb2PdXg8hFqHtrN7fbfBCkR1I4hBaaZVu4Ev8Ej5rLO1csygTOFfebeQMmj6FkrVYuHiMm-yzmmTibxp4n9v9ISr6YEz06UeHUBEfaiEStnVyGL9pwxdgfRvSLixV6k7GK3h_m6mGUURlHcEwrFQsL7mnFqttgpFpd1CRQS3hARgz5ug_vtVMWV6XctMkuO8VjO_xFnwK9v1fCPzQxgztKTFw9nOFvyIfg4Q/4UGSGcdMi0hpeATndYHnif2Rf03T8A7-/18)**

_That 's why it's so vital that we conduct our _own_ polling, especially when there's a discrepancy with the numbers like what we're seeing right now._

On one hand, polling shows voters prefer Republicans over Democrats on nearly every key issue:
**[National Security: R+10
Immigration: R+10
Foreign policy: R+5
Trade: R+4
National debt: R+2
Economy: R+1
Taxes: R+1](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/30AM_-ZJ3Ycqi8fmeAiwQw2vECJ37wMCSm93O1XQtea0qareZGVTn5PH8HI3hMIgXNicgEiWZk5IC24-fNnc6VaYTLlgboRIpp3hzv6lsPcwIlnzRCAuRoM1XyuOSJ0wTRJiUYWtESalRPqicif4L4H3uR50RAsLv3xWxDuqlevkZ-OYRngJ20M7IrbdO5EUBbLgFEetWqxC52VVKGH4Oo0zbhg1duXv6BNP6siL9FeyG_iMudErwKIzwoCUbnVsBkBaMf1PKCj-Hem90D1D9KjrR00Jbx5tNEnVX-P34H1RP14nQ34-zHZmp4UAt8p6V1wm_vr-yIcQ2U2_aI2U-iDLnx-f1g_rislYf2Zu3-aVxmL-S06b5MeAsaTKRbrydoQBSW66hCcm4_l83J_fizi8IauILKISLM-JLa3WlgD1hcI4hY6kazylii-c372ICNo6FJngBEcYSj94lnJA0N0tCWMAD7rm2NFsVbj4jnH6F1QKjMpHyZxTCC_rllPQ_HN81RFkIcDSjS55lPRH8ybL7lhI43HkMRz4x1VbwRDbyk3SWmiL1VfWpZ8Fsw3N54JUL9_XtiW2K6CvjH-eNHnVkFLWNIbwHE1by-j11nGSQA8wggMaOrAW3kNJFiJA712zKOaGGh2mIwmjK7ODoMZrVkCQjQsR6OCZi-rCxKXJKXbx6jN5PWwV2KjFQhKdspuBDATplAVM64GMU0xYWwEcPQRmclVpJOdYnrgzZD2PbF5gnLPCgg3gNZ95msh6_VNaKSZR10OsKz--ILYVY6ryHvCwEqOvrRYtyJQ1OtkH-a6yuwinLeWaNZpqWxtm_qbLzzsYPMWu4F8xi_OGNjRq7L_PJ7WicswisajkZZsOiPzoDQnjoC2Wx_uD70_yz8YXAYj-RIrmAqFqdfWLsOLuqc3iCBmowQqn7kGzZXSH-vl3y11QfzAJpe5hsYD-tu66C_ap0oMc5xDMqD2UCWIW6gcd04Dzlac0Dk0YzD7Ih87IBItvNvxBJnDacP0xW0QHgk7GQgUy-_k/SE3T_hipIrwq5vnfcq8CrH1pgn_QuNJQ/18)**
[Source: _Morning Consult_]

clean_body: Peter, When it comes to polling, there's certain organizations you simply can't trust. I know that better than anyone... That 's why it's so vital that we conduct our own polling, especially when there's a discrepancy with the numbers like what we're seeing right now. On one hand, polling shows voters prefer Republicans over Democrats on nearly every key issue: [Source: Morning Consult] But at the same time, polling by the mainstream media shows Democrats have surged out to a whopping on the generic ballot for the midterms. Something doesn't add up... But the only way to do that is to have EVERY Republican and swing voter verify their voter profile before the upcoming verification deadline. That 's why I'm taking this time to personally email you with a simple request, Peter: ******************************************************************************************************** Thank you, Kellyanne Conway | Paid for by the NRSC. I’m putting up a fight. I swore an oath to represent our communities, and I take it seriously. And I know that accountability over this Administration only comes with a Democratic majority.

The hard truth is this: Political experts rank me as the most vulnerable Democratic incumbent in Southern California. And after Prop 50, tens of thousands of new voters -- who have never seen my name on the ballot -- were added to CA-45.

clean_body: | = It’s official. I filed paperwork to appear on the ballot for re-election. = Representing CA-45 in Congress is one of the honors of my life. As the son of immigrants, an Army enlistee at 18, and someone who worked minimum wage jobs to pay my way through college, I never thought I would be in this position. = | = We shocked the GOP establishment when we flipped this seat by 653 votes in 2024 -- one of the closest races nationwide. Now, I’m facing four Republican challengers who want to flip it back to expand the MAGA majority in Congress. I’m putting up a fight. I swore an oath to represent our communities, and I take it seriously. And I know that accountability over this Administration only comes with a Democratic majority. The hard truth is this: Political experts rank me as the most vulnerable Democratic incumbent in Southern California. And after Prop 50, tens of thousands of new voters -- who have never seen my name on the ballot -- were added to CA-45. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Picture this, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
[recipe enclosed]

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)
---
Picture this: a kitchen engulfed in the smell of warm spices. Family laughing around the dinner table over a shared meal. Conversations about our lives, our wants, and needs.

_This was how I spent hours of my childhood, friend — watching my grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir huge pots of posole and then gathering around the dinner table.
_
Today, as I continue to prepare my favorite traditional New Mexican dishes, I still hold those memories close to me.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6061?t=2&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)
_New Mexico chiles — the best in the world!_
You see, there's something powerful about connecting with others over a home-cooked meal, it reminds me of my childhood. Cooking for me has always been a way to foster connection and build community.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6061?t=3&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)
_My child Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa. Kids in New Mexico start early ... 🌶️_
Whether I was making green chile stew for my fellow peers when I was studying at UNM or cooking chile and tortillas for the water protectors during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline — I've always loved how food, or our hobbies and passions, can bring us together.
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6061?t=4&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)
_Gathered around the table making tamales with my friends!_
Since launching **_[my campaign for governor](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6061?t=5&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)_** , I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. And it's been made clear to me that people want a governor who will fight fiercely to make things better for our communities.
I’m ready to lower costs, invest in education, and make healthcare more accessible and affordable. I am also ready to be a brick wall to Donald Trump and his administration when they want to sow violence and fear and drag an extremist agenda to our state.
**And I know how to deliver it because I am the _most experienced, qualified candidate in this race._**
I’ve led at the highest levels of government, serving in Congress and as U.S. Secretary of the Interior, where I took on tough fights and delivered real results for communities across the country. I know how to fight for working families — and how to get things done.
Before that, I was a single mom living paycheck to paycheck, relying on government programs like SNAP, WIC, and Medicaid to help keep my child fed and healthy. I understand affordability because I’ve lived it. I know how critical strong public schools, accessible health care, and safe communities are because my family relied on them. These issues aren’t abstract to me, they’re personal.
**But here's the thing:** New Mexico has a history of switching parties every eight years, and the GOP is gearing up to spend MILLIONS to flip our state red. **With five Republicans eyeing this office, willing to spend whatever it takes to buy our race, I need your urgent grassroots support to ensure my campaign can compete.****_[Please, will you give now to power our grassroots campaign? If you donate through this link, I’ll even send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole!](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6061?t=6&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6061?t=7&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)
---
Be fierce,

Deb
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6118?t=8&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/6117?t=9&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
[**Receive Fewer Emails**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?&t=10&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)
[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=11&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=12&akid=8033%2E400544%2ELlRQZQ)
Email us: info@debhaaland.com
**PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**

subject: Peter, will you open this email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
Thank you so much for taking a moment to open this email. That alone is a sign of your support for our campaign, and we truly appreciate it. [**We also have to ask you to donate to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260307-1-f-a&t=1&akid=1800%2E5691347%2EmN4bV2) _Give us a chance to explain why:_
Jon is, without a doubt, the most vulnerable Democratic Senator up for reelection this November in the entire country. This will likely be the most expensive and competitive Senate election this year. **And there is no path to taking back the Senate majority without absolute victory in Georgia.**
You might be surprised to hear this, but less than one percent of people who open our emails actually donate. That’s why we continue to send fundraising emails — so we can give people multiple opportunities to chip in over the course of this campaign.
If you’re able to give your first donation today, we ask that you don’t wait. The earlier we receive your donation, the greater of an impact it has. [**So if you can, use this link to chip in directly to Jon’s reelection campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260307-1-f-a&t=2&akid=1800%2E5691347%2EmN4bV2)

If our elections aren’t secure, nothing else matters. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=d2d13f408c99415eb9f180234431503b&_e=IKJKBnd-CmimG1Ol4Ff03V2D8riNgiZXQ_DuQilsVElgHUShdgxq_g4uXfnjVbTeElGQh5Gyaaw_jyOZfCbSdaFbY3yUQUhIZGc_K_IX7pOi2JSkHbbtEi-4YvkIQHA2vdU4qmgbSh4dE1vzP0K2KVr5sTGeFiKvj0eds5azzQs3tTm4WU6Fr3ksfFUxiQispCJvBDi8_S6bx4oeq6tTPd6zTc2uwih91VWonLhYPAwfkqDaO55RUzwO0eV4dXbNTgl4mptLeF3IKQ4ucrcHclWVJ3aGbQbH4KtRpMIXi-cud589_dvVin2m6_aMQthrH8GM5TynB3FPwUaVMUKDUZLmKOsVn-tYdhBUMj3g0Y-RjKm8nm8hPXXPdeJI4lhWsBWfzEqUhf9l4whInhVJkiTvWwx3mEJXe7FbK3zrEhXd5OgljsL5FOf7hsqj1aLLhJ3ieCJWqmtJOpDreXQdsCmCRh6mT0LAxIYxsDS_PQMXY0YaLZpNknRddifVdb0pr11isXcLoPDTxghtpjHJxsPctcXOWruE-o-53cfkAA5zIS95fYlVF1Lf2yzOIdo6)

Peter,

Both my 2024 opponent here in Minnesota AND Donald Trump’s 2024 opponent have gone on record saying voting machines can be hacked.

They said it themselves.

So election security isn’t a “conspiracy theory.” It’s a fact-based concern.

Which leads to two simple questions:

1. How much cheating is going on?
2. How do we find the cheating?

**The security of our elections should NOT be up for debate.**

_Yet today, the average slot machine in a casino has a stricter chain of custody than the average voting machine._

Think about that.

Casinos guard slot machines like Fort Knox. But the machines that decide who runs our country? Not even close.

Does that make you feel confident?

**Right now, our elections are not secure** — and fixing that should be our number one priority. **_Because the greatest threat to our national security is Americans losing trust in their own elections._**

If we don’t secure the vote, nothing else matters.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

clean_body: If our elections aren’t secure, nothing else matters. | Peter, Both my 2024 opponent here in Minnesota AND Donald Trump’s 2024 opponent have gone on record saying voting machines can be hacked. They said it themselves. So election security isn’t a “conspiracy theory.” It’s a fact-based concern. Which leads to two simple questions: 1. How much cheating is going on? 2. How do we find the cheating? The security of our elections should NOT be up for debate. Yet today, the average slot machine in a casino has a stricter chain of custody than the average voting machine. Think about that. Casinos guard slot machines like Fort Knox. But the machines that decide who runs our country? Not even close. Does that make you feel confident? Right now, our elections are not secure — and fixing that should be our number one priority. Because the greatest threat to our national security is Americans losing trust in their own elections. If we don’t secure the vote, nothing else matters. | I’m running to demand transparency, accountability, and real election security. Let’s secure our republic, or else we won’t have one. For God, Country, and Minnesota, Royce White Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343 Copyright (C) 2026 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Annie Andrews
subject: I'm a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
I'm a pediatrician. I’m pissed. I’m scared. And I need your help to defeat Lindsey Graham in the U.S. Senate.
I’m not the “monsters-under-the-bed” kind of scared. I’m the “I’ve watched children suffer from preventable illness and injury while politicians do absolutely nothing” kind of scared.
I’ve treated kids who’ve been shot. Kids whose families struggle to afford their medications.
Kids who live with mold that causes asthma attacks, miss school for climate disasters, and watch politicians use them as political pawns.
And now? Trump is causing chaos and Lindsey Graham is right by his side.
And Medicaid — the program that keeps half our pediatric patients insured, healthy, and...alive — is on the chopping block to pay for tax breaks for billionaires.
So yeah, I never planned to run for Senate.
But I’m scared. I’m pissed. I’m motivated. And I’m 100% in.
I’m running for Senate in South Carolina to defeat Lindsey Graham and to fight for the kids no one in D.C. seems to be thinking about. So I need you with me.
We need to hit 10,000 donations before midnight to prove that this campaign can go the distance. Can I count on you to split a donation with my campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
HELP ME DEFEAT LINDSEY GRAHAM! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
I’m running because the Republican Party, led by people like Lindsey Graham, is dismantling the very systems that keep our kids safe here in South Carolina.
I’m running because the issues I care about — children’s healthcare, vaccines, gun violence, public education, Social Security, Medicaid and Medicare — are under direct attack right now.
And I’m running because I consider it my professional duty as a pediatrician — to give children a strong voice at the national level. Too many are comfortable on the sidelines. That won’t work for me.
We need bold leaders who aren’t afraid to fight. I am ready.
Even though the path will be hard, I know Lindsey Graham must be held accountable. He certainly doesn’t deserve a free pass back to D.C. for six more years.
That’s why I’m running for US Senate. To defeat Trump’s lapdog and fight for everyday Americans. But, I need your support today. Can you rush a split donation of $10 (or whatever you can spare) between Resist Reclaim Rebuild and me to become a Founding Donor to my campaign? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
CHIP IN TO STOP MAGA EXTREMISM!>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-annieandrews]
Thank you for believing in this campaign,
Dr. Annie Andrews
Resist Reclaim Rebuild is an organization committed to helping Democrats win up and down the ballot, nationwide.

1331 FLORIDA AVE NW

| | My name is Adriana Guzmán Fralick.
_I still remember when my mom told us we_ _were moving to America._ She worked so hard to get us the right paperwork. She waited years for it. She never lied about who she was, why she was coming here, or why she was bringing her kids with her. **In that moment, my mom taught me** **something I’ll never forget:** **_America is worth _respecting_. _****_Our laws _matter_. _** **_And opportunity comes with _responsibility_._** So I hit the books. clean_body: | | | | | Many 9-year-old Mexican girls aretrafficked across the border. I thank God every day I wasn’t one of them. My mother brought me and my siblings here LEGALLY – and we were welcomed by the booming sound of I made a promise to fight for America ever since. I’d like to extend that same promise to you. Will you read the rest of my story? | | My name is Adriana Guzmán Fralick. I still remember when my mom told us we were moving to America. She worked so hard to get us the right paperwork. She waited years for it. She never lied about who she was, why she was coming here, or why she was bringing her kids with her. In that moment, my mom taught me something I’ll never forget: America is worth respecting. Our laws matter. And opportunity comes with responsibility. So I hit the books. I worked hard just like my mother showed me. And after graduating from the University of Nevada Reno, I finally earned my law degree. That’s when the REAL fight began ⬇⬇**⬇ | | As soon as I got into the world of politics, I immediately saw the the Democrats play. Obstruction. Crooked plea deals.Vicious lawfare and political attacks. And let me tell you, it’s only gotten worse : → Violent criminals and illegal aliens released into our country →President Trump dragged in front**of kangaroo courts → Conservative parents and grandparents maligned, spied on, and labeled as domestic terrorists I’m running for Attorney General to make sure that NEVER happens again. The American people deserve a fighter who'll: CRACK DOWN on illegal immigration LOCK UP violent criminals; and PROTECT our law enforcement | | The Democrats are raising MILLIONS against my campaign for this very reason. They will lie, intimidate, and threaten me from now until Election Day – . But I won’t back down. That 9-year-old girl is still in my heart.And she made a promise to fight for America no matter what. _ For America, Adriana Guzmán Fralick Republican for Attorney General (NV) | | | | | Paid for by Adriana for Nevada** | | P.O. Box 370801, Las Vegas, NV, 89137 | |

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Only 3 seats decide the House. Virginia could flip 4.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026]
Peter ,
Quick update from Virginia:
Early voting started FRIDAY in a statewide redistricting election.
If voters approve the amendment this April 21st, Virginia’s legislature can redraw the congressional map, and the proposed map could flip FOUR Republican-held seats BLUE.
In a House where the margin is tiny, that alone could decide control of Congress.
Last year, with your help, GOTV PAC helped flip the House by investing early in turnout operations and candidates in the districts that mattered most.
This Virginia vote could set up the next round of House pickups in 2026.
So while voters in Virginia head to the polls, we’re already preparing to Get Out The Vote in competitive population centers that will decide those races.
If you want to help us finish the job and expand the House majority, you can chip in here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email03072026]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=Email03072026] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=Email03072026]

Custom Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email03072026]
– GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

Maine and North Carolina.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Required to report:
body:
---
Derek, Our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline this year is coming up at the end of the month — our most important deadline since the 2024 election. Once it passes, we’ll be required to report what we’ve raised over the last few months. Here’s the truth: _Everyone_ will be looking at that number to gauge whether Democrats are on track to win or lose in November. If we submit a report with lots of donations, we’ll be sending a clear message to Trump and his allies across the country that the American people are against their disastrous agenda, _and they’re prepared to take back the House and the Senate in November._ **That’s why this deadline matters so much. So if you’ve been looking for a meaningful way to make a difference and help stop Trump’s agenda in its tracks, this is it.** [**The DNC is working overtime to get Democrats elected up and down the ballot this year and put a massive check on Trump’s power. Will you chip in $7 ahead of our deadline to help fund this work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2026?refcode=em_20260307_6311_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6311_22930333_WMqztG&akid=6311%2E22930333%2EWMqztG) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260307_6311_fr&refcode2=6311_22930333_WMqztG&akid=6311%2E22930333%2EWMqztG)**

subject: Peter: CRITICAL follow up on your registered voter assessment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Senate Leadership Fund
body:

name: Parler Sponsor
subject: how the FBI used Google data to arrest 1,575 people
body:
https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
View in browser
A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.
how the FBI used Google data to arrest 1,575 people
On January 6th, 2021, 1000's gathered in Washington D.C.

Within weeks, the FBI arrested over 1,575 people.

How did they find them?

Their phones told the FBI exactly where they were.

The FBI didn't hack anyone's smartphone. They didn't need warrants.

They just asked Google for a list.

It's called a "geofence warrant."

The FBI draws a digital boundary around a location. The Capitol building, for example.

Then they ask Google: "Which phones were inside this boundary on January 6th between 1 PM and 4 PM?"

Google hands over the list. 1000's of names with complete location history showing exactly where each person went.

Most people arrested had no idea their phones were tracking them. They deleted photos. Stayed away from social media. Kept their heads down.

But their phones kept a complete record. And Google handed it over.

I'm not discussing the politics of January 6th.

What matters is the method.

Geofence warrants are used 1000's of times a year. For protests. Rallies. Public gatherings.

Any time law enforcement wants to know who was in a specific location, they ask Google.

The smartphone you're reading this on right at this moment is creating that list.

Every place you go. Every building you enter. Everything logged, timestamped, stored on Google's servers.

It doesn't matter if you disabled location settings. Your smartphone is still tracking you through cell towers, WiFi networks, Bluetooth connections.

The government can retrieve it with a single inquiry to Google.

You don't have to do anything wrong to end up on a list. You just have to be in the wrong place at the wrong time.

A protest turns violent three blocks away? Your smartphone puts you at the scene.

Someone commits a crime near where you visited? You're in the area.

Your smartphone proves you were there. And you're on a list.

That's why I use
https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
The Ghostphone

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D

It's powered by GrapheneOS. The most secure mobile operating system available. Configured by security veterans with 15+ years of surveillance industry experience.

No Google tracking. No location logging. No data feeding the surveillance machine.

Works like a normal smartphone. Calls, texts, apps. But it doesn't create evidence against you.

Don't wait until your smartphone puts you on a list.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D
Checkout The Ghostphone .

Stay safe,

# **['It had to be done': Man confesses to brutal murders of 3 women in Utah after he hit an elk, police say](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJtZy1lbmM6NWh6RDRoYmhSOTR0SVViRGFVQXlzUGowaHcxSkVGa0EiLCJyaSI6IjEzNTIxMDEzNDgiLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyNjA2Ny1mNTE5NTBkNTdkYTQ0MTYyOWE3YWY2Njc0NWVkYTYzMiIsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRoZWJsYXplLmNvbS9uZXdzL211cmRlci11dGFoLXdvbWVuLWhpdC1lbGs_c2V5aWQ9In0/X0fsQzaMzh-sbSR_o6zqwg)**
---
Utah police were quickly able to identify and arrest a 22-year-old Iowa man who allegedly confessed to the random murder of three women after he hit an elk with his car.The beginning of the alleged murder spree was first reported on Wednesday when the bodies of two women were found on a hiking trail, according to the Utah Department of Public Safety.'Miller confessed that it "had to be done" but he did not like to do it.' DPS said the two women's husbands found their bodies and reported it to police.As they were investigating that crime scene, another dead woman was reportedly found in the nearby town of Torrey.

# **[BBC strikes again, accused of altering Hegseth's speech on Iran war](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/O1MBga-tgGCovb6RWym5og)**
---
The BBC has been accused of mistranslating remarks by Pete Hegseth about the conflict with Iran, after a speech was altered in a way that suggested the United States was targeting the Iranian “people”. BBC Persian, which broadcasts to audiences inside Iran, translated comments by the US defence secretary as saying Washington was bringing death [...]...Click to read more

[](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/CCtk6C4lljd50bx0lGdfaQ)
# **[The best pub in England might be this Norwich backstreet boozer](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/CCtk6C4lljd50bx0lGdfaQ)**
---
Britain once had more pubs than anywhere else in the world. Today, thousands have vanished — closed, converted into flats, or replaced by chain bars selling cocktails in jam jars.Yet in a quiet residential corner of Norwich, one pub has stubbornly refused to change. Many beer lovers believe it may be the best pub in England.Hand pumps line the wooden bar, serving real ale directly from the cask — traditional British beer poured without modern carbonation.Drinking has long been woven into the fabric of British culture. Whether bonding with strangers or catching up with old friends, few leisure pursuits rival the pleasure of enjoying an ice-cold pint by the river on a summer evening.

---
We are working hard to make the Virginia 5th district the best place to live work and raise your family in peace. Don't hesitate to reach out if we can be of help. Here is some of what we have been up to:

Helping Folks Get Home

| This was a very nice video sent to me by a constituent for helping a young man get home from Israel back in June during the Twelve- Day-War with Iran. This week, we worked with the State Department and Department of War to assist 26 more constituents return home from Israel today! [click here](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jADjsN-OPm-elx6Dnly0UlR76JGGlE-2YzneipIuvHOo_6J-5aHUkQnwAYIRX56bruJ4ioXc8VME7TglXTS0hyqdOI6j7Up0qkp92Q8mt_Ik5yUWwBRJSoa8ucGsxty2tbPxzg72soW_RerL6MdxKb4vb5kyGF5vPH434fIILjprMUE-k902GA==&c=0VZooF-myRdycW5wlva5JSdWUM_LpujkrH_0zbyOqzRUvZh1bJ6t9g==&ch=5fOC9OAtFqx6_sk5hzVgbIV8CNKQhgHLcQbk0U7cWu-hwexMUGllnQ==)
---
| I Voted "No"to Unfair Maps
---
| |
---
| I voted NO to unfair maps on the first day of early voting. Don't let politicians you will never meet in northern Virginia take away your voice. These crooks clearly violated our constitution and they are trying to steal Virginia.
This is calculated deception. Democrats are trying to trick you with misleading words on the ballot, billboards, and more. Don't let your family members and friends fall for it. Please get your friends to vote NO early at the registrar office in the county or city they live. If you will be 18 years old before the November election, you can register and then vote NO to these unfair maps. The last day to vote NO is April 21.
---
25 Year Success at Wintergreen
---
| [](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jADjsN-OPm-elx6Dnly0UlR76JGGlE-2YzneipIuvHOo_6J-5aHUkcGrAYDxc8XXrdeDjiixwaEVqRqiL4Llcha7QYEnEVAx0Gzy1LHlZdElkcKCX8D9wcj9z8keger2xQcvOIv1lLWImtuirS8Y0wa4Z7rq8xon4vvOR2yZjzTQovVRkXvrIW87-VKGHC5pkKmlzB2SBSHMC_C5T5hJhg==&c=0VZooF-myRdycW5wlva5JSdWUM_LpujkrH_0zbyOqzRUvZh1bJ6t9g==&ch=5fOC9OAtFqx6_sk5hzVgbIV8CNKQhgHLcQbk0U7cWu-hwexMUGllnQ==)
---
This week my bill to create an emergency egress at Wintergreen Ski Resort passed the House. According to the Fire Chief Curtis Sheets, he has worked with many congressmen on this issue over the last 25 years with no result. Based on that past, he was skeptical it could be done. When the Fire Chief told me about this issue at a site visit back in August, my incredible team got to work and I built bridges needed to get it done in the US Senate and the House. By the grace of God we passed the bill. A highlight for me was bringing the Fire Chief to D.C. to testify on this issue. It really is amazing what we can achieve when we work as a team. We will keep you posted! If you have facebook, click this link to listen to the Wintergreen Fire Chief talk about this success. [click here](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jADjsN-OPm-elx6Dnly0UlR76JGGlE-2YzneipIuvHOo_6J-5aHUkcGrAYDxc8XXpDXXRYf7pLApxMmo4Y4Dn53R1MXakV_k57W4aGG7jQdC7us59FfQfbL-aN0rOnPL7OKDjYDMwr0-zt_Vxpcqiw-jm2O4On4Y-vPhZc83xJWX26qD7cfUKg==&c=0VZooF-myRdycW5wlva5JSdWUM_LpujkrH_0zbyOqzRUvZh1bJ6t9g==&ch=5fOC9OAtFqx6_sk5hzVgbIV8CNKQhgHLcQbk0U7cWu-hwexMUGllnQ==)

| Vote Ramona Christian Next VA 05 Committee Chair
---
| |

| Ramona Christian holds a degree in political science and has been a steadfast leader in the conservative movement. She served on Donald Trump's platform team, was one of just three Fifth District delegates selected to represent President Trump at the Republican National Convention, and she played a key role on the Trump Virginia campaign team, helping organize Trump rallies across the Commonwealth last year. She also serves as Political Director for Congressman John McGuire and she currently serves as the Buckingham County GOP Chair.
Ramona is a no-nonsense leader, a trusted friend, and someone who absolutely will get things done. She has my complete and total endorsement for Virginia's 5th Congressional District Committee Chair. To learn more including how to vote for her and to join her team, email Ramona at ramonachristian862@gmail.com
---
| Matt Hall

| ICYMI: Our District Directer Matt Hall had a tough few weeks in the hospital, but thankfully he has been discharged. Your prayers made a difference. Thank you!

---
We were successful in helping a fellow veteran from my district get his daughter Savali to a place where she could receive life saving treatment. "Sylvester Craft said that after McGuire got involved, the VA agreed to pay the entire bill. He said they were waiting for transportation to Stanford."
Savali Craft is a mother of two and an Air Force veteran. She is not out of the woods yet and still needs your prayers. Please spread the word.
---
| For God and Country,

body:

# Sunday, March 8, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1936, the [Daytona Beach](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1urDAQAODTmA40_gFM4eI1dPvalGgwY5jI4JXt7IrbR8kVcoGv-D4eywM58rX_x5NcDWm56F0i1Up5yV-lMCJvhTNeJ-7sGa-ypkWBGlrQLdhlQ473YprNBSJFuiEnx1FNg-mNaQ5HAJqM9Yb8EGC1qvdA_SjNpGXvw9qw-9FAg5UAE5hu1aOy_aotjmS8DMIAbVxT7j4TX_WgEO_0otz5dDbRHbU-i9D_hJqFmmva8C4Hl5ry3aW8CzXb9sTsj1ZOehBqlnrSVqi5yW57vjlGLsMoDOwncvxF658mXk59BwAA__9uDXA-) racetrack hosted its first oval stock car race, complete with scoring controversies and crashes. The event was halted after 72 of 78 laps, with driver Milt Marion winning the $1,700 prize. Mr. T soaked up an outsized portion of 1980s pop culture with his signature catchphrase "I pity the fool!" Decades later, _The A-Team_ star leads a quiet life in California, as shown in today's ["Whatever Happened To..."](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnwVssDBg7A0PVJlu6drQucIlviyECEitvX6Wv0PUc6Rv-r8tyAYqUrp-woWkhLwn3GrE1LEu510oA5CsVSBtcyRGkavMiuNAHLg98XjxQfC6q8yYgCpQdmmGaxFGrUaluNW4UEkB4PWsuRpSDU9YFp6QNOI9Wd2ReGpd8Hjg_ctVbOYl5tHKGCZUbAlMcPbVc-u9Mqa0Y4jM_sPQub100a2u3yuQbE2cmzvu-9898b3eLr_-1QHMrk-cHkx_vSf-caswXf-qK8bedYqSqJ6b4dQOKf2T7V4eHEb8BAAD__2zVcXs) In case you missed it, _The Flyover Podcast_ helps explain how four Social Security changes are affecting millions of retirees' budgets. Host Ayla Brown unpacks how rising premiums and tax thresholds could offset benefit gains. [Tune in here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz0Fu6yAQANDT4F0szIzBWbD40pcXldIuumizssCMk6mwiYAk8u2r9gq9wJPex2k6OY68XV7dSrYuadroWSLVSnnK91LYOQ6Fs9tWd-GZ3VZ8mpRU-iDhIIcpOI77hE2wC5EiaMh2xqijxh6xuVrwMABo6nsdTKfRKbUMPsw-zDMeCRu2P5oEOXRSHiW2Howaeg-DM4RztwiUFLim3H4l3uqVlrinB-V2TmsT7bXWWxHwT6hRqHFP93pvPQk1vi3r-4s5fyKdBYxVwH-Qusk23J4cIxdtBMrL6jj-SvVP_YdV3wEAAP__ycRsxQ)! Today's sponsor, [Dr. Gundry MD](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMVuQfWcwHjxUisjSZOjSERl8JFcZiGwnKG9fpa_Q-fv0G_7f5-HsOfJ6vfiFXJm3YaU9RyqF0pAeObP3HDInvy7-yhP7NY_bABLag8SD7IbgOb4GXQU3EwFhRU4ZA7bVjdbVzdk2hAaxtdoCmW5SCLoxXaAGrESjKnZvTaLslJRW6npEA10zYucN6UnNQksKXLZU_2y8lhvN8bU9KdXTtlTR3Uq5Z4EfAnoB_b7v9RLSncp7FtB_nczlchTQ47k9fSr7vmGfH6MSeDQosUou3HeOkXNrhJbXxXP8s8u_gjwd_AYAAP__4VFwGQ), is sharing a revealing report on the hidden grocery-store problem he believes may be contributing to low energy, digestive issues, and unwanted weight gain for millions of Americans over 35.
|
---
## Russia Sharing Intel on U.S. Military With Iran
Russia has been [sharing intelligence with Iran](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb8Gd6wwYGMXFGncvbQprTEM3kkwrIDd1f59RPIJrxldzUhHc-6vr_0LKFI6f8KFtoW8J3zXiK1h2cuzVgIgX6lAuuAkR5DqkXcp5MyF4mLZPVD87HrwNiBKVAPa0Ri5znrSerhbIYRDI4_FTf4IejLOzKDAjce4rDiuA9lOE0osoxCr0LdDGblMh1rAoHZjYFqgp5bL7Xem1O4Y4ie_sNxcvoZo7609KlM_mNyY3NLnkWvrJya3DmZyE6qPnt65RM-7IpPbfz1-0ovSybsipxRyuaBR7pljCLk03jKH1sD94c_a1xd5H5Ej1MbkNhTrH2-KkepsmBbnBRT__da-VejLyr8BAAD__3SLil0) about the location of U.S. forces in the Middle East in an attempt to help Tehran fight back against "Operation Epic Fury." The intelligence assistance from Russia [could help Iran locate American warships](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAYhJ8GOwwCihYU19jttVcahF_3vyAYwDW-_cXdR7hqislM5pufx_Qw6DGs32YDXZY4BTizh1IgTenIGY1BlzGZsJkVLZqQ5zhxxjvKBGX95Az6a5KV0wsAB1GBbpTiQydbKaun7mFW7cysmJVjyi2tXJwyjR2YGqAVfYX6bmOC9Q1jA5P1LBTv21n0RoG0zUIkA4clpvo3YihPWPwVX5BqG7fK62cpeybii_CR8PE8zzrM9qa4fcLHPXosaDPhYzAFYzCeZrBHwnIRPn4g6Z7iCx2GlWIo4D2uECzQG5z6aN9BemS6xGQh0xyPj5qLJhsM73jTtFXSbj_Re8ydIpKtm0H_nln-9e1L878AAAD__y0hkcM), radar, or other communication systems, but there is no indication that Moscow is helping direct Iranian missiles or drone strikes. Meanwhile, Ukrainian military personnel are expected to arrive in the Persian Gulf soon [to help countries there fend off Iranian drone attacks](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAURL9GMywGUZiA4CVm89INrStc9e4iWIDj-vdbM_sJG3XS1V3nfDzGB5CnsPyHDU2Z4xjwzB5LwTSmI2cCIJcpQdhgIUsQ8hRHwUXPeMu4Hh2Qv0ZZOzMjCmxrNDelxL2XnZT1arjSSjjdOSX1xFu0Vuu-m-x91mCVhZrMa423XN84v3PZTK0SuptaDQqlvc2V5OioxNR8Rgplxdlf8YmpsXGrvVlL2XPV_qvEUInhPM-m0IY5zpQToH-1KjEcXwkoINvIU4F0MZdiQIbfO6aS32kLOkaBLYefGWT2i88ykGP52Hd_UVjYSwU7qayMQkFfiaFOxu0neU-5V5Xkywb0vq3Ln4w-jfgJAAD__-ZSjuU). President Trump [issued a warning to Iran on Saturday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLEOmzAQhp_GbBeZw4Fk8NCFLV07oiM-4CpjI9skok9fua_Q5ZaTvv___l-v6UXiJaw_aWdbljgF_mbPpXCa0pmzEInLkijstMpbKOQ5TqixB92BfkyOxF-TaZxdmJG7hm07DPjszd2YZrMtuac28_2pqW_7xeF9eBvEGZG7lp1pxFaa7vSj1fqpzW3uBnzc5-5BA5t3uyij2UmJ6fY7SigbL_6KH063d9wbb7dSjqy6HwpHhWO4jphLfSkcK1jhqLt6BoXjmaH6KRxLOvcDvpRChmoHX_EeZoZNCnw4XbBRchADZCpncnRBpitD4lV2Bjqij6v8YQclwi7OeQamXCCwrNscUw1pknVHBUvuB2X0upP4f7XLf239sfg3AAD__0GHlD0). In a social media post, he wrote, _" Today Iran will be hit very hard! Under serious consideration for complete destruction and certain death, because of Iran's bad behavior, are areas and groups of people that were not considered for targeting up until this moment in time."_
## White House Event Addresses NCAA Sports Issues
President Trump [hosted a college sports roundtable](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSnDAQRL8GMm0JSQtcoMAJ2Tl1SA3SAOMSEqUZlru_d639CY67uqvf-_U5fwIlyttPONDLWuaMNycUwTrXi5kAKDJVyAdsFAgyL2U22vRKW6XHOQKl79m10a-IBm2LvhsG89G7p3Pt7qF7wjBYM7qAYIJZOwy270zsbIhBry3595q2euy0_tDusdjBjM_FjjCgC93aOI2RpNTH70JZdlzTd3lhfYRytMnvIic39kdjpsZM930_1vL1pnjnjZn4LFW4MZPU6zgVo7Bi2nZhlSmpituVQKhkxaFUVBBEhZISbqj-dVUtV44CS0IlCIysIBfZsSr8wnAJvVCVGrG21cfzppSI-6FxejuA0t-f8l9yX978CQAA__9zXZPO) on Friday to consider solutions to key challenges, including name, image, and likeness (NIL) issues. Many of the attendees agreed that the industry needs to be saved from the [spiraling costs associated with the onset of NIL payments](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu9CAUhJ8Gd1gYWF8Kir9xt3-b0sL44D0JF4vDrrNvHzmvkG6kkUbzfR_35W4xYNr_2wim-rwkOClArVCW8iRCa3EjLDZFu6NDm2jNixSy50JxMS6bxfBedLMZDyBBNWC6YZBTr29aNw9zm1bw2neyd1PnOtW5fnXD2ItJgJrU2qC51oQSYyfEJHS7qkGOt1WNdgDtOs-0gA1rLu1nxlQf4MM7v6C0LscmmEetBzH1j8mZyfk8z9atdFFcPZPzFZmca3nGg8P2dLZiTpzeVCFyj99A3OUQYAdORy6VeLIROEa7Aw_4BQmIeMLA5NwUsx0nhoDUD0yLPVoMv0fqn-y9jPwJAAD__ww7hk4). A bill called the SCORE Act, which has struggled to pass the House, could be the base of any change. House Speaker Mike Johnson suggested there are now enough votes to pass it. Former Ohio State football coach [Urban Meyer](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGP3CAQRn8N7rDwwBlv4SIN3aVNaY3NeHciDAhYO_730aVLffUnfe_p_fpcPpEDx-dPPGhue1oiXTVQa1SW8q6VEdlXLhgPfPLGGOuaFlAwSqWlmhaPHO7FdH7eiYB0R_NgLTxG82FM95qt2uyAo7VekfbD7rXfNKyTHfRqQKmO5683pdU0KPVQpl-1helj1RNaMtuwC6PIc0ul_504thft4U4nlX5LRxfmV2u5Cv1DgBPgruvqqeb4Nfb4FuC2FAI9SdacSqsCXG2p3ALcIsCxF-DMNMD40IMA51PE4GUr7yPLHDBWSX9oezc-SabiqciawkmSTiq3zCWtgQ5ZkCt5-T9KZowUujL7fHEIXEcrjHoeyOGfevtW73OGvwEAAP__Z6KWuA) said part of the solution is to "get rid of the collectives." He told the nearly 50 panelists, _"Donors put money in a pot. It's distributed to the players through coaches and managers. That's not allowed. Not supposed to do that. That's pay-for-play."_ The summit included NCAA President Charlie Baker, each of the Power Four commissioners, university presidents, and many power brokers from college and professional sports.
## Apple Remains Top Brand
Apple remains the world's most valuable brand in the 2026 Brand Finance Global 500 with the top five spots--Apple, Microsoft, Google, Amazon, and NVIDIA--[all held by American tech companies](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd1gYsE0Kim3cZdstrQc8x28HQwTEVv5-lPmF6a_uOTr_7usdKFJ6_IUDbdvymvCqEVvDspZXrQRAoVKBdMCDPEGqLq9SyIkLxYVZA1B8r7oLdkOUqDq0wzzL26RHrbvdejGM3kmhhHN6NN47tRnnwyYNKnebOrKfN6GEGYS4Cd07NUszOmVgRu2HjWmBgVou_f9Mqe24xXc-sfQ-H120e2vPytQfJhcml-u6-pPqC6KHJzWIVNtnyORSIH1h4G1HfuUSQ-VHro2fEF_gInJXIIXKKfGPEJNLV2x4XhQj1WlmWjwOoPhDbb9KdVr5HQAA__-oB38N). **Whatever happened to Mr. T?** Mr. T once seemed impossible to miss. With his mohawk, stacks of gold chains, and gravelly warning that he "pitied the fool," he became one of the most unmistakable faces of 1980s pop culture. For a few years, he was everywhere: movies, television, toys, cartoons, and wrestling rings. Then, almost as quickly as he arrived, the spotlight moved on. Behind the persona was Laurence Tureaud, born in 1952 and raised on Chicago's South Side as the second to youngest of 12 children. After high school, he joined the U.S. Army as a military policeman, and when he returned to civilian life, his imposing presence helped him find work as a nightclub bouncer and bodyguard for celebrities. His big break came almost by accident. Sylvester Stallone spotted him in a television segment featuring tough nightclub bouncers and cast him as the villain Clubber Lang in the 1982 film _Rocky III_. The role turned Mr. T into a sensation and led to his signature part as Sgt. B.A. Baracus on NBC's hit series _The A-Team_ from 1983 to 1987 (see the [opening credits here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnwVssDBg7A0PVJlu6drQucIlviyECEitvX6Wv0PUc6Rv-r8tyAYqUrp-woWkhLwn3GrE1LEu510oA5CsVSBtcyRGkavMiuNAHLg98XjxQfC6q8yYgCpQdmmGaxFGrUaluNW4UEkB4PWsuRpSDU9YFp6QNOI9Wd2ReGpd8Hjg_ctVbOYl5tHKGCZUbAlMcPbVc-u9Mqa0Y4jM_sPQub100a2u3yuQbE2cmzvu-9898b3eLr_-1QHMrk-cHkx_vSf-caswXf-qK8bedYqSqJ6b4dQOKf2T7V4eHEb8BAAD__2zVcXs)). At the show's peak, Mr. T was less an actor than a phenomenon. However, when _The A-Team_ ended, his star cooled. Television pilots and film roles never recreated the magic of his early fame. A bigger change came in 1995 when Mr. T was diagnosed with T-cell lymphoma. During treatment, he spoke openly about faith and humility. He famously gave up wearing most of his gold chains, saying the illness reminded him that life required gratitude more than flash. _" I used to say: 'I believe in God,' but after cancer, I started saying: 'I depend on God,'"_ he said.

Now in his seventies, Mr. T lives quietly in California, occasionally appearing in public and sharing messages about faith, perseverance, and helping others. [Here are some of his current photos](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOrCAUgOGnwW4MwkG0oLiN3dx2S3OUg3MmKAbYMfP2m9lX2PpPvuL_us935MjH9h93cjWk-aCrRKqV8py_S2FE9oUzHjtuvDIeZUmzkqq_SX2Tw-yR43uGxrtApEg35Dpr1diDAWgeTvsV-x7BEtqgRwOd0f1qFqUseRu6ht1Hk1oOnZSjhHbRVg1m0QNagrULAiR5rim3z8RHfVCI7_Si3K5pb6J71HoWof8JNQk1XdfVPs9U6qcKNaV9E2rCXHmNdBvMCGCa7Px5cYxceitAbjty_NXqnxa8nPoJAAD__8Y-bt8). _Were you a fan of Mr. T or the A-Team? Under serious consideration for complete destruction and certain death, because of Iran's bad behavior, are areas and groups of people that were not considered for targeting up until this moment in time." White House Event Addresses NCAA Sports Issues President Trump on Friday to consider solutions to key challenges, including name, image, and likeness (NIL) issues. Many of the attendees agreed that the industry needs to be saved from the . A bill called the SCORE Act, which has struggled to pass the House, could be the base of any change. House Speaker Mike Johnson suggested there are now enough votes to pass it. Former Ohio State football coach said part of the solution is to "get rid of the collectives." He told the nearly 50 panelists, "Donors put money in a pot. It's distributed to the players through coaches and managers. That's not allowed. Not supposed to do that. That's pay-for-play." The summit included NCAA President Charlie Baker, each of the Power Four commissioners, university presidents, and many power brokers from college and professional sports. Apple Remains Top Brand Apple remains the world's most valuable brand in the 2026 Brand Finance Global 500 with the top five spots--Apple, Microsoft, Google, Amazon, and NVIDIA--. Apple's brand is valued at $607.6 billion, while Microsoft hit $565.2 billion, crossing the $550 billion threshold for the first time. NVIDIA was the breakout performer, with 110% growth thanks to surging demand for AI infrastructure. The total value of the world's 500 most valuable brands reached $10.4 trillion, an 11% increase over 2025, with the U.S. accounting for 192 brands and 53.4% of the ranking's total value. . The secret is knowing the that separate clean, effective formulas from dangerous ones. Don't waste your money on "dirty collagen." . | Whatever happened to Mr. T? Mr. T once seemed impossible to miss. With his mohawk, stacks of gold chains, and gravelly warning that he "pitied the fool," he became one of the most unmistakable faces of 1980s pop culture. For a few years, he was everywhere: movies, television, toys, cartoons, and wrestling rings. Then, almost as quickly as he arrived, the spotlight moved on. Behind the persona was Laurence Tureaud, born in 1952 and raised on Chicago's South Side as the second to youngest of 12 children. After high school, he joined the U.S. Army as a military policeman, and when he returned to civilian life, his imposing presence helped him find work as a nightclub bouncer and bodyguard for celebrities. His big break came almost by accident. Sylvester Stallone spotted him in a television segment featuring tough nightclub bouncers and cast him as the villain Clubber Lang in the 1982 film Rocky III. The role turned Mr. T into a sensation and led to his signature part as Sgt. B.A. Baracus on NBC's hit series The A-Team from 1983 to 1987 (see the ). At the show's peak, Mr. T was less an actor than a phenomenon. However, when The A-Team ended, his star cooled. Television pilots and film roles never recreated the magic of his early fame. A bigger change came in 1995 when Mr. T was diagnosed with T-cell lymphoma. During treatment, he spoke openly about faith and humility. He famously gave up wearing most of his gold chains, saying the illness reminded him that life required gratitude more than flash. " I used to say: 'I believe in God,' but after cancer, I started saying: 'I depend on God,'" he said. Now in his seventies, Mr. T lives quietly in California, occasionally appearing in public and sharing messages about faith, perseverance, and helping others. . Were you a fan of Mr. T or the A-Team? | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. ## 70+ Arrested as Spring Break Begins in Galveston
More than [70 people were arrested](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHSnDAMhU8DnRljWAyFizR0mzYlI7AATQzesZRluX3Ge4W_l9573_fnOT2BAp3bbzjQyWeN04kXBxTBNG3Ar0QLciJGFkjMkhD-4mS06ZRulO4nDxTuqS29m7Uf6hJdba0ZOmv7rtxdC_M8dBaNfvi-MzXoBhtozewHU_etLcnlMN3ovq51o9tqWBF8b_VqEGEeHkWr0ZPEVMmOgh_gNdzxjala4lEGt4u8uGh-FWYszHhdV7XGj-n2-I8lnvmoMGOmKsx4xIRKdjiV1QpSQhZWB3hUG4Q35gdFHOD06tukFpJbZQvnpubMruK60kIQwq2yEuEyOf-6KATizhat3g6g8N0mPzP6duZ_AAAA___n9Y76) on Friday across Galveston Island and in Texas City as spring break began and hundreds of high school seniors gathered for the unofficial "Senior Skip Day." Law enforcement agencies [increased patrols](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAQRb8Gd6wAe7FdUKRx99KmtMYw2CisQcxk9_nvI-cXUh_p6tzz62v9gpTTuf-EFzr-jmU98UMZmbGtO1BtySO1REgMjYgbwm9cjTJWql6qaQ2Q8rUOXXCbCrPu0OlxNLMdx8l2hwu2xwGjjkrboMMQAIMd--eE8zaMdu6Su8dUryatVa-GxxwRwjSqaBBhm59iUBgSl_bgAxm_gWK-yhvbw5dXl93BXEn0P4RZhFlg87q_iTBLLcTCLPeJc5fbrS4PhPcluUGMycsMbUfpW_kEklf5c-6yYqkZ5Q75jcTllLWVV2WSteTkUfpcCOWG4A8J3iPdJJ1Mwix6stNzNpMwS9dcqJ-UcyI7ikHtL0j5nzH_X-e3M38DAAD__40olZ4) after crowds gathered at Buc-ee's in Texas City before heading to the island. Authorities said 10 firearms were confiscated during the operation, including two reported stolen. Large crowds and heavy traffic [forced police to temporarily close](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkMFugjAch58GbpJSSguHHkiUmWXuMKNuJ1Laf7GxUmw70D394l5hp9_lly9fvtOu2wljzTi8iyvweNeuG2EJFmIE3w0iTN5ICN4ECFH4EKIHcYEOI0xXqFihqlPC2EdHUsV7pOo8BZ4zhmvKWEXTMydUEgxlBSKHGtNSAWW5qvs-V1TLClLDnzBUoCrPUYFIVmsQqmJIYwDR12VCECgTnc_iGSLcRdD24WbwmXTX1PJzjFNIiibBbYLbZVkyLST0zl2ehwS3g7AzhOjGyVkjIcHt5EIMz9W9UQgfdpvZzaS-7W_rIF40bpri_sHIG_ny39vRN3L9ut17-ilPh_hw7XHTOLf-acxUVowdvU09V9NirDWBsoSg4SqM_dOL_4s6c_wbAAD__y_tjd8) several beach access points on the west end of Galveston Island before reopening them later in the afternoon.
## Tensions Push Oil Higher
Gas prices across Texas have risen as geopolitical tensions involving Iran push crude oil prices higher. [AAA reports](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOszAQRk8DnZExDjaFi7-hy99uiQY8BmsdHHkmIbn9iuwRtnvF6I3e93WdrhBT3Nf_cEPHr5CnHQ9KyIxlWoHuJS5IJRISQyHigvCNk5KqF7IT0k4eYnpPuvZuln5oa3StMWrojbF9vbnWWrSdBvDezIuG2dtuDrK9SAuAPtTRnTLZSdu2spO6GQKCt0YGhQjzcKm0RB85l4Y3ZHwBhfTOTyzNkm91chvznaruX6XGSo3HcTQhv_SZcR5UajyxUuMKJH5zxNkj9lx4Ex-heAgSscAulryHFBc-geP-QKqL8_cjphSpN5WW6w1i-rzmvw32dOonAAD__3wRg9U) the statewide average price for regular gasoline has reached**** $2.87 per gallon, while the national average stands at $3.25. [Prices are also rising](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO5CAQheHT4KwsjA2YgGATZ7PphlYBRTda2m5BqT1z-1XPHmEu8Ot978_H_oGlluP2Gx_k-TOf-0FXr8RMbb9hf7YSqbfSqTO23rkR_qVdSWVAziDXPWGpX_syJB9kctNAfrJWOWPtaoa7txYdzjFpLSnakLNGTcHFGbVaDOFQ_DsmZ7lOk5zlMrpMmFYrsyLC4LRYJKXCZxv5Tkyf2HP9Ol_Uxng-hurvzM8u5l9CbUJt13WNMfTJjfwSasPGJVYSanu7hNrqGbEKtd2ww38clAMIO8N3G95WwEdJUBoewHT0ch4dEBEaPc_G74yWE4So4iT1CqvBAIvLGdY4EywmRJvDLI0yQ_PpeZVaSzdWLPL2wFK_h_PP7n559S8AAP__H7WUpA) as refineries shift to summer-blend gasoline and travel demand increases ahead of spring break and seasonal road trips. In East Texas, drivers say they're already noticing the jump at local stations. AAA spokesperson Daniel Armbruster said the [global oil market](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvO2zAMhZ9G3hTIlOLLoKGLt3TtaNAW7QhV5EBkbm9fKH2Ef-FAHJyPH_9c5gvGFPP-G2_k5b0dc6YXJxKhMu_I9xJX4hKZWLAwSyH8SzMY6LSx2gxzwJg-s2uCX0wY24Z82_cwdn0_dM3Vo11W7B0BBGcDWERHZ3IbESwYVmyir2XGmqFtjTXuNG6EYejNBkS4jGflDIUoRznJlYTeyFv6HE8qp_W4NclfRe6s7C8Fk4Ipo8QjY5Ij4KcmFEwPVjDJW8GED5aYa4xedVnRCiZj6zgrmHZk_d9ZV2kds_4iNbKOBbNej7yluIomXjGhUK1pig_3V0wpctcrZ_YbxvQ9T3721KeHfwEAAP__B5CNWA) remains sensitive to international conflicts, adding that higher crude prices are putting upward pressure on gasoline costs nationwide.
## A&M Plans Space Hub
Texas A&M University plans to open its [$200 million Space Institute](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAURp8GOw0ighQUf_LHbrbd0lzhqmRRCdwZZ95-M_MKW5_kfPnO9226QYjhWL9gR0vP5ZwOvEpEIszTCiXl4LDkULAQ5FIoI_zgJLhQNe9qPkweQnxNsvJ25t60FdpWa2GU1oOqNqv7eZFOGuMHNbe9UlqhX7RW3iH2_VIF-5bxjg9tyzsuG7Mg-EHzRSDCbHomOfpAZ25oQ8InlCW-zgfmxp17Fe1GlArr_jExMjFe19W4LZ_HmzIxvu8wMUKm4CIyMX4MNdR7XRI4rMNRKNCdsBat6bWRsklbYt14p30q5z07ZN1_twGtiT6T2fp0hRhDUZpJvu4Q4gfQ3wo-rPgNAAD__7vPh00) this fall near NASA's Johnson Space Center, aiming to position Texas as a long-term hub for space exploration. The four-story facility will sit on a 32-acre site and will feature the world's largest indoor lunar and Martian landscapes--specialized testing environments designed for robotics, astronaut training, and mission simulations. Institute leaders say the [project aims to support decades of research](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMZ3RYgyYwsX_S-ercu2VaMELWGcg8joheftT8gpXj_RpZr4vwwVDDPvyhRvZ_JiPYaeTI-VMaViQrylMxCkwccbEnBPhDw0KVCuhlmAGjyE-B114O4Lvq4Js1XWqb7vOtMVqtWn8RGhwNJMBMlDpudVjA2qu585TEewLgxpMVUENuuxnQm86mBURjn0jNJAP-UhlXinTA3mOz-NOqZyOrYh2zfnKov4nlBPKnedZbry_MqEc7fLGQrnXKKHckVdKQrm3Im_7nUJkqQA2uWFimYgJ07TK9TYK5ZZNfl4a-K-hdR9Fsv56hhgDt53QsGwY4rtC_ttxd6t-AwAA__-X5oLa) related to future Moon and Mars missions. "_It 's basically setting up Texas to be the center of two generations of future exploration_," said Associate Director Robert Ambrose.

On this day in 1912, future Texas Gov. was born in Williamson County. He served in the Texas House and Senate before being elected lieutenant governor in 1962 and governor in 1968. He lost his bid for a third term as governor after becoming embroiled in the Sharpstown stock-fraud scandal. From to , Texas headlines span quite a range today. Authorities said 10 firearms were confiscated during the operation, including two reported stolen. Tensions Push Oil Higher Gas prices across Texas have risen as geopolitical tensions involving Iran push crude oil prices higher. the statewide average price for regular gasoline has reached** $2.87 per gallon, while the national average stands at $3.25. as refineries shift to summer-blend gasoline and travel demand increases ahead of spring break and seasonal road trips. In East Texas, drivers say they're already noticing the jump at local stations. AAA spokesperson Daniel Armbruster said the remains sensitive to international conflicts, adding that higher crude prices are putting upward pressure on gasoline costs nationwide. A&M Plans Space Hub Texas A&M University plans to open its this fall near NASA's Johnson Space Center, aiming to position Texas as a long-term hub for space exploration. The four-story facility will sit on a 32-acre site and will feature the world's largest indoor lunar and Martian landscapes--specialized testing environments designed for robotics, astronaut training, and mission simulations. Institute leaders say the related to future Moon and Mars missions. name: Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate
subject: Full-court press
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Good morning, Peter!
[**If you can afford it, we’re asking you to please make a $5 contribution to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign here in Georgia.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260308-1-subs-b&t=1&akid=1796%2E5691347%2Eeb2mdK)
Sorry to be so direct, but Jon is the ONLY Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Trump won. **He is without a doubt MAGA’s number one target, and Jon needs your help to fight back and win.**
The GOP and their Super PACs already spent more than $10 million in Georgia, and both JD Vance and Donald Trump himself have already come to Georgia and attacked Jon. We’re getting the full-court press with 8 months to go!
And by the time we hit Election Day, the GOP and their Super PACs are likely to have spent hundreds of millions of dollars to replace Jon with a MAGA loyalist and Trump rubber-stamp.
So we’re asking for your help. Because the truth is, **we either fight back now or risk losing Georgia to a full-blown MAGA takeover.**

Super Tuesday victories prove our ground game is already delivering results early in the season.

But the expenses associated with training chasers, mapping precincts, and mobilizing volunteers continue to rack up. We rely on patriots like you to fund these initiatives and take our efforts to the next level.
**We can fund the biggest ballot chasing army in history this year, and that’s what it’ll take to maintain an America First majority, with your generosity and continued support.**

Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

# [Republicans Keep Buying Bad Candidates -- And Expecting Different Results](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1249381&post_id=190273506&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkwMjczNTA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzI5NzAzNjMsImV4cCI6MTc3NTU2MjM2MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEyNDkzODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ab_aKqKRjgm4AfL4TfvzMxm9T7VJlODdXkl8Hupxfao)
### Different election, same tricks -- now in Texas.
Mar 8
---

---

[](https://substack.com/redirect/02b760f6-e3d5-4dcd-ac86-ca526cb54736?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
My opponents poured $60 million into a primary race, while I spent less than $2 million -- all of it from the people. And Dr. Oz went on to lose BIGLY in the general.

**Different election, same tricks -- now in Texas.** John Cornyn spent over $100 million against AG Paxton in Texas and still couldn't win the primary. That kind of candidate will lose BIGLY in the general.

Now, if the tradeoff is between Republican senators voting on the SAVE Act today and losing this Senate seat in the general, that might be a tradeoff we're willing to make. But we will make it with our eyes wide open. Learn the patterns and stop outsourcing your thinking. Blessings.

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Sunday, March 8th, 2026
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The fight is on. It is here. VoteVets is mobilizing against this war and against the people who are dragging us into it.
#
Peter, we know you probably didn’t wake up this morning and think to yourself, “Today is the day I am going to make a donation to VoteVets.” But in a few moments, we’re going to ask you to do just that.
If you have the time, please give us a chance to explain why that donation is important.
VoteVets was founded at the height of the Iraq War. We deployed, saw friends wounded and killed, and came home knowing that the President of the United States lied us into that war. And we made a vow, to ourselves and to the people we lost, that we’d do anything we could to stop that from happening again.
20 years later, the President of the United States is lying us into another war. Another generation of American kids, our finest, are at risk of suffering the same fate we did. The same mistakes we watched back then are happening again now.
The fight is on. It is here. VoteVets is mobilizing against this war and against the people who are dragging us into it. What we need now are the people who care about this, just as much as we do. We need our strongest supporters. We need you.
VoteVets can and will make an absolutely massive difference. But we can’t do it alone.
[**If you are still with VoteVets and we can count on your support, please make a donation of $10 and help us stop this disaster of a war before it gets any worse. Please.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar26.134TD_&refcode=em260308-1-160&t=1&akid=34992%2E3013755%2EQteHeq)

We need our strongest supporters. We need you. VoteVets can and will make an absolutely massive difference. But we can’t do it alone. name: Defend Our Courts
subject: Trump advisor calls for ICE thugs to threaten Dems at polls
body:
Steve Bannon has revealed MAGA’s plan to have its ICE troops surround polling places. We have to take a stand.
| | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below.
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w==&ch=374622f4-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&ca=5739dc9c-bf25-4901-9e67-bac55dc3b30c) | [Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?ch=374622f4-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&t=001tNmBb8DuMMOdVm5fFeJ9Mw==&lang=001FCSs65SMrsI=&m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w==&p=oo&ca=5739dc9c-bf25-4901-9e67-bac55dc3b30c) | [Constant Contact Data Notice](https://www.constantcontact.com/legal/customer-contact-data-notice)

---
| Friend,
The gloves are off. MAGA said it loud and proud.
On the heels of Donald Trump openly threatening to have MAGA nationalize elections, his longtime advisor and MAGA mouthpiece, Steve Bannon, revealed Trump's most insidious election rigging plot yet:

---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CmNsxH3qQJFTLT2igEKbY5NgncGwYFiVYDVtealu43-Q-WFOCbMDec5Ra6eljeXmXN7HS8Jv_MvdFDdgDpoMGaHRHG6Si2fpqloNSju3Yb8V9G18OVaGHctOSLTB2YkQoLTNv8u3gOf8QRvTBDNM1f2KJVIn_NUtcxYO53SOzjyBQXz_6CKjX3r2qVQyLeEUo-IN-LoDUW8kqbnjwfDlQFtXRNFcjBwwx071uRUS574Jd3_s8WsURH50CRNU9RQK9HARYS_gXK0=&c=wG0s8QTsm3n2cqRb-EgamcHyVjCWIVMJoEU3uW3S1m-gjS2KCIr3yw==&ch=z7xz-AvPogA0z7HO-g07oGLbja9VdEc-rBN9st2m63r6Plzqa_XXnQ==)
---
| MAGA has declared war against free and fair elections.
For months, Defend Our Courts has warned that MAGA was plotting to rig upcoming elections by any means possible. What Bannon revealed confirms exactly the type of extreme measures that we feared: they are preparing to use federal force to interfere with voting itself.
MAGA knows it is headed for major losses if elections remain free and fair. Instead of changing course, it is choosing coercion. Instead of persuasion, it is choosing fear.
And it's important to be clear about how this works.
In most states, the presence of law enforcement at polling places is tightly regulated--or prohibited entirely--by state law. The authority to stop voter intimidation does not come from Washington. It comes from state courts, and ultimately from state Supreme Courts.
That is why MAGA's long-term strategy has focused on capturing those courts. This is not new. This is the next phase.
Last year, Defend Our Courts helped lead the successful defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court--a critical firewall in the most important swing state in the country. That victory wasn't symbolic. It protected the court that would have final say over election disputes in 2026 and beyond.
Now MAGA is escalating nationwide.
In 2026, state Supreme Court elections will take place in Michigan, Wisconsin, and Georgia--the very states where voter intimidation would be most consequential, and where courts will be called on to intervene if MAGA follows through on its threats.
This is why Defend Our Courts exists. We saw what was coming early. We rallied over 100 thousand Democrats to support our cause and built a winning model in Pennsylvania.
Now we are taking our winning formula national. With Democrats stretched thin by House and Senate races, defending democracy in the courts will not happen unless we do it.
[That is why we're asking you today: Will you step up and chip in $25, $15, or whatever you can spare right now to help us defend and expand pro-democracy majorities on state Supreme Courts before MAGA puts its plan into action](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CmNsxH3qQJFTLT2igEKbY5NgncGwYFiVYDVtealu43-Q-WFOCbMDec5Ra6eljeXmXN7HS8Jv_MvdFDdgDpoMGaHRHG6Si2fpqloNSju3Yb8V9G18OVaGHctOSLTB2YkQoLTNv8u3gOf8QRvTBDNM1f2KJVIn_NUtcxYO53SOzjyBQXz_6CKjX3r2qVQyLeEUo-IN-LoDUW8kqbnjwfDlQFtXRNFcjBwwx071uRUS574Jd3_s8WsURI8JMcQFQZ4q-RTS9oGpCsA=&c=wG0s8QTsm3n2cqRb-EgamcHyVjCWIVMJoEU3uW3S1m-gjS2KCIr3yw==&ch=z7xz-AvPogA0z7HO-g07oGLbja9VdEc-rBN9st2m63r6Plzqa_XXnQ==)?
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CmNsxH3qQJFTLT2igEKbY5NgncGwYFiVYDVtealu43-Q-WFOCbMDec5Ra6eljeXmXN7HS8Jv_MvdFDdgDpoMGaHRHG6Si2fpqloNSju3Yb8V9G18OVaGHctOSLTB2YkQoLTNv8u3gOf8QRvTBDNM1f2KJVIn_NUtcxYO53SOzjyBQXz_6CKjX3r2qVQyLeEUo-IN-LoDUW8kqbnjwfDlQFtXRNFcjBwwx071uRUS574Jd3_s8WsURMim23ClEi_epgsl5-xaP8o=&c=wG0s8QTsm3n2cqRb-EgamcHyVjCWIVMJoEU3uW3S1m-gjS2KCIr3yw==&ch=z7xz-AvPogA0z7HO-g07oGLbja9VdEc-rBN9st2m63r6Plzqa_XXnQ==)
---
| | | | We are counting on you. And right now, the country is too.
In solidarity, Team Defend Our Courts
