name: Kyle Sweetser from Kyle For Alabama
subject: Bloody Sunday: The Senate Is the Last Line of Defense for the Voting Rights Act
body:
Sixty-one years ago today, hundreds of brave Americans set out across the Edmund Pettus Bridge to demand the right to vote.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..KB1NKFbCv2ieCpONto2dO-770ahLBBmIlJg0DAItc1w?) for more

# [Bloody Sunday: The Senate Is the Last Line of Defense for the Voting Rights Act ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=7318661&post_id=190281989&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkwMjgxOTg5LCJpYXQiOjE3NzI5ODE3ODUsImV4cCI6MTc3NTU3Mzc4NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTczMTg2NjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KS1MZag_4Nvp6tc7nfpPySlNUksQ8WV9wvcJ2wTngmI)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIva3lsZWZvcmFsYWJhbWEvcC9ibG9vZHktc3VuZGF5LXRoZS1zZW5hdGUtaXMtdGhlLWxhc3Q_.R6OokTZEavFtzJ3ssSPIqdZS1KhKrdtpmyPKyWyjGGg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/kyleforalabama/p/bloody-sunday-the-senate-is-the-last?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Sixty-one years ago today, hundreds of brave Americans set out across the Edmund Pettus Bridge to demand the right to vote. They were met with tear gas, billy clubs, and state troopers on horseback. Blood ran on that bridge. John Lewis had his skull fractured. Amelia Boynton was left unconscious on the pavement--the day we now call "Bloody Sunday'.
But here's what those marchers knew in their bones: the brutality wasn't the end of the story. It was the beginning of the Voting Rights Act of 1965--one of the most effective pieces of civil rights legislation in American history. That law didn't just protect the right to register and cast a ballot. It put teeth behind the 15th Amendment. It required states with the worst histories of discrimination--like Alabama--to get federal approval before changing voting rules. And it worked. Black voter registration in the South skyrocketed.
Fast forward to today. Voting rights are under coordinated assault, and the institution standing between us and the rollback of everything that those foot soldiers bled for on Bloody Sunday, is the United States Senate. That's why this race matters more than any political consultant or cable pundit will admit. When we win, we will put Alabama at the center of the fight again--this time not as the place where marchers were beaten, but as the state that helped save the promise of 1965 for every American. The people who crossed that bridge didn't ask for comfort. They asked for courage. They asked us to finish the job. Today, on the anniversary of Bloody Sunday, I'm asking you to stand with them. Stand with the legacy of John Lewis, Amelia Boynton, Hosea Williams, and every foot soldier who refused to turn back. Stand for the Voting Rights Act. Stand with our campaign of Truth and Justice. United, Alabama will lead again.
**The bridge is still there.
The choice is still ours. **
**Let 's cross it together.**
Kyle Sweetser
[www.KyleForAlabama.com](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7785ad2b-2520-41bf-be90-8a1d313c1c4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Check your voter registration status- [https://myinfo.alabamavotes.gov/voterview/](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/60bf548e-bffe-4059-8762-9e9c7b6e08dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Asking for your investment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek Ramaswamy and Rob McColley for Ohio

Peter,

It's International Women's Day, and as a woman, I've always known that not a single right has ever appeared out of thin air. For us, the struggle to be recognized as equal under the law has been long and relentless.

When the United States was founded, women were barely recognized as individuals. It took decades of sacrifice to secure the 19th Amendment and win the right to vote. And even then, the barriers didn't disappear. Until 1974, just a few decades ago, a woman couldn't open a bank account or get a credit card without a male co-signer!

**_Roe v. Wade_ was a monumental victory because it recognized that women are entitled to bodily autonomy under the law.** Since it was overturned in 2022, our country has faced a devastating crisis as abortion bans have caused tragedies throughout our country.

Here in Iowa, abortion is banned before most women know they are pregnant. Women are forced to leave their homes and their support systems to travel hundreds of miles out-of-state for care. Those who can't leave are forced to carry pregnancies against their will; even when their life is at stake. **Thanks to our restrictive laws that threaten doctors and interfere in the exam room, Iowa now has one of the lowest numbers of OB-GYNs per capita in the country.

That's why it's so painful to watch politicians like Mariannette Miller-Meeks cheer as our country moves backward.** Miller-Meeks supported and paved the way for this very ban. Then she fought to go even further, sponsoring a nationwide abortion ban with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. Her abortion ban could even end IVF nationwide.

**[If you believe we cannot allow our daughters to inherit fewer rights than their grandmothers fought to secure, add your name today and recommit yourself to this fight>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126908549/606344300/-432773073?ms=em26_260308_Women_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&refcode=em26_260308_Women_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&source=em26_260308_Women_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260308_Women_adv_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=IIFhwirzoCkOpveHiQnA4kMa6SIvnaOb4HUNVKGI3Ddqk9QLq3wWVsY4mX5uK2v+aayigTnrEuj7LMG6jGw3JpCyiIIgEYzU4fevZyyQhU3jzS/XRo+mDeTi/hy9ttKVz2XRR0To9FZQOMUxaQVBI40H0aEpAyCV0mqTPN3GK2o=&refcode2=c298197d-ff1a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjk4MTk3ZC1mZjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YStsPTlzHfD7MKwS4gotMExOxkdlxx3c-9-dBPEcKyI=&emci=8c6f9b88-b118-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=c298197d-ff1a-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=13891890)**

Thank you,

Christina

clean_body: Trump and his Republican allies love to wrap themselves in the flag. Absolutely not, Derek. It’s not patriotic to rip healthcare away from people to pay for tax handouts to the ultra-rich and powerful. It’s not patriotic to gut and privatize the VA and put the earned care of veterans who served our country at risk. It’s not patriotic to send ICE agents to our streets without respect for our laws or American lives and liberties. It’s not patriotic to threaten those who disagree with you—like the president did to me after he heard me state the law in a way that he didn’t like. Hear me on this, Derek: I won’t take any lecture on patriotism from anyone who trampled on our Constitution. I sure as hell won’t take a lecture from a draft-dodging president who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, and then pardoned those rioters and cop beaters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. subject: Virginia can turn the page

body:
This is our chance to put some guardrails on an administration run amok

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126909303/606346203/1674526804?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TurnPage_260308_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjk4MTk3ZC1mZjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaW1Qq35EMxfflPo3qjGz4MB0VLa6dHObU_EGM4S8ew=) Derek, it’s true – at the end of this email, [_**I’m going to ask you for a donation to my campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126909308/606346216/1674526804?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TurnPage_260308_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjk4MTk3ZC1mZjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaW1Qq35EMxfflPo3qjGz4MB0VLa6dHObU_EGM4S8ew=)

But first, let me tell you why:

I got into public service because I believe that government can actually work for people – to actually help families pay their bills, keep their health care, get a decent education, and build a good life. That’s what it should be about.

**And I’ve got to tell you, I’ve been doing this a long time, and I’ve never seen anything like Donald Trump.** He isn’t interested in _any_ of what I just described. In the first year of his presidency, he’s been more focused on White House vanity projects, erecting gold-plated monuments across D.C., and relitigating his 2020 election loss. It’s outrageous. The president’s ego is hurting families here at home, and America’s standing on the world stage.

**But there is hope. There are so many of us who refuse to accept this as our new normal. We know we can expect more of our leaders.**

In this year’s elections, we have the chance to elect Democratic majorities in Congress and put some much-needed guardrails on this administration run amok. But those chances hinge upon what happens here in Virginia, because the road to flipping the House and Senate blue goes straight through the Commonwealth.

[_**And that is why I need to ask: will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to my campaign today to elect Democrats across VA, take back control of Congress, and help us turn the page on the chaos and corruption of Donald Trump?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126909311/606346226/1674526804?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TurnPage_260308_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjk4MTk3ZC1mZjFhLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QaW1Qq35EMxfflPo3qjGz4MB0VLa6dHObU_EGM4S8ew=) name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Trump is forcing Wisconsinites to fill the gaps
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5247%2E35263%2EzoKb4z)
The attacks on Medicaid by this administration have left millions of families nationwide and hundreds of thousands of Wisconsinites scrambling to fill the gaps. Everyday families rely on Medicaid funding to access the services they need to live full and healthy lives — like support for caregivers, resources to pay for providers and health aides, and the regular support that people need to thrive. I’ve heard some _powerful_ stories from Wisconsinites from every corner of the state who are worried about how these cuts will impact their daily lives. I won’t stop shedding light on this issue. [**But I can’t lie, we need a Senate majority that is putting everyday people first, not slashing funds to benefit billionaires. Will you pitch in right now to help us build the coalition we need to fight for affordable health care?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-mar26.vzQga2&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260308_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5247%2E35263%2EzoKb4z) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-mar26.wJB64S&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260308_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5247%2E35263%2EzoKb4z)

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: 11 men named “John” (or Jon…)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate
body:

You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. Team, it’s Lisa. Today is International Women’s Day. It’s a moment to celebrate progress. And to be honest about how far we still have to go. There are 11 men named “John” serving in the United States Senate right now: John, Jon... you get the idea. And there have only been five Black women in the Senate — ever. **Five.** I’m proud to be one of them. But almost 250 years into our nation’s history, that number should be much higher. **And here’s something else that doesn’t get talked about enough:** Black women candidates raise, on average, just a fraction of what white candidates raise. In fact, Black women often raise only about one-third as much. That’s not because we work less hard.
It’s not because our message is weaker.
It’s because the system was never built with us in mind. We’re living in the results of that system right now. We’re seeing what happens when too many women - women like me - can’t get to the tables of power. While Americans are working harder than ever just to keep up, Republicans are using their Senate majority to push Trump’s agenda forward. While they’re “targeting DEI” and attacking voting rights, your taxes are going up. While they’re making it harder for leaders like me to pursue public service, there’s less money in your wallet. They’re fighting a pointless culture war while Americans pay the price. If we’re serious about flipping the Senate and electing more Black women to positions of power, it will take grassroots support to close the gap. So today, on International Women’s Day, I’m asking: [**Will you chip in $11 or more to help elect more Black women, flip the Senate, and ensure our leadership reflects the country we serve?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126911185/606350933/-489009331?amount=11&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.03.08_Intl-Womens-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Q5YzI3My0wMDFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QBBbli8E2aI5PufXPf8RPqQh94BqYSR6I6TOCBOXL5M=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126911581/606351616/794473033?refcode=logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTIyZDY5NS0wMDFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CMc1-hWlp6yCsgJmnDtaSHvCdqyW9be-LFBiXxVxOU=)

| | I’ve held a lot of titles in my day. Commander, Entrepreneur, Veteran, Congresswoman...but my favorite is, of course, “Mom.” When this picture was taken back in 2019, Violette was just eight years old. I wanted to teach her by example that women can do anything — raise kids, take on demanding careers, and make a positive impact on the world. I wanted to show her that she never has to compromise on her dreams. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126911585/606351618/-507177816?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_260308_FR_WHM_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTIyZDY5NS0wMDFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CMc1-hWlp6yCsgJmnDtaSHvCdqyW9be-LFBiXxVxOU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126911588/606351620/-507177816?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_260308_FR_WHM_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTIyZDY5NS0wMDFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CMc1-hWlp6yCsgJmnDtaSHvCdqyW9be-LFBiXxVxOU=) Through all the ups and downs of the last eight years, one thing hasn’t changed: the joy I get from watching my daughter become a bright, confident, and conscientious young woman. But as we celebrate another International Women’s Day, I can’t help but be angry with the leaders who’ve failed America’s women and girls so terribly these past few years. My daughter and her friends are growing up with fewer opportunities than I had, in a world that constantly tells them they’re not good enough. It’s our job to claw back those stolen freedoms so our daughters and granddaughters can focus on achieving their dreams, but frankly, we have our work cut out for us. I’m going to fight like hell to make sure my daughter inherits a country that lifts her up instead of holding her back, but that isn’t a one-woman endeavor. clean_body: | = | | I’ve held a lot of titles in my day. Commander, Entrepreneur, Veteran, Congresswoman...but my favorite is, of course, “Mom.” When this picture was taken back in 2019, Violette was just eight years old. I wanted to teach her by example that women can do anything — raise kids, take on demanding careers, and make a positive impact on the world. I wanted to show her that she never has to compromise on her dreams. = = Through all the ups and downs of the last eight years, one thing hasn’t changed: the joy I get from watching my daughter become a bright, confident, and conscientious young woman. But as we celebrate another International Women’s Day, I can’t help but be angry with the leaders who’ve failed America’s women and girls so terribly these past few years. My daughter and her friends are growing up with fewer opportunities than I had, in a world that constantly tells them they’re not good enough. It’s our job to claw back those stolen freedoms so our daughters and granddaughters can focus on achieving their dreams, but frankly, we have our work cut out for us. I’m going to fight like hell to make sure my daughter inherits a country that lifts her up instead of holding her back, but that isn’t a one-woman endeavor. = | | | = Together, Elaine Luria | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: JanePAC.com
subject: 1, 2, 3 reasons to feel hopeful right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
A few reminders of what we’ve already accomplished together.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126912992/606354202/1328794144?refcode=ea.e742eeb8-011b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ms=ea.e742eeb8-011b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3NDJlZWI4LTAxMWItZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTFmMGE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=otU96ZV1vMJJ0ZO88_21mFsSdVNq3mE_jmDxRehkQeE=&emci=44c60224-8c19-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=e742eeb8-011b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=4823105)
---
The headlines lately can feel overwhelming, so we’re bringing some much-needed good news straight to your inbox. Here are three reasons to stay hopeful right now, and if you’re able, **[consider chipping in a few dollars to make more wins like these possible:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126912994/606354203/2105508926?refcode=ea.e742eeb8-011b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ms=ea.e742eeb8-011b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3NDJlZWI4LTAxMWItZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTFmMGE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=otU96ZV1vMJJ0ZO88_21mFsSdVNq3mE_jmDxRehkQeE=)** | **1\. You’ve helped this movement become unstoppable.** Since launching JanePAC, grassroots supporters like you have helped us elect over **220 climate champions** to office all across this country. **More than 60** of those wins came in 2025 alone, including **22 seat flips** in districts that Big Oil and the MAGA Right thought they had locked down.
---
**2\. Your support is delivering real results.** **In New Jersey,** our endorsed Assemblymembers Katie Brennan and Ravi Bhalla introduced bold legislation to hold ICE accountable. **In Virginia,** our expanded majority just passed solar energy legislation that failed in previous years. **In California,** Attorney General Rob Bonta is dragging Big Oil into court for decades of climate deception. And **around the country,** our JanePAC leaders are speaking out against Donald Trump’s illegal war in Iran. _None of this would be possible without people like you._
---
**3\. We have a massive opportunity this November.** We are just three seats away from **flipping the House** and **bringing principled leadership to Washington.** And, we have the chance to **elect dozens more climate and democracy champions** in critical down-ballot races from Arizona to the Gulf Coast — leaders who can stand between Trump’s unchecked power and Big Oil’s influence.
---
We know we can win the fights ahead of us. We have bold leaders and people like you on their side. We just need the early resources to execute our strategy, which means we can’t afford to miss our fundraising goal this month.
**March marks the close of our first quarter of 2026, and we’re aiming to reach 17,050 grassroots donations by the end of it to go toe-to-toe with corporate polluters hellbent on buying these seats.**
_If we hit our goal,_ we’ll have what it takes to identify and support even more incredible candidates, dig deeper in primary races where our endorsed candidates are challenging Joe Manchin-style Democrats, and build the foundation we need to flip the House and protect vital climate seats down-ballot in November.

clean_body: A few reminders of what we’ve already accomplished together. | The headlines lately can feel overwhelming, so we’re bringing some much-needed good news straight to your inbox. Here are three reasons to stay hopeful right now, and if you’re able, = | 1\. You’ve helped this movement become unstoppable. Since launching JanePAC, grassroots supporters like you have helped us elect over 220 climate champions to office all across this country. More than 60 of those wins came in 2025 alone, including 22 seat flips in districts that Big Oil and the MAGA Right thought they had locked down. 2\. Your support is delivering real results. In New Jersey, our endorsed Assemblymembers Katie Brennan and Ravi Bhalla introduced bold legislation to hold ICE accountable. In Virginia, our expanded majority just passed solar energy legislation that failed in previous years. In California, Attorney General Rob Bonta is dragging Big Oil into court for decades of climate deception. And around the country, our JanePAC leaders are speaking out against Donald Trump’s illegal war in Iran. None of this would be possible without people like you. 3\. We have a massive opportunity this November. We are just three seats away from flipping the House and bringing principled leadership to Washington. And, we have the chance to elect dozens more climate and democracy champions in critical down-ballot races from Arizona to the Gulf Coast — leaders who can stand between Trump’s unchecked power and Big Oil’s influence. We know we can win the fights ahead of us. We have bold leaders and people like you on their side. We just need the early resources to execute our strategy, which means we can’t afford to miss our fundraising goal this month. March marks the close of our first quarter of 2026, and we’re aiming to reach 17,050 grassroots donations by the end of it to go toe-to-toe with corporate polluters hellbent on buying these seats. If we hit our goal, we’ll have what it takes to identify and support even more incredible candidates, dig deeper in primary races where our endorsed candidates are challenging Joe Manchin-style Democrats, and build the foundation we need to flip the House and protect vital climate seats down-ballot in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this! Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
Help us defeat a corporate shill in Illinois’s 8th congressional district.
#
Peter,
AIPAC, Crypto, and AI are trying to buy another House seat in Illinois’s 8th district, where Justice Democrats-endorsed Junaid Ahmed is running, just like they did in North Carolina last week.
According to Axios, **AIPAC and AI companies have covertly dropped $4 million in ads, and the Crypto lobby is promising to drop millions too, supporting one of Junaid’s opponents** , who previously served in Congress and earned the reputation of “Wall Street’s Favorite Democrat.”
The Israel lobby group has become so toxic that it’s secretly funneling millions of dollars into vague-sounding super PACs like Elect Chicago Women to indirectly support candidates like corporate Democrat Melissa Bean.
Meanwhile, AI companies are using the same tactics to buy our elections, funding super PACs supporting weak politicians to look the other way while they build data centers in our backyard that'll raise our utility bills and power Trump's war machine in Iran and Venezuela.
Crypto is looking for more empty suits to rubber-stamp their Big Tech-backed, for-profit agenda and Trump's Crypto corruption — they know that's exactly who Melissa Bean will be.
**AI, Crypto, and AIPAC think they can fool voters and buy more power in Congress:** it’s up to us, the people, to stop them.
**[Split a contribution of $5 or more to Junaid’s campaign and Justice Democrats to help us fight back against this spending and defeat a corporate shill in the upcoming March 17th primary →](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260308-ja.XgELBX&refcode=em20260308-37541&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=2&akid=37541%2E1203867%2Eq2tzBo)**

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I was evicted after an ICE agent called the police on me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-a [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-a]
As a Congressman, it’s my JOB to hold our government to account.
But when I tried to fulfill my legal right to visit ICE facilities, I was evicted after a masked ICE agent called the police.
I'm an immigrant. My children are first-generation Americans. Every day, I see innocent, hardworking people being violently detained and uprooted from their communities – all to serve Trump’s sick political agenda.
For months, ICE agents have been wreaking havoc on our communities and operating without ANY accountability. And in front of our very eyes, this lawlessness has turned deadly.
This is not how a democracy treats people, NAME.
But the MAGA loyalists in the White House and Senate have made clear they have zero respect for Democracy, the law, or the basic rights of our neighbors.
If I've learned anything in my life as an immigrant in this country, it’s that success comes from translating our anger and worry into action.
That’s why I’m leading the fight to pass legislation restricting ICE agents from wearing masks that conceal their identities, allowing them to operate with zero accountability.
It’s why I’m demanding MAXIMUM oversight for ICE – now the highest-funded law enforcement agency under Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” – to make sure they’re respecting the law and our constitution.
It’s also why I’m running for Senate. Because we need leaders with a backbone to FIGHT BACK and stop Donald Trump before it’s too late.

subject: Booked in one of the most violent jails in America…

body:
The Left is cashing in on their years-long scheme to throw an 81-year-old man in prison for the rest of his days!
---

_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Rudy Giuliani The Left is cashing in on their years-long scheme to throw an 81 year-old man in prison for the rest of his days! | | Patriot,
---
In one of the most violent jails in America, the Democrats’ Deep State goons had me unjustly **BOOKED** as # 2313757.
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
__
---
[BOOKING # 2313757](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---

My “crimes?”
---
_\- Defending my good friend and a true patriot, President Donald J. Trump
\- Refusing to turn away from what I knew (and has since been _PROVEN_) to be RIGHT and TRUE
\- And exposing the Deep State _
---
Make no mistake, the Democrats had every intention of throwing me in a prison cell as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
And just like President Trump, with patriots like you at my side, we’ve fought their sham charges tooth and nail and PROVED we would _**never surrender**_.
---
But even now – __three_ _years_ _later__ – the Left is _still_ hellbent on jailing me for life.
---
**A vengeful Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
Make no mistake, these vindictive radicals are cashing in on what they see as their **_LAST_ _SHOT_** to **JAIL** an 81 year-old man for the rest of his years!
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, so believe me when I say that I’m reaching out today because _YOU_ are my last hope – my Hail Mary play to defeat these bogus charges.
---
**The Democrats have already STRIPPED me of my law licenses, pushed me to the point of BANKRUPTCY, and will not stop until they see me finished!**
---
They know full well that the kind of legal defense it will take to beat these phony charges has to be the best of the best...
---
_...And they also know that it won’t come cheap._
---
_**Why else do you think they worked so hard to force me to bankruptcy?**_
---
There’s just no way around it... My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to defeat these charges and WIN this trial is patriots like _YOU_.
---
**That’s why I’ve officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Democrats' vindictive attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**
---
_And now, I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to maximize our ability to FIGHT BACK._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Defense Trust to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?)

Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Defense Trust

### **Help us beat and replace the mainstream media! Support PolitiBrawl by becoming a paid subscriber today:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._q1chrXMFnJa8szY5BLLLQ0tynxEikfFgpU9lRmRVJA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=190287414)
* * *
While it is understandable people are concerned with the outcome of the recent U.S. strikes in Iran, it is incorrect to say President Donald Trump is not staying true to being "America First," as he campaigned on.
The most recent example is the "Shield of the Americas" summit in Doral, Florida on Saturday. This summit saw the majority of Latin American leaders getting together to agree to take on the drug cartels who have long plagued our hemisphere. It should be noted the presidents of Mexico, Colombia, and Brazil were not in attendance, but results in each of those countries on this issue have been made during Trump's second term.
"On this historic day, we come together to announce a brand new military coalition to eradicate the criminal cartels plaguing our region...We're calling this military partnership the Americas Counter Cartel Coalition," Trump stated.
_**A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Nutrition and Healing](https://substack.com/redirect/28a32e7e-ac1e-4c95-98a3-136dd835d600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/43edd46d-0dd5-4fb4-acdf-7c1b68c2efa7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

Dear Reader,
NASA is going back to the moon... And they're trying to wriggle out of a deal with SpaceX to help them get there.
Elon Musk is hitting back HARD... and he has the ultimate trump card. He's been granted full access to NASA's files... Which means he knows everything... including **[NASA's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/28a32e7e-ac1e-4c95-98a3-136dd835d600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
Of all the conspiracies surrounding the Apollo moon landing missions... **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/28a32e7e-ac1e-4c95-98a3-136dd835d600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** may be the most shocking.
They've kept it a secret for decades... But you can finally get the full truth by **[clicking here now](https://substack.com/redirect/28a32e7e-ac1e-4c95-98a3-136dd835d600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.

P.S. They want to keep **[this secret](https://substack.com/redirect/28a32e7e-ac1e-4c95-98a3-136dd835d600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** buried... so there's no telling what they'll do to stop **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/28a32e7e-ac1e-4c95-98a3-136dd835d600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Watch it now while it's still available.
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
Indeed, the tides have turned in Latin America as more and more countries have voted out far-leftists and elected conservative leaders who see the benefit of working with the United States. Recently, Laura Fernandez, Costa Rica's president-elect, said she wants to work with the Trump administration on confronting organized crime to avoid becoming like Mexico:
"Mexico, for me, is a reference point for where we don't want to end up," she said, also pointing to Colombia, Ecuador, and the El Salvador of yesteryear.
## WATCH:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d124bba6-e0c0-4ef9-afbc-dc0dde36e0b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
While military strikes on drug boats have not been occurring as much as they used to, that does not mean the U.S. is not breaking new ground.
U.S. Southern Command, which oversees Latin America, revealed they carried out a joint operation with Ecuador in conducting lethal kinetic operations against "Designated Terrorist Organizations within Ecuador."
"We are advancing alongside our partners in the fight against narcoterrorism. I congratulate our joint forces and the Ecuadorian armed forces for the successful operation against narcoterrorists in Ecuador. This collaborative and decisive action is a strategic success for all nations in the Western Hemisphere committed to disrupting and defeating narcoterrorism," said SOUTHCOM Commander Gen. Francis Donovan.
While there is still a long way to go in combating this problem, the advances being made against these drug cartels and gangs is significant compared to when Joe Biden was president, as his border crisis injected billions of more dollars into their coffers. Now? They're being taken out.
As someone who appreciates the beauty and people in Latin America, it is my hope these efforts bring peace and prosperity to the region. If our neighbors are doing well, then so will the United States.

clean_body: Here's why it's wrong to say President Trump is not staying true to his "America First" campaign promise... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Here's why it's wrong to say President Trump is not staying true to his "America First" campaign promise... | | | Mar 8| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Help us beat and replace the mainstream media! Support PolitiBrawl by becoming a paid subscriber today: While it is understandable people are concerned with the outcome of the recent U.S. strikes in Iran, it is incorrect to say President Donald Trump is not staying true to being "America First," as he campaigned on. The most recent example is the "Shield of the Americas" summit in Doral, Florida on Saturday. This summit saw the majority of Latin American leaders getting together to agree to take on the drug cartels who have long plagued our hemisphere. It should be noted the presidents of Mexico, Colombia, and Brazil were not in attendance, but results in each of those countries on this issue have been made during Trump's second term. "On this historic day, we come together to announce a brand new military coalition to eradicate the criminal cartels plaguing our region...We're calling this military partnership the Americas Counter Cartel Coalition," Trump stated. A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below) | | ---|---|--- Dear Reader, NASA is going back to the moon... And they're trying to wriggle out of a deal with SpaceX to help them get there. Elon Musk is hitting back HARD... and he has the ultimate trump card. He's been granted full access to NASA's files... Which means he knows everything... including . Of all the conspiracies surrounding the Apollo moon landing missions... may be the most shocking. They've kept it a secret for decades... But you can finally get the full truth by . P.S. They want to keep buried... so there's no telling what they'll do to stop . Watch it now while it's still available. (Piece continues) Indeed, the tides have turned in Latin America as more and more countries have voted out far-leftists and elected conservative leaders who see the benefit of working with the United States. Recently, Laura Fernandez, Costa Rica's president-elect, said she wants to work with the Trump administration on confronting organized crime to avoid becoming like Mexico: "Mexico, for me, is a reference point for where we don't want to end up," she said, also pointing to Colombia, Ecuador, and the El Salvador of yesteryear. WATCH: While military strikes on drug boats have not been occurring as much as they used to, that does not mean the U.S. is not breaking new ground. U.S. Southern Command, which oversees Latin America, revealed they carried out a joint operation with Ecuador in conducting lethal kinetic operations against "Designated Terrorist Organizations within Ecuador." "We are advancing alongside our partners in the fight against narcoterrorism. I congratulate our joint forces and the Ecuadorian armed forces for the successful operation against narcoterrorists in Ecuador. This collaborative and decisive action is a strategic success for all nations in the Western Hemisphere committed to disrupting and defeating narcoterrorism," said SOUTHCOM Commander Gen. Francis Donovan. While there is still a long way to go in combating this problem, the advances being made against these drug cartels and gangs is significant compared to when Joe Biden was president, as his border crisis injected billions of more dollars into their coffers. Now? They're being taken out. As someone who appreciates the beauty and people in Latin America, it is my hope these efforts bring peace and prosperity to the region. If our neighbors are doing well, then so will the United States. | A guest post by| reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media covering immigration, protests, and national flashpoints across the U.S. Subscribe for full podcast episodes, unfiltered interviews, and on-the-ground reporting you won't see on MSM. name: Wesley Bell
subject: My mom inspires me every day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

When I think about the women who shaped my life, **I think about my mom.** Growing up, I watched her build a strong career in public service, helping people while also holding our family together, facing every challenge along the way with strength and more grace than I probably deserved (raising me was not always the easiest assignment). Her example inspired me to run for office and dedicate my life to serving others. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126913904/606356712/-454253735?ms=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=PUUBlkrGlwjTlYcsBHTM0EeaxsdaZA5XlKlNAgi4N7nHKO6/0slgS2n7y7d2Su8tEu+d8C6tWbyorniwtqN1jRiYRv57AfEBD2DFYaXyNepzC8lZ7M3SrfloZoNnP6nfcNFHEqtB0rgcLdz5Qu/i2QA7BENbWWigeRqUWMjmf5M=&refcode2=c479bbad-031b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ3OWJiYWQtMDMxYi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AtqUj067J8p0_FpkQ5WKEIr2xC1mEjhKoJHW7CGGfdU=&emci=fd7c51e3-8919-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=c479bbad-031b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=1020964) That’s part of why it makes me so angry to see what’s happening right now. Republicans will tell you they’re not attacking women’s rights. _But while they play dumb, the reality looks very different._

We see it in the endless crusade to strip away women’s bodily autonomy through abortion bans and attacks on funding for critical health care programs. We see it in the _SAVE Act,_ which could make voting harder for millions of married women. And there are even groups openly advocating for “single household voting,” where essentially only the man in a married household would get a vote.

This is a bold-faced attempt to drag this country backward. I’ve always believed our society is stronger when everyone has a voice. Women have had to fight for every single right they have in this country, from the ballot box to the workplace to control over their own bodies. **Those rights were not handed over easily, and they should never be taken for granted.**

[**So today, I’m asking you to stand with me. Add your name and recommit to the fight to protect women’s rights and ensure that every voice continues to be heard.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126913906/606356715/-454253735?ms=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=PUUBlkrGlwjTlYcsBHTM0EeaxsdaZA5XlKlNAgi4N7nHKO6/0slgS2n7y7d2Su8tEu+d8C6tWbyorniwtqN1jRiYRv57AfEBD2DFYaXyNepzC8lZ7M3SrfloZoNnP6nfcNFHEqtB0rgcLdz5Qu/i2QA7BENbWWigeRqUWMjmf5M=&refcode2=c479bbad-031b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ3OWJiYWQtMDMxYi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AtqUj067J8p0_FpkQ5WKEIr2xC1mEjhKoJHW7CGGfdU=&emci=fd7c51e3-8919-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=c479bbad-031b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=1020964) | [Add your name >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126913908/606356717/-454253735?ms=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260308_intwms_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=PUUBlkrGlwjTlYcsBHTM0EeaxsdaZA5XlKlNAgi4N7nHKO6/0slgS2n7y7d2Su8tEu+d8C6tWbyorniwtqN1jRiYRv57AfEBD2DFYaXyNepzC8lZ7M3SrfloZoNnP6nfcNFHEqtB0rgcLdz5Qu/i2QA7BENbWWigeRqUWMjmf5M=&refcode2=c479bbad-031b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ3OWJiYWQtMDMxYi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AtqUj067J8p0_FpkQ5WKEIr2xC1mEjhKoJHW7CGGfdU=&emci=fd7c51e3-8919-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=c479bbad-031b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=1020964)

Wesley

name: Katie Britt
subject: I’ve had to fight twice as hard to earn a seat at the table.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
I won’t apologize and I won’t be backing down.
|
---
| | | | [](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend,
They said I’d never make it. That I should stay quiet, sit still, and stop trying.

But I’ve never been interested in playing by anybody’s rules but my own.

I’m Katie Britt. A Christian, a conservative, a mom of two, and the youngest Republican woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. I didn’t run for office to win popularity points. I ran to fight for families like yours, Friend.
From day one, they saw me as just some small-town Alabama girl. Easy to ignore and _even easier to push aside_.

But what they didn’t count on is the kind of __backbone__ , __grit__ , and __fire__ women like me are made of.

The truth is, I’ve had to fight**twice as hard** to earn a seat at the table. And the moment I got there, the Left wasted no time trying to tear me down.

They didn’t expect a woman like me to show up and challenge _everything_ they stand for. They thought I’d sit down, smile, and play nice. **But that’s not who I am,_and it _never_ will be._**

I’ve had to prove myself in __every__ room I walk into. I’ve had to work longer hours, ask harder questions, and out-hustle the establishment just to be taken seriously. And still, every day, they try to undermine me, discredit me, and push me aside.

Why? Because I don’t play their games. I don’t fall in line. And I won’t apologize for my values, my faith, or my love for this country.

The Left is trying to undermine the values we hold dear, **and they’d love _nothing more_ than to see me back down.**

But here’s the thing: __I’m not going anywhere_._
I won’t apologize, I won’t play nice, and I won’t be backing down.

They are terrified of strong, unapologetic conservative women, and they _should_ be.

[**If you believe in fighting harder than anyone else just to be heard. If you believe in standing strong when the odds are against you, then I need you with me.**](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
This fight isn’t easy. It’s never been easy. But with your support, we’ll keep pushing forward, together. And we’ll prove that no one can ignore a woman with a backbone like mine.
---
[JOIN THE FIGHT >>>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
Because if we don’t stand up today, the next generation will be forced to fight the same battles I have — fighting just to have their voices heard.
_**[And I refuse to let that be their legacy, Friend.](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)**_
\- Katie Britt
|
---
| | ****

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
|
---
[STAND WITH KATIE >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
| |

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: The special election to replace MTG could help flip the House. Will you chip in to support Shawn Harris today?

Friend, it's Pete Buttigieg. I want to draw your attention to a race coming up this week in Northwest Georgia that has the potential to bring a new kind of leadership for the district and help flip the U.S. House of Representatives. Shawn Harris is running for Congress in a special election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene. Shawn is a retired Army Brigadier General, a Marine veteran, and a cattle farmer who returned home after decades of service, running because he believes representation is about taking responsibility rather, not about getting attention. [**If you are able, I hope you will consider chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can right now to help Shawn Harris win this special election. Your support will help fund the organizing and voter outreach efforts that make all the difference in close races like this one.**](http://clicksp.shawnforgeorgia.com/f/a/yQiUX7tZ8VAQi2X2pPmWDw~~/AAPPABA~/MsAmSquBQt9BOPeTwsxm57EG2sjAGSlYIiLodtJl9tY_TuRTx2OgGAjN37_5FBkfAVlbTdENb0I9wNOrtoKZY8zd1qw9R67OWU7GB9k0LlQpAbYqnc2pUmYaqtKmupMAwmTH73vU6Woymcl2qSpWRI_kqcV2-xoL1QGUBWR_zeSkFE7jvjcjLuzoyIsP1RCRciS1Dx8Sk--_5yiGBeBBT8zvGl0D-kUQrxynII85Lz2aT8jt-UOwYviqisEIUT2jR2I48B2cVR3GXRIZ2KRKePF8Gp6PczMJkAZ-pswcH8XpZu5Rg7nw642PjmJU_uUT)

For years, this district has been defined by national drama instead of local results. Shawn is offering something steadier: leadership rooted in service, respect, and the conviction that government should work for people who are working hard and still feeling the squeeze from rising costs. That contrast was on full display late last month when Donald Trump visited the district to attempt to defend his record on affordability. The truth is families in Northwest Georgia are living a different reality: Prices remain high, household budgets are under pressure, and voters are increasingly frustrated when political rhetoric does not line up with everyday life. Shawn is running to meet people where they are and to focus on work that will lead to lower everyday costs and better results from government. He has already shown that he can compete in this district by building a coalition of Democrats, Independents, veterans, rural voters, and common-sense Republicans who are ready for serious leadership in Congress. This race matters beyond Northwest Georgia. Because it is a special election, the margins are tight and the stakes are high. A Democratic victory would narrow the gap in the House and move us closer to a majority that can protect democracy and focus on affordability rather than outrage. That outcome depends on acting now. Special elections move quickly, and organizing makes a decisive difference. That is why I am reaching out personally. [**If you are able, I hope you will consider chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can to support Shawn Harris today. Your contribution will help fund voter outreach, organizing, and the groundwork required to win this race.**](http://clicksp.shawnforgeorgia.com/f/a/yQiUX7tZ8VAQi2X2pPmWDw~~/AAPPABA~/MsAmSquBQt9BOPeTwsxm57EG2sjAGSlYIiLodtJl9tY_TuRTx2OgGAjN37_5FBkfAVlbTdENb0I9wNOrtoKZY8zd1qw9R67OWU7GB9k0LlQpAbYqnc2pUmYaqtKmupMAwmTH73vU6Woymcl2qSpWRI_kqcV2-xoL1QGUBWR_zeSkFE7jvjcjLuzoyIsP1RCRciS1Dx8Sk--_5yiGBeBBT8zvGl0D-kUQrxynII85Lz2aT8jt-UOwYviqisEIUT2jR2I48B2cVR3GXRIZ2KRKePF8Gp6PczMJkAZ-pswcH8XpZu5Rg7nw642PjmJU_uUT)

body:
This is a critical memo from Team Trump, you must read immediately.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
**_[For over 47 years, the radical regime in Iran has waged war against the United States of America.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
They funded terrorists who murdered Americans.
They shouted death to America.
They tried to interfere in the 2020, 2024 elections to stop President Trump from winning.
**STATEMENT FROM PRESIDENT** **DONALD J. TRUMP:**
“Iran rejected every opportunity to renounce their nuclear ambitions and we can’t take it anymore.
For these reasons the United States military is undertaking a massive and ongoing operation, to prevent this very wicked radical dictatorship from threatening America and our core national security interests.
We’re doing this for the future and it is a noble mission.
We pray for every servicemember as they selflessly risk their lives to ensure that Americans and our children will never be threatened by nuclear armed Iran.
To the members of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard, the armed forces, and all of the police, I say that you must lay down all your weapons and have complete immunity or you will face certain death.”
**STRENGTH** **LEADERSHIP** **AMERICA FIRST**
This is the beginning of the end of Iran’s decades-long war against the United States.
**_[It’s Team Trump, and we’re asking every SINGLE Trump supporter who stands with President Trump and our brave U. S. troops in carrying out this mission to let us know by signing the Official Trump Supporter List NOW>>> ](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
_Now is not the time to sit out._
Democrats want to see us divided.
They want to see us grow weak and fail.
The sooner you take action, the better.
**BUT PLEASE, DO NOT stay silent at this moment!**

[STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126914582/606358490/-130172702?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_030826_B1_OSSOFFSPLIT_BROKENPROMISES&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA2MzZmZC0wNTFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vm5EmVZokPDN0vg7oLe9g356CD9Vx4RGB5zaIh6ssHE=) See, I get why some folks voted for Trump. He promised to attack a broken system. And it’s a ripe target. Even before Trump came on the scene, America had one of the most corrupt political systems in the Western world. It’s been running on corporate money, secret money, billionaire money. And it’s worse than ever now. _Citizens United_ was the worst court decision in modern American history. When Members of Congress aren’t begging for money from Washington lobbyists, they’re trying to dodge getting carpet-bombed by super PACs. Senators get threatened with millions of dollars of attack ads over the votes they take. And see, that is why things don’t work for ordinary people. It’s because the people’s elected representatives don’t represent the people. They represent the big donors! That corruption is why they defunded nursing homes to cut taxes for the rich. Corruption is why you pay a fortune for prescriptions. Corruption is why your insurance claim keeps getting denied. Corruption is why hedge funds get to buy up all the houses in your neighborhood, and then your corporate landlord ignores your calls during a gas leak. Corruption is why that ambulance costs $3,000 after you just had to get your choking toddler to the hospital. Yes, the system really is rigged. But Trump’s not unrigging it. He’s re-rigging it for himself! He’s a crook and a con man, and he wants to be a king. You can’t claim to be for ordinary men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes. You can’t claim to be for ordinary men and women when you defund school lunch programs to help feed little boys and little girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge. You can’t claim to be for ordinary men and women when you do these things so you can cut taxes for the richest people in the country while you and your family business rake in massive sums from around the world. Donald Trump’s second term has already done unfathomable damage to our country and the lives of millions of people. And the people are beginning to see it. But only by regaining Congressional power can we stop him. Really. The upcoming 2026 midterms are our last chance to restore checks and balances. And my Senate race in Georgia is the single most critical contest: I’m the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in 2026 in a state Trump carried in 2024. So if you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight for the future of this Republic –– please don’t wait until 2028: Split a donation of $10 between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my reelection campaign in Georgia right now. Here’s the link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dpg-em-fr-mar26-ossoff](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126914583/606358491/-130172702?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_030826_B1_OSSOFFSPLIT_BROKENPROMISES&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzA2MzZmZC0wNTFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vm5EmVZokPDN0vg7oLe9g356CD9Vx4RGB5zaIh6ssHE=) The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Please give what you can. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign before the end of the year. Please, contribute today. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = = See, I get why some folks voted for Trump. He promised to attack a broken system. And it’s a ripe target. Even before Trump came on the scene, America had one of the most corrupt political systems in the Western world. It’s been running on corporate money, secret money, billionaire money. And it’s worse than ever now. Citizens United was the worst court decision in modern American history. When Members of Congress aren’t begging for money from Washington lobbyists, they’re trying to dodge getting carpet-bombed by super PACs. Senators get threatened with millions of dollars of attack ads over the votes they take. And see, that is why things don’t work for ordinary people. It’s because the people’s elected representatives don’t represent the people. They represent the big donors! That corruption is why they defunded nursing homes to cut taxes for the rich. Corruption is why you pay a fortune for prescriptions. Corruption is why your insurance claim keeps getting denied. Corruption is why hedge funds get to buy up all the houses in your neighborhood, and then your corporate landlord ignores your calls during a gas leak. Corruption is why that ambulance costs $3,000 after you just had to get your choking toddler to the hospital. Yes, the system really is rigged. But Trump’s not unrigging it. He’s re-rigging it for himself! He’s a crook and a con man, and he wants to be a king. You can’t claim to be for ordinary men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes. You can’t claim to be for ordinary men and women when you defund school lunch programs to help feed little boys and little girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge. You can’t claim to be for ordinary men and women when you do these things so you can cut taxes for the richest people in the country while you and your family business rake in massive sums from around the world. Donald Trump’s second term has already done unfathomable damage to our country and the lives of millions of people. And the people are beginning to see it. But only by regaining Congressional power can we stop him. Really. The upcoming 2026 midterms are our last chance to restore checks and balances. And my Senate race in Georgia is the single most critical contest: I’m the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in 2026 in a state Trump carried in 2024. So if you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight for the future of this Republic –– please don’t wait until 2028: Split a donation of $10 between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my reelection campaign in Georgia right now. Here’s the link to donate: = The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Please give what you can. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign before the end of the year. Please, contribute today. Jon Ossoff | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. body:
Time for real solutions, not politics.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126914655/606358896/1979347804?refcode=email_030826_davids-shah-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTViZjU3OC0wNjFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6WT5zSzGiqffMj822VLquDgIbm447lwh9qkMihmssH0=) I’ve spent my career as a doctor, caring for patients, listening to their struggles, and helping families get the support they need to live healthier, fuller lives. That experience taught me something crucial: Congress needs the same approach — a careful diagnosis, a clear plan, and a _commitment_ to follow through. **I’m running for Congress to bring a doctor’s perspective to policymaking — practical, common-sense solutions that actually work for people.[_If you’re with me to join my fight, can I count on you to split a donation between me and Sharice Davids to help me flip NJ-07 blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126914656/606358897/1979347804?refcode=email_030826_davids-shah-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTViZjU3OC0wNjFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6WT5zSzGiqffMj822VLquDgIbm447lwh9qkMihmssH0=)** Whether it’s ensuring healthcare is affordable and accessible, or creating policies that make life easier for families, it's time we have leaders who know how to diagnose problems, prescribe solutions, and see them through to results. Under the current Republican majority, families are being ignored. And right here in NJ-07, _Tom Kean Jr. isn’t showing up for the people he represents_. Congress is failing the very people it was elected to serve — and it’s clear a new approach is needed. **It’s time to write a new prescription for Congress — one that actually works for the people.** [_**But I can’t deliver that change alone. Your support today will help me show up for our communities, fight for the solutions we deserve, and hold Congress accountable. clean_body: Time for real solutions, not politics. = I’ve spent my career as a doctor, caring for patients, listening to their struggles, and helping families get the support they need to live healthier, fuller lives. That experience taught me something crucial: Congress needs the same approach — a careful diagnosis, a clear plan, and a commitment to follow through. I’m running for Congress to bring a doctor’s perspective to policymaking — practical, common-sense solutions that actually work for people.= Whether it’s ensuring healthcare is affordable and accessible, or creating policies that make life easier for families, it's time we have leaders who know how to diagnose problems, prescribe solutions, and see them through to results. Under the current Republican majority, families are being ignored. And right here in NJ-07, Tom Kean Jr. isn’t showing up for the people he represents. Congress is failing the very people it was elected to serve — and it’s clear a new approach is needed. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: Four hundred and sixty-eight billion dollars. That’s how much America leaves on the table every year due to one thing: lost focus. That’s why more than 1.5 million professionals are turning to Immersed. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Four hundred and sixty-eight billion dollars. name: Mai Vang
subject: Who speaks for working families?
body:
Politics-as-usual won’t protect working families.

| | | | | | [|
---](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=bfffc2348c&e=dd5af5b7b1)
| | | | | | Friends,

---
| | We need people in Washington who actually understand what working families are going through.
I’m a teacher and a working mom. My husband works long shifts in the auto industry. I’m still paying off college debt and like most families, we’re doing our best to save up for a rainy day.
So when we talk about the cost of living, rising healthcare costs, or the pressure families feel just trying to stay afloat -- that’s not abstract to me. It’s real life.
That’s why I’m in this race.
But this campaign is also about something bigger: _**who our leaders answer to.**_
**My opponent, Doris Matsui, has spent more than two decades in Washington funded by corporate PACs -- including defense contractors, Big Pharma, and AIPAC.**
I’m a different kind of candidate running a different kind of campaign.
I don’t take corporate PAC money. This campaign is powered by people -- teachers, nurses, autoworkers, students, and families who want someone in Congress who actually understands their lives.
That also means this race won’t be easy -- taking on the establishment never is. But when working people come together, we have something stronger than corporate money: **people power.**

---
| | [**If you believe Congress should be accountable to working families -- not corporate PACs -- will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can today to help power this grassroots campaign?**](https://maiforus.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe5f60ccb8fb671f0c1857dc9&id=b2447c7457&e=dd5af5b7b1)

For many years, Iran wanted to bring DEATH to AMERICA.
__That’s why I had no other choice.__ ____
In a strong and necessary move to protect our country, I launched Operation Epic Fury, a powerful military strike to stop Iran’s nuclear threat before they could put America and our allies in danger.
This operation has been greatly successful. We even took out the corrupt Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

name: Team Cruz
subject: Team Cruz Grassroots Newsletter >> March 8, 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz._KgjpnlN3tBkZAKbsA)
---
| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Ted Cruz, Tim Scott Asking Treasury To Approve $200B Tax Cut Without Congressional Approval:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "GOP Sens. Ted Cruz (Texas) and Tim Scott (S.C.) are asking the Treasury Department to approve a $200 billion tax cut without prior authorization from Congress. The two senators have asked the Trump administration to cut capital gains taxes on investors by adjusting the basis for inflation arguing it would boost savings, spur investment and create jobs nationwide. "This inflation tax unfairly penalizes savers and locks up capital that would otherwise flow back into the economy through new investment and higher..." **[Cruz:'Democrats Line Up To Effectively Defend The Ayatollah': ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)**"Tuesday on FNC's "Jesse Watters Primetime," Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) reacted to Democrats' responses to the U.S. military strikes on Iran. According to the Texas Republican, Democrats were lining up "to effectively defend the Ayatollah." "Senator, you see these Democrats pour out of these Intel briefings, and I don't know if they're going to different briefings than you guys are," host Jesse Watters said. "Why are they saying these things?" "Well, unfortunately, facts don't matter for today's Democrats. The National Security doesn't matter for today's Democrats..." **[Ted Cruz:'No Indication' That Iran Was 'Close To Getting Nuclear Weapons':](https://trk.email.tedcruz._ZW1Vt4llg)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) on Sunday said there was "no indication" that Tehran was "close to getting nuclear weapons" after the United States struck several Iranian nuclear facilities in June, adding that he argued to President Trump that the time was right for a military strike to possibly effect regime change. "We launched targeted bombs at the end of the 12-day war, where we dropped the equivalent of about a third of a nuclear weapon on those underground facilities. Facilities like Fordow, built into the base of a mountain," Cruz told Margaret Brennan on CBS's..." **[Ted Cruz Leads Bipartisan Bill That Would Void And Prohibit Confidentiality Clauses In Child Sex Abuse Cases:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.__zRDwpR6zbQ6GiXw)** "U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, announced on Tuesday a new bill that he says will address the misuse of non-disclosure agreements in civil cases that cover up child sexual abuse and trafficking. The legislation introduced as the Terminating Restrictive Enforcement of Youth Settlements, or TREY'S Law, is a bipartisan agreement led by Cruz and Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand, D-New York, along with other Republican senators, including Katie Britt from Alabama and Eric Schmitt from Missouri.
