name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: We’re asking for your thoughts, Peter:
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260308-2011-foote&t=1001&akid=2011%2E342411%2EHT9sQB ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The Squad Victory Fund isn’t about politicians, it’s about people. People
like you who refuse to let billionaires and corporate PACs call the shots.

We’re fighting for bold, progressive change — from protecting voting
rights and expanding healthcare to tackling the climate crisis and
standing up for working families.

And we’re making sure our work reflects the priorities and needs of the
communities we fight for. But we can’t do it alone. We need your voice.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-march-2026/?source=em20260308-2011&t=1002&akid=2011%2E342411%2EHT9sQB ]Will you take a minute to complete our March Priorities Survey? Your
input helps decide the fights we take on, the issues we push, and the kind
of movement we build.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/priorities-survery-march-2026/?source=em20260308-2011&t=1003&akid=2011%2E342411%2EHT9sQB ]TAKE THE SURVEY

Grassroots supporters like you are the backbone of this movement. When we
listen, we fight smarter, bolder, and stronger — and that’s how we win
real, lasting change.

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2011%2E342411%2EHT9sQB

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Dennis, Heroes for Humanity
subject: 🚨 Americans require URGENT evacuation
body:
We have received dozens of urgent requests
This is a five-alarm emergency that requires your immediate attention.
| | | [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2f687d823a1c4cc39476667cf1542dc9&_e=3oZ622IvH55q6bDQWXZWLU-_HGXaJZ6Epy6U44v8rUdMT2GI2kjzXrPQqTWMKt3fvknKZGlSbp4emuPQg6CpCNNMr2tmANMvmUnc5ReWDq0GDK_PBC_FEeJZ2a-A59XdIYR0A8SPrrDGir9LzvbfhTPKsHAa53PZ9d0sxlI06nGMOkWmJh9VPNSyPX2c0TA82sYB6JKnDRxl4Lq4KatLbtzuHBW0021yBAKtwAd8pY4V1qfyHIhNGj2OnA-mUxElmC2esBU59EvJjIlJZ4UYGZbhXUspmgPs-xfrvKFPMMpxYjZpvXlCKc_wIsCFoBMSgI7RcBnUrKXf3WU-LG70o0EIiPj8yqFEW_H1SFXvknjYbKysviws0zP8scxKYlhP9UwHJd-7saShQgtlsmg4wg7YsUrhphJZcu1qYD9SGlItWMqSl3gOj2BJZNBlT6KJhlPF38ERtnPljT-4KRK0U2nb3na0dduPJXA58nJwspIIT0OyUQ7fyEFHqgfss9UC17wAjt03M66Y_l_AJnrHmnDKd32EKfm9-q0-bv5FfojMGpyznTIkhQ9oDz-UQNc9tXmqlbzpmGqCzeAV4yvU38kFKPZG7eIHKBOKG-xnemHmGoXvoOwAGuoXxcAUxguZAl80Ln4SqhTQpG6KIjPUvU9g2wkO8OgwE2zb-6gytyWWiX7fMW0SBOwZc5Bcw06J)
---
Friend, This is a five-alarm emergency that requires your immediate attention.
---
**With a full-scale war now underway in Iran, we have received dozens of urgent requests from countries in the region to help evacuate U.S. citizens.**
---
Airspace is rapidly being closed down and many of your fellow Americans require safe passage. **Fortunately, Heroes for Humanity was built for moments like this.** We have been preparing for weeks and are asking you right now for your urgent help to fund rapid evacuation capability, medical response, logistics, open source intelligence (OSINT), assets on the ground, and strategic planning, support, and assistance in order to provide life-saving humanitarian relief.
---
[ DONATE NOW ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2f687d823a1c4cc39476667cf1542dc9&_e=3oZ622IvH55q6bDQWXZWLU-_HGXaJZ6Epy6U44v8rUdMT2GI2kjzXrPQqTWMKt3fvknKZGlSbp4emuPQg6CpCNNMr2tmANMvmUnc5ReWDq0GDK_PBC_FEeJZ2a-A59XdIYR0A8SPrrDGir9LzvbfhTPKsHAa53PZ9d0sxlI06nGMOkWmJh9VPNSyPX2c0TA82sYB6JKnDRxl4Lq4KatLbtzuHBW0021yBAKtwAd8pY4IPU1A6TNIjN3PgGe6M3xEB0CMQ76veOCEEZmN7eDCx55ftI76A2WcHfuhcXm3Gl1Neei9UC2HdjZIxpZBbalZ9FjBZEAvkM_vJOh0eT4RXpNe6PjdjaF15SOIk4ptNGDIWteDCz0IKtffDcenr3iLEf1WgKGxv0DOHr5JiwI2Ya9NngSmtcxxzbm5gqQ3K0VS44ZLMh2KGckWXt8FGQAA2QHgzHuCDj6m82FJrixk3i0NVTJgBXPja5fmgo0I95klogm0bra3IJJL3dVxQMQuuseVCNi3EBnA4AfqwE3fmvoh5Z0pJritIMqa9L4tySozZnlxBQpyoI4bDxgd-OFHD3DtHbNSR349u82L8JgFmRr8AnmCkg3ZD4_6G8sMXAK-2Zy_KDO3VZVyPU4ztPCoQ4rNkorNmgdOo8dSvZc257l0f7T--AHckxbjG9fa6-Z721bOFgr69dAtQd8ZVD7y)
---
This is Dennis Price. I'm a Marine Special operator and private military contractor with over 15 deployments who now leads rescue operations, humanitarian and medical aid – all led by the Holy Spirit “to free the oppressed, so others may live.” **Since 2022, I've been the founder and leader of Heroes for Humanity – a network of special operators, veterans, first responders, medical professionals, and everyday people committed to being the hands and feet of Jesus.** We were born in the chaos of Afghanistan's fall in 2021 – where I personally helped evacuate 77 Americans and vetted Afghan allies, even swimming the Panjshir River behind enemy lines to pull people out. And just the other day, we rescued 8 families from the chaos and violence in Mexico. But our story goes much deeper than even that.
---
---
In 2022, we **deployed to Ukraine for nine months** during the invasion, **delivered medical aid to orphanages** , **supported 65 wounded veterans** , and **ran precision rescues and logistics.** And between 2023 and 2025, we **rescued trafficked children stateside** (including a 12-year-old trapped 45 days in California and a 16-year-old in Virginia), **aided persecuted Christians in China** , **responded to the Texas floods and hurricanes in North Carolina and Florida** , **evacuated 92 American families from Israel** during the 12-Day War, and provided aid after earthquakes and crises in Thailand, Burma, Cuba, Zambia, and more. As you can see, we've been busy all across the globe, _**but right now our only focus is getting Americans out of harm's way in the Middle East where things can go very wrong very quickly.**_ [**Our urgent goal is $1,000,000 and your immediate support enables rescue, medical aid, and protection for the vulnerable. Will you rush in an emergency, time-sensitive donation right now?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2f687d823a1c4cc39476667cf1542dc9&_e=3oZ622IvH55q6bDQWXZWLU-_HGXaJZ6Epy6U44v8rUdMT2GI2kjzXrPQqTWMKt3fvknKZGlSbp4emuPQg6CpCNNMr2tmANMvmUnc5ReWDq0GDK_PBC_FEeJZ2a-A59XdIYR0A8SPrrDGir9LzvbfhTPKsHAa53PZ9d0sxlI06nGMOkWmJh9VPNSyPX2c0TA82sYB6JKnDRxl4Lq4KatLbtzuHBW0021yBAKtwAd8pY6eMZ2DXqQjnnxzoB4KIDAF50VZkl9JentOiLd7Z6C7Mwo94xDH0yvA-oPDtxGvVT_xvoppUnATiYxq3Yih0fIQDni1s2cbZN7OnWNjlz6DpkMRuThFMP9293byqw06MnqJNMeDy9XFjv766RcVx4HHH3e9EEewOMRP9iEAPzUPR1Vg60B6W-5wBXtUoEYIXVHY150siGgJhwEEn0qtr1S-QjuQVY0IYsZb7Xx5ix_eEOsKxXB6UJvXcyVWNRJurMborCmEij3YrGufrdcpC_X-FddbrJy7Bm8-BXhQsYPaddZ1z6Rp6tRzuScX1B4sxjJqpd8yTXPeQ5irJZSJmIbX2y3aIqsT9cullPWNG1VdsDlZNNyD-OXZjFH3VrRVDyLFuyN8nTe0UuDl301kpKD926TR_pTGa87lqNny1ZmRrpaJ9zduXC-PfRjotVzGYohusBg11q_l8JfmOQS_48yD) **Lives hang in the balance and you can make the difference.**
---
[ DONATE NOW ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2f687d823a1c4cc39476667cf1542dc9&_e=3oZ622IvH55q6bDQWXZWLU-_HGXaJZ6Epy6U44v8rUdMT2GI2kjzXrPQqTWMKt3fvknKZGlSbp4emuPQg6CpCNNMr2tmANMvmUnc5ReWDq0GDK_PBC_FEeJZ2a-A59XdIYR0A8SPrrDGir9LzvbfhTPKsHAa53PZ9d0sxlI06nGMOkWmJh9VPNSyPX2c0TA82sYB6JKnDRxl4Lq4KatLbtzuHBW0021yBAKtwAd8pY7_1J68kssjlhd-YGwNTJQ37wM7naCvwaD0Y7TLKuns7lW_AacfynpzGMXkF6awcx_L01WAxxsgW6a2PDL0M2DmnNZLmzS3N0sGiSAxnQYaoeh2GfFOP49ogqXPFXpkchq9CIvSvKO0BiwqjnzDlTZY1ZK8aFTR-yqhm1jjQn9k5wdLwQGd4LQWXyhpCB2l7mkwq00T20_HfM7EyAaDRiDHhbABLDiX5E3amUNYUln2nEA-qAexgY_z80D5Y1dl6XZ4Tz_THYSMj7AsiEaIlsg_tTKMtvU_QHBjGP6i9I8ei9NceMimPUzpl60mhNzHx6aKd1vDVAHNFhGU-n99UGPtGpSfsp0yGS-2r18QgHQuTVenimIXJOWP5OC6eK3gUK_6GkLNuSyHy5FNCqMtTgvjb0hy75x5oytIBUakRaeeWVsoKzVowpEIc5qmAjmAcZwW3jk_y4XgtGtqnwri-X7x)
---
Beyond your support, we ask for prayer, wisdom, protection for the innocent, and strength for those making difficult decisions.

**Our mission remains clear:_protect the vulnerable, serve with integrity, and act with faith._** Thank you for your time, and further updates will be provided as the security environment allows. Respectfully submitted,

Dennis Price
CEO & Founder
Heroes for Humanity

_“In order for evil to prevail, good men must stand by and do nothing.”_
---
---
[ SAVE AMERICANS ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2f687d823a1c4cc39476667cf1542dc9&_e=3oZ622IvH55q6bDQWXZWLU-_HGXaJZ6Epy6U44v8rUdMT2GI2kjzXrPQqTWMKt3fvknKZGlSbp4emuPQg6CpCNNMr2tmANMvmUnc5ReWDq0GDK_PBC_FEeJZ2a--Tg6yRBWfYjafOFW1YB8khfh9DIQYKgzu5xeR0iQZcsWoY33sFTJ8olR6JOxxLNJd13X3kyK1nMbI_vTtEbY64FIqCLGdj3LMhGQ1FJYKxqf0Nf1Sj2QRZZb7mOtsjly12lAwa9rcKWa-_UYGsyqLyYzzRbcnQNAwj7Y_VN_d2nkkq62PdiOaOlPQnnEHBJOGtIKaY6_SEnrs-n5htK-wE_oJx_)

name: Mike Nellis - Endless Urgency

#### _**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/ddbde92d-1534-4b9c-8e43-8e197397efbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/ddbde92d-1534-4b9c-8e43-8e197397efbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
Yesterday morning I sat down with Adam Mockler for our weekly check-in, and this one felt especially urgent give the escalating conflict with Iran, the economic ripple effects hitting Americans at home, and why the Trump administration's response feels dangerously unserious.
Timestamps:
* **[00:01:05]** Adam and I start with the human toll of the war -- from Iranian schoolchildren killed in bombings to U.S. service members losing their lives in a conflict we argue never had to happen.
* **[00:07:03]** The White House's meme strategy explodes online after Ben Stiller publicly calls them out for using _Tropic Thunder_ clips as propaganda -- a moment that shows how unserious the messaging has become.
* **[00:16:01]** We talk about the terrifying possibility that negligence inside the administration could make Americans less safe -- and why some fear leaders might even exploit a crisis politically.
* **[00:21:36]** Gas prices spike, markets react, and the economic domino effect begins -- we break down how this war is already hitting families living paycheck to paycheck.
* **[00:31:01]** We zoom out to the bigger picture: how America's global leadership, soft power, and alliances are shifting -- and what it means for the future of U.S. influence.

**[Become a paid subscriber to Endless Urgency today»](https://substack.com/redirect/ddbde92d-1534-4b9c-8e43-8e197397efbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Why I’m endorsing Katie Porter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40950%2E3422442%2EmUbAzn)
Peter, it's Elizabeth Warren.
**I’m thrilled to share that I’m officially endorsing Katie Porter’s campaign for governor in California.**
I’ll tell you more below about why I’m backing Katie, but first you should know that winning a statewide election in California requires a lot of resources in order to hire staff, run ads, and share Katie’s progressive message. Katie has never taken a cent of corporate money, and unlike some of her opponents she can’t self-fund her own campaign.
**[That’s why she’s counting on grassroots supporters to power her campaign and win in California. So, can you please make a donation of $5 or anything you can to support Katie’s campaign?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260308_1_ak.b9D5jb&refcode=em20260308-40950&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40950%2E3422442%2EmUbAzn)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260308_1_ak.b9D5jb&refcode=em20260308-40950&t=4&akid=40950%2E3422442%2EmUbAzn)
I still remember the day when I met Katie. My consumer law class was early in the morning, meaning a lot of students had their heads down, trying to avoid being called on.
But not Katie. She was determined and ready to go. When the first answer she gave wasn’t her strongest, she came to my office hours and said, “Please keep calling on me. I am going to learn to do this.”
Getting to know her, I saw her bone-deep commitment to making a difference in people’s lives.
When Katie decided to run for Congress in 2018, I was very happy to support her. I knew that we needed more people like her in Washington—who understood the real struggles that working families faced, who had the courage to stand up to big corporations and special interests, and who would fight to make our government work for everyone.
With Donald Trump back in office, working families need Katie’s leadership more than ever. It’s not just enough to elect any Democrat to be California’s next governor. California families deserve a changemaker, a fighter, and a whip-smart leader like Katie who will defend their values and deliver results.
**[So please, if you can, make a donation of $5 or anything you can to support Katie’s campaign. We’re going to keep fighting to make our government work for working people—and we need you in this fight.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260308_1_ak.b9D5jb&refcode=em20260308-40950&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=40950%2E3422442%2EmUbAzn)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260308_1_ak.b9D5jb&refcode=em20260308-40950&t=24&akid=40950%2E3422442%2EmUbAzn)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260308-40950&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=40950_3422442_mUbAzn&akid=40950%2E3422442%2EmUbAzn)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40950&t=26&akid=40950%2E3422442%2EmUbAzn)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40950)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40950&t=27&akid=40950%2E3422442%2EmUbAzn)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By David Shuster**
There are many ways to start a war, but invoking the apocalypse is unique, even by the generous standards of American political theater. Yet that is reportedly the rhetoric now wafting through parts of the United States military amidst Trump's war on Iran.
In a story first reported on Substack by investigative journalist Jonathan Larsen, more than 200 service members have filed complaints to the Military Religious Freedom Foundation (MRFF), alleging that unit commanders explained the Iran war not merely as a strategic necessity or a matter of national defense, but as a "holy war."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One officer was even more celestial and reportedly invoked the Book of Revelation. [The officer stated the conflict might usher in Armageddon](https://substack.com/redirect/3f094f5d-1f70-4e7f-bdef-65488d71bbb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), that cheerful little biblical skirmish which, in some evangelical circles, is believed to pave the way for the Second Coming of Jesus Christ.
In plainer English, the troops were allegedly told that the strikes on Iran are a "holy war" and might end the world.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**PLEASE HELP US BEAT THE FASCISTS, FOR JUST $3.30/MONTH**
[ STOP TRUMP FOR ~$3/MONTH](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
On the one hand, you have to admire the efficiency of the idea. Why bother with complicated briefings about geopolitics, oil shipping lanes, deterrence theory, or nuclear proliferation when you can simply inform the troops that the Almighty is running the operation? Strategy is unnecessary when Providence has already issued the orders.
This sort of talk would be comical if it were not coming from people with the authority to command bombers, warships, and battalions of heavily armed young Americans.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The United States military--[like every federal institution](https://substack.com/redirect/6262ff51-b262-4065-8c6e-e847fb5e8bc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), last time I checked--was established to defend the Constitution. Not to stage-manage the prophecies of the Apostle John.
But the line between those missions seems to be blurring. Journalist Larsen reports there have been complaints to the MRFF from 50 different military installations. Fifty.
To be fair, America has long had a weakness for Christian nationalism.
Still, there is a difference between politicians delivering revival-meeting oratory on the campaign trail and military commanders, perhaps inspired by DOD Secretary Pete Hegseth, delivering it to troops firing missiles, dropping bombs, and following orders.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Soldiers, sailors, and airmen do not sit in pews when they receive their instructions. They stand at attention.
When a commander tells subordinates that a war may be part of God's plan, he or she is not merely offering a private meditation on theology. That commander is speaking from a position of authority in which disagreement carries professional risk. The devout Christian may nod along happily. The Jew, the Muslim, the atheist, or the merely skeptical may feel rather less enthusiastic about joining a campaign framed as a step toward the Rapture.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The United States military contains all of these people. It is one of the most religiously diverse institutions in the country. The cohesion of our armed forces depends on a simple compact: every service member serves the Constitution first, and whatever gods they acknowledge--or decline to acknowledge--are strictly their own affair.
Break that compact and you invite trouble.
Unfortunately, the same theological exuberance appears to be spreading beyond U.S. military bases. Recently, Republican House Speaker Mike Johnson, denounced Iran as a nation guided by what he called a "misguided religion."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**MIKE JOHNSON TRIED TO HELP TRUMP STEAL THE 2020 ELECTION. HE IS OPENLY TRYING AGAIN. SUBSCRIBE, HELP US STOP HIS ELECTION THEFT.**_
[ HELP US STOP MIKE JOHNSON & DONALD TRUMP](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
One could almost hear the ghosts of medieval crusaders cheering from the House gallery.
Such language may play well in certain corners of America. But it carries a whiff of something older and more dangerous than mere partisanship. Once a conflict is framed as a dispute between religions rather than nations, compromise becomes suspect and diplomacy begins to look like apostasy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
History offers endless evidence of how such stories end. They generally involve large numbers of troops and civilians killed and very little enlightenment.
The founders of the United States understood this well. Many of them were skeptical men who had observed the bloody wreckage of Europe's sectarian wars. Their solution was not complicated: keep the government secular and let the churches handle the business of faith and salvation.
That arrangement has worked reasonably well for nearly two and a half centuries. The United States has fought many wars but has generally refrained from presenting them as rehearsals for the end of days.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Such religious restraint needs to continue.
War, after all, is already a sufficiently grim enterprise without the addition of eschatology. Young Americans flying over Iran or sent to patrol the increasingly dangerous Strait of Hormuz deserve to know they are risking their lives for a purpose grounded in national security, not for the dubious honor of advancing someone else's interpretation of Revelation.
There is nothing wrong with a soldier praying before battle. Many have done so, and many always will.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But the prayer should come from the soldier, not from the operations order.
Armageddon may hold a certain appeal for those who enjoy imagining the universe wrapped up in a blaze of divine fireworks. But it is a poor substitute for military strategy--and an even worse justification for sending Americans into war.
* * *
_**A last reminder:[We must continue to grow to provide you with all of this content. Please become a paid subscriber](https://substack.com/redirect/81486d01-037b-4651-840d-a1407b4f0132?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [For 50% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/fd4cb2cb-f749-4e87-8ab7-5d7b11653238?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Thanks for reading, commenting, & supporting BAM!**_

body:

The rumors are swirling.

Supreme Court Justice Samuel Alito might be stepping down, and if he does,
Trump will get another chance to reshape the already captured Court.

Trump has already installed three justices in his first term.

A fourth? It would lock in a conservative supermajority that could
dominate the Court for decades — cementing a judiciary that routinely
serves political operatives, billionaire interests, and cronies instead of
the law.

Republicans won’t waste a second “vetting” a fair nominee. They’ll move at
lightning speed to push another loyalist onto the bench. If we wait until
this rumor becomes a reality, it’ll be too late.

Demand Justice PAC is on high alert, mobilizing rapidly to fight back. But
we can’t win this fight alone.

Peter,

President Trump wants to abolish **[Daylight Savings Time (DST).](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Ap4nzTfWcDoxBpe-7uz5vS2Lk7AC9KQpg6c7XPlACNj9aacAP8KO8ha1l9_38RC7RQEwAixNpCFeCLandPcsTE2yD_L6mD-dPreRa-0t9M2wmuJbtzdvQd472yH29r0GiJWkaMMwaSfhOwUV8SOZaQBfvayNgIuubLCjPz2nFQ7iLhaCXJvlmoEGRHxAZb6BLgtw-rQlhCwpZvfLc4RmFNbveSUt39LhpFymGp2umPp07O5C1EpmwGai-hjfZtvQqO4wn0ARtvOvQirRH_nzGyZpoNzU22D2m0-LGmmE0loUNHo00sAjIf7tG7Gkp41ASYRwyX2J9FvxCkcJsgc7ulSBohRfV-vmliriSN-keW1y_kjINsl9gXLKBRSlF_qfX-F_9O-7ilZuDc5LHuVXv76Ter-a-0XcA9lDy-Zgu945piNnk4sUvxsnDdHmnh6g2AnaTJ3duZXJZrNweqvUKkeW8t8JpO6Qhye_Y2ve3Cp7zAJzLgCEGz5SMwqhMhIFaX0H8Bhk47fsclzAhu79dlWkgcvvmTRDgLHMNM-5ogh-9dTAa-OSj3GuKP-ZVqRSjRwyD_GTifmcfmg41ZjGw6C67REKeJoLKg21YH_SIBSy2TYFNzE8xlUA6At716bt4QdHTjTOWeGZEbM_XvP_lLY6T5SsHWVcAcXRpv2DSkl4URLKxM4CgSgablqIG0yRG1FNEUfKEAHE7968Gu7uBtEjtpbQRRRl74VxWV4jBnB0cBHjOBXxdEFe1RZuK3TpRb7Lrp4aLHxzkCxS6ufpLhxML_KGqBTrPkf1Pl988DJkE0r_UiSTN74V0DyzPwoY84zNxgiCsGeh1pMQ0kewa7owazRYIpJghUV0CvAQBUpfCsynBTHyI8pNhHvqz_w__Ztbx5LYFH_6324NipYlhneBBZ1oEvY0_1ovAfnTgY6XVI_P9IQK3A-Ct8LnUMRH_j9RA6MKb_CJwUKPZ55jINzEP80h5b5radR4IAvw_UE8Tyj-rFTN-56N2jSS2SSqJw/8DaxTO0zVFj-Or79EXXbvC8oivtSi4Tj/18)**

President Trump wants to abolish DST and make Standard Time permanent so that there is more daylight in the morning. Others prefer making DST permanent for more daylight in the evening or continuing to change between DST and Standard Time.

_How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard._

clean_body: Peter, President Trump wants to abolish President Trump wants to abolish DST and make Standard Time permanent so that there is more daylight in the morning. Others prefer making DST permanent for more daylight in the evening or continuing to change between DST and Standard Time. How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard. Abolish DST \- Make DST Permanent \- No Change \- More daylight in the morning year-round for our circadian rhythm, more daylight in the evening year-round for recreational activities, or no change? President Trump has already revealed his plans, so now it's your turn to share your thoughts and represent your area. Thank you, Time Change Focus Group * Paid for by the Conservative Battleground Fund PAC (conservativebattlegroundfund.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 2272 Palm Dale Dr SW Wyoming, MI 49519 |

name: Jena Griswold
subject: The ongoing fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg?refcode=260308-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg?refcode=260308-email]
Peter,
Today is International Women’s Day, a moment to celebrate the strength, leadership, and resilience of women here in Colorado and around the world.
It’s a day to honor the women who fought for the right to vote, demanded equal protection under the law, stood up for workers’ rights, defended reproductive freedom, and refused to accept anything less than full participation in our democracy.
But it’s also a reminder: the fight for equality doesn’t belong to history. It belongs to right now.
Across the country, we’re seeing coordinated efforts to roll back fundamental freedoms, from attacks on reproductive rights to efforts to silence voters and undermine the rule of law. Women are often the first impacted and the first to stand up to fight back.
As Secretary of State, I’ve worked to protect the freedom to vote and ensure our elections remain accessible and secure. As I run for Attorney General, I’m ready to continue defending our rights and our State, and making sure the law works for everyone – not just the powerful.
When women lead, we expand opportunity. We protect families. We strengthen democracy.
If you believe in that fight, I’m asking you to stand with me today. Please consider making a donation to help us build the campaign infrastructure we need to reach voters across Colorado and win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-jg?refcode=260308-email]
On this International Women’s Day, let’s celebrate the progress we’ve made and recommit to building a future where every woman and every girl can live freely, safely, and with equal opportunity.
In solidarity,
Jena
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: James Carville
subject: I’ve had it up to HERE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
I need you to listen up
#
It’s James Carville. I need you to listen up because I’m only going to say this ONCE:
**Our path to the Senate goes STRAIGHT through Ohio.**
Okay, who am I kidding? I’m going to tell you that about a hundred more times between now and election day. Hell, I might even say it a hundred more times this WEEK. But if that’s what it takes to get you off the sidelines to help Sherrod Brown win this race, then I ain’t shutting up.
**[I know some of you are already fired up to help out – if that’s you, I need you to split a $10 donation between Sherrod’s campaign and State Democrats Committee RIGHT NOW before I say more. For everyone else, let me tell you a bit more about what we’re up against.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101129?refcode=em20260308-10148&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=10148%2E614464%2EWqBr6v)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101130?refcode=em20260308-10148&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=10148%2E614464%2EWqBr6v) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101130?refcode=em20260308-10148&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=10148%2E614464%2EWqBr6v) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101130?refcode=em20260308-10148&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=10148%2E614464%2EWqBr6v) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101130?refcode=em20260308-10148&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=10148%2E614464%2EWqBr6v) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101130?refcode=em20260308-10148&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=10148%2E614464%2EWqBr6v) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101130?refcode=em20260308-10148&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=10148%2E614464%2EWqBr6v) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101129?refcode=em20260308-10148&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=10148%2E614464%2EWqBr6v)
---
Folks, I’ve had it up to HERE with Jon Husted and his buddies in the Senate majority. They clearly only care about one thing and one thing only: keeping their lobbyist friends happy and their campaign coffers overflowing. Meanwhile, families across the country are footing the bill.
We urgently need real fighters – not these spineless suits who roll over every time some special interest donor waves a checkbook in their face. That’s why we need to elect Sherrod Brown. He’s devoted his career to serving Ohio, and he’s not afraid to stand up to the powerful to do what’s right.
But we have a problem. National Republicans will do whatever they can to hold onto their majority, and that means they’re going to spend UNIMAGINABLE amounts of money in Ohio to keep this seat. They shattered spending records going after Sherrod last time, and they're already gearing up to spend even more this cycle. We're talking an absolute tsunami of attack ads.
**That’s why we need to help Sherrod hit every single goal every step of the way, starting with his daily deadline TONIGHT.[Can you make a $10 split donation RIGHT NOW to help Sherrod win this battleground race?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101129?refcode=em20260308-10148&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=9&akid=10148%2E614464%2EWqBr6v)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101129?refcode=em20260308-10148&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10148%2E614464%2EWqBr6v)**
If we can win in Ohio, we can win the Senate too. It’s that simple. Let’s go win this thing.
James Carville

He’s devoted his career to serving Ohio, and he’s not afraid to stand up to the powerful to do what’s right. But we have a problem. National Republicans will do whatever they can to hold onto their majority, and that means they’re going to spend UNIMAGINABLE amounts of money in Ohio to keep this seat. They shattered spending records going after Sherrod last time, and they're already gearing up to spend even more this cycle. We're talking an absolute tsunami of attack ads. That’s why we need to help Sherrod hit every single goal every step of the way, starting with his daily deadline TONIGHT. If we can win in Ohio, we can win the Senate too. It’s that simple. Let’s go win this thing. James Carville Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: John Fetterman
subject: I'm looking forward to sitting down and reading your thoughts -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?refcode=jtk441-su-fl-header&t=1&akid=10634%2E434096%2EVzduDQ)
| | |
---
Derek, can I get your thoughts? It won't take more than a minute or two.
Now that we're in the full swing of the election year, it's crucial to get your ongoing input on our strategy to win big in the upcoming midterms.
I know you've likely taken one of these surveys before and felt like no one actually read your responses. But I can tell you straight: That won't be the case here.
**I wish more than anything that I could sit down at the kitchen table with every family across PA and listen. But since I can’t, I'll be sitting down at my own kitchen table to read each and every response to this survey.**
**[Will you take this March Priorities Survey now to tell me what you want me to focus on?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52980?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=10634%2E434096%2EVzduDQ)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52980?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=10634%2E434096%2EVzduDQ)
---
What you share here will help me and my team map out our game plan for the month ahead – and see how we can continue standing up for you and your family.
Thanks for taking the time,

John
| |

| | [Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2026?refcode=jtk441-su-fl-footer&t=4&refcode2=10634_434096_VzduDQ&akid=10634%2E434096%2EVzduDQ)

[Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3a0cdd2b-d9fb-4512-84ed-98b6fa8b3eaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hi team,
Today is International Women's Day.
When I worked at the State Department, March 8 was a Big Day. We honored women from around the world who were heroes in their countries, whether they were fighting for girls to be able to go to school or for corrupt politicians to face justice.
But growing up in our part of Pennsylvania, I was surrounded by women who showed me how small acts are important too. That being a woman who makes a difference really means showing up for your community.
So today I'm thinking about my Nan, who grew up in Hamburg and then raised eight kids in Schuylkill Haven. Family lore has it that one time, organizers of a local fundraiser called her up and asked for 12 pies with just a day to make them. And as is typical of my Nan, she made three different kinds of pie, all from scratch. When you called and said you needed help, she answered.
I'm thinking about my mom, who as an ICU nurse cared for patients and their families in some of the hardest and scariest moments of their lives. She worked 12-hour days in the ICU, and still somehow managed to take care of our own family of five.
I'm thinking about my aunts and sisters, who know how to go above and beyond for people here. Finding a special gift for a girl who doesn't have a lot of friends. Rallying donations for a family figuring out their living situation after a fire. Spending time helping people sort through too much stuff.
International Women's Day is a chance to recognize the hardworking women who hold our communities together. But it should also be a reminder that **we need to show up for them like they 've shown up for us.**
That means building a government that actually delivers.
I'm running for Congress to fight for lower costs, affordable health care, and real solutions to local problems. If you're able to, **[chip in to my campaign to help me show up for PA-09.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a4da21e2-e18b-4b76-805d-d0b8eeba9563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ DONATE](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a4da21e2-e18b-4b76-805d-d0b8eeba9563?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Gratefully,
Rachel Wallace
Thanks for reading! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support Rachel's work.

body:

## Meet Rose Today in Redding!
---
| | Hi friends,
Today is International Women’s Day and you’re invited to celebrate two women running for Congress in the North State!
**Please join us for a special joint fundraiser and candidate forum in Redding as we work to elect Audrey Denney (CA-01) and Rose Penelope Yee (CA-02)**! If you’ve not met Rose, this is a great opportunity to meet her and ask questions that matter most to you.
**When** : Today! Sunday, March 8th @ 1:30 PM**Where** : Redding Library, 1100 Parkview Ave., Redding, CA
---

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: For our daughters and their daughters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=3483%2E52803%2EREcvwq)
| | **When women thrive, America thrives.** On International Women’s Day, I’m reflecting on the work we’re doing in the United States Senate to make sure women have the freedom, health care, and opportunity they deserve. That means protecting reproductive freedom, because every woman should be able to make her own health care decisions. It means ensuring military families can access quality reproductive care no matter where they’re stationed. It means investing in research for uterine fibroids and uterine cancer, issues that have been underfunded and overlooked for far too long. And it means tackling the leading cause of death for women: heart disease. I’m proud to have **just introduced bipartisan legislation to expand access to heart health screenings and prevention services for women who need them most.** Progress doesn’t just happen. It takes leadership, persistence, and people like you standing alongside me. We are living through a moment when fundamental freedoms are under attack. But I refuse to let us go backward. [**Will you chip in $20 today to help power the fight for women’s health and freedom before the FEC deadline?**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/40411?t=9&amount=20&akid=3483%2E52803%2EREcvwq) | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/40411?t=10&amount=20&akid=3483%2E52803%2EREcvwq)
---
Together, we’ll ensure women’s rights aren’t just defended, but _strengthened for generations to come._
– Angela Alsobrooks
| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=3483%2E52803%2EREcvwq)
---
| | An important update from Team Alsobrooks:

Angela is so thankful for this grassroots team’s support and is eager to get to work for Marylanders in the Senate. That’s why you’ll be receiving fewer fundraising emails from us moving forward, in an effort to not clog up your inbox for the next six years.

Instead, we’d rather send you emails you want to read – like updates on Angela’s work in the Senate, or rundowns of key issues and news stories from Washington.

But to make this possible, we’re relying on supporters like you to consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution of $3 or even $5 to keep our operations running while Angela is busy fighting for Maryland families.

[Make a recurring contribution to Angela Alsobrooks' campaign here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/33703?t=3&akid=3483%2E52803%2EREcvwq)
---
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=3483%2E52803%2EREcvwq)

---

name: Heidi Hall
subject: Three men colluded against me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260308_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260308_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Friend, it's International Women's Day.
And while there's a lot to celebrate about how far we've come, there are still glaring inequalities that women face on a daily basis.
In the workplace, socially, and in our case, politically .
Kevin Kiley, our former Republican opponent, and his announcement to run in California's 6th Congressional District are the result of "talks" to effectively switch seats with the 6th's current representative so that they could both run an easier race.
This sounds very "inside baseball" because it is.
Politics shouldn't be a game of congressional musical chairs where our representatives speak to each other about who they "want" to go against. It should be about every candidate earning the trust of residents and winning their votes.
I'm running for Congress in CA-03 because I actually live here, and I know that I have the experience to solve the problems that our communities face.
Friend, on this International Women's Day, will you support our campaign by donating any amount that you can to help us reach out to voters and stick it to the three men who made a backroom deal to try and take this Congressional seat away from us? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260308_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20260308_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]

Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260308_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260308_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.

name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: I know where I stand.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
A democracy that sidelines women is not a healthy democracy at all.
Today is International Women's Day, Peter.

Today should be about celebrating progress, but instead, it feels like we're moving backward.

Right now, Congress is considering the _SAVE Act _— a bill pushed by Donald Trump and his allies that would require Americans to show specific documents, like a passport or birth certificate, just to register to vote.

Millions of American citizens who are currently registered and eligible to vote don't have those documents readily available. **And for millions of women who changed their names when they got married, their current legal name doesn't match their birth certificate.** That means they could be turned away.

Peter, let's call this what it is: **a barrier to democracy.**

Not election security.

Not reform.

But a barrier, through and through.

At the same time, Kentucky and so many other states are living with the consequences of abortion bans spreading across the country. Women have been forced to travel hundreds of miles for care, while some have been denied emergency treatment, and others have even lost their lives as a result.

Politicians — _not doctors, not families_ — are making deeply personal medical decisions on behalf of American women. Voting rights are being threatened; reproductive rights have been stripped away. What we're seeing right now is NOT progress. It's regression and erosion, and it's happening right before our very eyes.

So let me make one thing crystal clear, right here, right now: I believe now, and have always believed, that women deserve full freedom and equality under the law. That means the right to vote without jumping through hoops, the right to make their own healthcare decisions, and the right to live without the government policing their bodies or their voices. **A democracy that sidelines women is not a healthy democracy at all.**

[**On this International Women's Day, I'm asking you to stand up and say clearly: we will not go backward. If you believe women's rights should always be protected, in our elections, in our healthcare, and in every way, add your name to my petition now. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126918452/606371673/-510079430?ms=em26_260308_wmsday_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&refcode=em26_260308_wmsday_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&source=em26_260308_wmsday_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260308_wmsday_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=6+zNBRXwHxtbPckaS/EI8RqociEEc1zyEcJbqW1hK9aWRHfI5WaDHwlYbzt+Td7W2P3g4uKcCnHwm7s3mUHMU3OO7T3CHHkhnZhtk027tfQAUqVKeeqxKfeq0M6Ug3yBU1u4NNIMQMJRkU7eYpDjV2ZAFl4ANfKrtSEkwBXCbN8IcIouFO+pcLkMHgoCHuLU&refcode2=f1f3f73c-101b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjFmM2Y3M2MtMTAxYi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=isLj1Aft7SwtOW4tuDbZ3n_G4dFkrq2Inz7g9q6VJIs=&emci=da84ee6a-cb18-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=f1f3f73c-101b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=17458827) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126918457/606371698/-510079430?ms=em26_260308_wmsday_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&refcode=em26_260308_wmsday_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&source=em26_260308_wmsday_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260308_wmsday_adv_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=6+zNBRXwHxtbPckaS/EI8RqociEEc1zyEcJbqW1hK9aWRHfI5WaDHwlYbzt+Td7W2P3g4uKcCnHwm7s3mUHMU3OO7T3CHHkhnZhtk027tfQAUqVKeeqxKfeq0M6Ug3yBU1u4NNIMQMJRkU7eYpDjV2ZAFl4ANfKrtSEkwBXCbN8IcIouFO+pcLkMHgoCHuLU&refcode2=f1f3f73c-101b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjFmM2Y3M2MtMTAxYi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=isLj1Aft7SwtOW4tuDbZ3n_G4dFkrq2Inz7g9q6VJIs=&emci=da84ee6a-cb18-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=f1f3f73c-101b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=17458827) In solidarity,

clean_body: A democracy that sidelines women is not a healthy democracy at all. Today is International Women's Day, Peter. Today should be about celebrating progress, but instead, it feels like we're moving backward. Right now, Congress is considering the SAVE Act — a bill pushed by Donald Trump and his allies that would require Americans to show specific documents, like a passport or birth certificate, just to register to vote. Millions of American citizens who are currently registered and eligible to vote don't have those documents readily available. And for millions of women who changed their names when they got married, their current legal name doesn't match their birth certificate. That means they could be turned away. Peter, let's call this what it is: a barrier to democracy. Not election security. Not reform. But a barrier, through and through. At the same time, Kentucky and so many other states are living with the consequences of abortion bans spreading across the country. Women have been forced to travel hundreds of miles for care, while some have been denied emergency treatment, and others have even lost their lives as a result. Politicians — not doctors, not families — are making deeply personal medical decisions on behalf of American women. Voting rights are being threatened; reproductive rights have been stripped away. What we're seeing right now is NOT progress. It's regression and erosion, and it's happening right before our very eyes. So let me make one thing crystal clear, right here, right now: I believe now, and have always believed, that women deserve full freedom and equality under the law. That means the right to vote without jumping through hoops, the right to make their own healthcare decisions, and the right to live without the government policing their bodies or their voices. A democracy that sidelines women is not a healthy democracy at all. In solidarity, Andy | | Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. We had to share this news with you, friend:
**First,** the GOP identified this race as a prime flip opportunity, and immediately, right-wing megadonors flooded the state with cash and TV ads to attack us.
**Then,** five Republican opponents jumped into this race — several of them using their own wealth to try to buy this seat and bring an extreme agenda into our state.
**And now,** market betting shows this race narrowing for the first time ever, and our opponents are seizing on it as a green light to pour even more money into New Mexico.
**With New Mexico's history of switching parties every eight years and Republicans spending whatever it takes to buy the governor's office, we need you with us right now, friend.**
**_[Will you pitch in $5 or more now to help us reach our $15K midnight fundraising goal and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5906?refcode=jtk402-fr-nd&t=2&akid=8012%2E400544%2EXV_VUw)_**

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Endorsements, accountability, and a committed campaign
body:
Let’s talk about February

| |
---
Hi friend, February showed exactly what this campaign is about. Last month, our work earned the trust and support of leaders across New Jersey and the country. We were endorsed by the Passaic County Democratic Committee, Democratic Committee of Bergen County, and by BRADY, the nation’s leading gun violence prevention organization. Those endorsements are a result of our hard work, my proven record of delivering positive results, and confidence in our ability to win. But we didn’t stop there. In Washington, I confronted the acting director of ICE head-on and asked a simple question: Would I be profiled and arrested simply for being Latina and speaking Spanish? That moment mattered, not just for headlines, but for accountability and for the constituents who are living with fear every day. This is the work your support makes possible. Fighting for our communities here in New Jersey and demanding answers in DC. **[If you believe this kind of leadership matters, I’m asking you to chip in today and help us build on the momentum we created in February. This race will be close, and your donation will ensure we have the resources to keep pushing strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126920213/606377968/-200729754?refcode=260308_np_febrecap_l1&ms=260308_np_febrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTRkZmYyNTQtMTIxYi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P3wrP4aKWrUDoCrTWItF3qvg7HK_FsweurBVdcJqdiY=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126920220/606377975/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=260308_np_febrecap&ms=260308_np_febrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTRkZmYyNTQtMTIxYi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P3wrP4aKWrUDoCrTWItF3qvg7HK_FsweurBVdcJqdiY=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126920221/606377976/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=260308_np_febrecap&ms=260308_np_febrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTRkZmYyNTQtMTIxYi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P3wrP4aKWrUDoCrTWItF3qvg7HK_FsweurBVdcJqdiY=)

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. clean_body: Let’s talk about February | | Hi friend, February showed exactly what this campaign is about. Last month, our work earned the trust and support of leaders across New Jersey and the country. We were endorsed by the Passaic County Democratic Committee, Democratic Committee of Bergen County, and by BRADY, the nation’s leading gun violence prevention organization. Those endorsements are a result of our hard work, my proven record of delivering positive results, and confidence in our ability to win. But we didn’t stop there. In Washington, I confronted the acting director of ICE head-on and asked a simple question: Would I be profiled and arrested simply for being Latina and speaking Spanish? That moment mattered, not just for headlines, but for accountability and for the constituents who are living with fear every day. This is the work your support makes possible. Fighting for our communities here in New Jersey and demanding answers in DC. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for standing with me, Nellie Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126920568/606378745/-664395954?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzMwOTIwOC0xMzFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S3V4S0bWL2S6LcoZVSrtnUl6G23pxcUHJjFAws4IuBw=)
Friend, This is not normal. Donald Trump suggested **“it should be my third term”** and declared that the **“only way”** Democrats can win is to cheat. Now, Trump is escalating efforts to bend elections to his will ahead of November – while simultaneously undermining public trust in the outcome.
* He’s called to “nationalize” elections, even though the Constitution leaves election administration to the states.
* His Justice Department is suing states for private voter roll data.
* The FBI has seized ballots from 2020 in Georgia.
* And Trump himself has said he will only accept the 2026 results “if the elections are honest.”

That’s not how democracy works. In America, voters decide elections. Not presidents. Not the Department of Justice. And not anyone who thinks they can rewrite the rules when the voters don’t agree with them. Democratic Secretaries of State are the frontline defense against federal overreach and election subversion, but they need the resources to be ready for anything. body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1011&refcode=email-20230308_v&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

BIG NEWS! James Talarico – a middle school teacher and unapologetic
working-class fighter – has clinched the Democratic nomination for U.S.
Senate in Texas.

Who else is excited to get to work and elect a progressive Senator in
Texas??

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36052?source=email-20230308&t=1061&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]Headline: James Talarico wins Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in
Texas

This is the momentum we’ve been building toward for years to turn Texas
blue - thanks to grassroots supporters like you. With GOP candidates Ken
Paxton and John Cornyn set for a brutal runoff election to determine their
nominee, the door is wide open for us – if we move fast and move together.
Let’s keep the Our Revolution GOTV machine running — and speed things up —
to seize this moment.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20230308nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]Can you rush a donation ASAP to help us build out our ground game across
the big state of Texas? Let’s act NOW to flip this Senate seat blue and
elect progressive James Talarico!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20230308nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20230308nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20230308nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20230308nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20230308nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20230308nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Unlike most politicians, Talarico isn’t another millionaire lawyer or
oil-and-gas shill. He grew up in Texas public schools, taught 6th grade,
and knows firsthand the struggles working families face every day. He’s
not afraid to call out corporate greed and stand up to the oligarch class.

At a recent rally, James put it bluntly: “Whether you’re a Democrat or a
Republican, whether you’re a progressive or a conservative, the real fight
in this country is not left versus right. It’s top versus bottom.”

THAT is the kind of leader we need to take on Trump and his oligarchs. And
Talarico’s primary opponent, progressive champion Jasmine Crockett, threw
her support behind him this week. That’s the kind of unity – and momentum
– we need to win.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36052?source=email-20230308&t=1060&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]Tweet by Jasmine Crockett: This morning I called James and
congratulated him on becoming the Senate nominee. Texas is primed to turn
blue and we must remain united because this is bigger than any one person.
This is about the future of all 30 million Texans and getting America back
on track. With the primary behind us, Democrats must rally around our
nominees and win. I'm committed to doing my part and will continue working
to elect democrats up and down the ballot.

Our Revolution already endorsed Talarico once when he was running for the
Texas House of Representatives. Now, if we act fast and level up our
grassroots machine, together we can break the right’s grip on power in
Texas and take back the Senate.

But we can’t do it without you. Our organizers know how to win. We
mobilized to make half a MILLION voter contacts to elect Mamdani last
fall. Now we’re going ALL IN for Talarico – knocking doors, adding phone
banks, and organizing on the ground to turn out the voters we need.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36051?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20230308nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10345%2E5885482%2EG1WA58 ]Will you dig deep and donate now to turn Texas blue and elect a
working-class champion to the Senate?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**This is Zak Daniel- I want to share something deeply personal with you.** **My wife Lauren has done incredible work to support our President and PROTECT our country. **But there's a side of Lauren she'd never brag aboutAs her husband, I think you deserve to hear it. **Can I get just two minutes of your time, Peter?** It started way back in high school when Lauren and I first met. We fell in love, and at just 17, she got pregnant with our first child. We were young. We were scared. And we were surrounded by voices telling us we would have no future if we kept the baby.**_People told Lauren she was throwing her life away. That abortion was her only way out._** Long story short, we heard _every single lie_ the Democrats push on young women that motherhood is a mistake, that life begins only when it's convenient, and that faith should take a back seat to fear. [_**But Lauren stood firm. She chose LIFE. She chose OUR SON. She chose to FIGHT.**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/wEw2kFiDc7pcgAEQygZQG-ytV2BSirfkqLpZHXsiwCGszR1YLilea1XD-BsiRlwusDO6swNJHeyQC7hdMd7uITdaHOXokQOIr3w3ydImjcUrQX6Cqs3Spq54xmPKosO71oPZ8O8rdwYTilr5JQHV41Sv4gyl3B-m93uDvVHlC8b3Hk_vgPt47uUuDRIyla11jq313oCowHHG73_L8a3HjwcN3U3KuuEjaSO8k_D8xcVXnwH3SUMzOtqBp0OarU2NKBTQJSDiQQ5xVg4sv8YL3QWsO2B1lOKr0u4r5ZGfpRpAgqOUvKQFhY4QEMwbuhvaWUMWM8hykOrtLMHA0Z9LCX88PY1XqDNtNx_xjgz-ObTg_8vaCZKa295BXpfeTj2ii_QD3tQXN_TbfHdgHwTlfFdaiwq5MGVOfFLRN137Xt29lOUy82rxgOYvsW2bbNPXJXFyHqbLStyjAg3_O2UcYFx5xhB6uS7Cmd0YLMclyGMoAG-_MHdhG_YfW-QUNkSoPQUhTwXt2nKsGdIzhDzHzIJHCsAJ7g5fcvxm9oHH5AmtGlMjkgcE3kwBPOouf-d5N8R82c_TyIdqYYUb0WlqBnQ6f7dLdg5B9IBkQef68V_zT1O63DkknKuHFTI4itQydzynjpljX1Y6FRtRohg6YpjFL1BCH3nL5Zbo_3w-8dY4Bew5XWAVS5IQxcFjSkjEiN4wwJjgZWjE6rPNaBTf7CE8pAERlyEetPzsO-GoiTvI29MPPO_dQ-TK7mgc1Pe4DvyvRe0b-7pny92gOfbaszQ6uSvIzCKmFiDifHggTMjqQTg8lqPtFP3tuci2wCqKE8gfL3Qp4SCKpMh20PtZ7Z0XTv1_ezcN-huvF9E5UK9GZRPBYc7qaaxO9-pR_Sm95sMykcJNvp0UWuVRdm6dQA3BCGXHwC_JlETKXR3oj5JU3fWIIOR8TF3mYFwSgV0QDWEXU1yNWIb5JcvOu7-pcmNGpWuLvvTDLqqjLGocZ8QjIXS0LjIxM8Qu3VsJKMkG6hXh8RvF95gCE37mx8DE5TBhdLIwqo3nd5R-FherIg-IqYqknMxF79zdSE2saVry-yLhCLW-tYxvLbSFWpGh_fuYGtMMDLVh4-eWT8Esa7kjA6hScp2CPcAfmBt3vz3asK56PdT1G659Nd8/q_adGF-qnTb4WdjcjKdQ2Qz0l93dHd7G/18)

clean_body: | | | This is Zak Daniel- I want to share something deeply personal with you. My wife Lauren has done incredible work to support our President and PROTECT our country. But there's a side of Lauren she'd never brag aboutAs her husband, I think you deserve to hear it. Can I get just two minutes of your time, Peter? It started way back in high school when Lauren and I first met. We fell in love, and at just 17, she got pregnant with our first child. We were young. We were scared. And we were surrounded by voices telling us we would have no future if we kept the baby.People told Lauren she was throwing her life away. That abortion was her only way out. Long story short, we heard every single lie the Democrats push on young women that motherhood is a mistake, that life begins only when it's convenient, and that faith should take a back seat to fear. I'd never admired her more. Because she didn't just survive she thrived. She finished high school, graduated from Georgia State University with a Bachelor's in English, and went on to become the YOUNGEST FEMALE MEMBER of the Georgia House. And she's not doing it for power, but to PROTECT the values she lives every single day.I'll be the first to tell you, the Left can't stand Lauren. They're ATTACKING her for being a bold, unapologetic, America-First mom who puts families and faith above everything else. They HATE that she's living proof that conservative, pro-life women are strong, capable, and ready to lead. The truth is, they're trying to shut Lauren down because she's fighting for your God-given rights the same way she fought for the God-given right for our son to live. Don't let the Left ERASE pro-life protections, DISMANTLE family-first policies, and REPLACE them with their radical, woke agenda. They haven't succeeded yet but they're getting close. That's why Lauren needs we can give her. Because if we don't draw the line right now, we risk losing everything we've fought so hard to preserve. Lauren's ready to fight. I've seen it in her since day one.The only question is For faith, family, and freedom,Zak Daniel | | Paid for by Daniel for Georgia. PO Box 5, Forsyth, GA, 31029

name: Haley Stevens
subject: MAGA billionaires want to pummel this campaign into the ground. We won't let them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Here's what's happening:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14721?t=2&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV)
---
null, it’s Haley.

Bad news: **Elon Musk has reentered the chat, along with a gang of other far-right billionaires.**

And it has big implications for our battleground race, but before I get into it, I have to ask:
**[Will you rush $5 now to help my campaign reach voters, win in Michigan, and flip the Senate blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14722?t=3&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14710?t=4&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV)
---
Here's what's happening:

1️⃣ Since _NBC News_ called our race one of just four that will "decide the balance of power" in the Senate and _The Hill_ said Michigan is most likely to flip from blue to red in 2026 – **the GOP considers our race one of their top targets.**
2️⃣ Polls are showing that I’m tied with Trump-endorsed Mike Rogers and _leading the field_ with independents. **That means I’m Democrats’ best shot to win this race.**
**3️⃣ And now, MAGA billionaires like _Elon Musk_ have dumped $5 MILLION into the GOP's Senate Leadership Fund to pummel our campaign and save Trump's majority.**
null, this battleground race is about so much more than just one seat. It’s about flipping the Senate, putting a check on Trump’s dangerous chaos agenda, and fighting like hell for Michigan’s working families.
MAGA billionaires like Elon Musk know that too. They know that if we win, workers will have a louder voice in Washington and their power will weaken.

Right-wing billionaires are counting on the MAGA majority to keep shielding them from accountability – and help some of them become the world's first trillionaires (unfortunately, not a joke).
That's why they jumped back into the game. That's why Trump’s billionaire buddies are spending big for his MAGA allies. That's why I say: _Enough with billionaires who think they can buy our elections._
**My team and I are going all out to win this seat, but we can't do it without the full support of grassroots Democrats like you behind us.**
**_[null, I’m personally asking: Will you rush $5 toward our $25,000 daily goal now to help us fight back against Elon Musk, defeat MAGA Mike Rogers, and take back the Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14722?t=5&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV)_**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14998?t=6&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14999?t=7&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15000?t=8&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14710?t=9&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV)
---
With grit and gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14714?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14721?t=11&akid=2377%2E49239%2ENCh7DV)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: They hate me. Good.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1808%2E251025%2EnSO8CR ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1808%2E251025%2EnSO8CR ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

You can learn a lot about a politician by who can't stand them.

So let me tell you who can't stand me:

Trump's MAGA Republicans can't stand me. I've spent years calling out
their agenda for exactly what it is — a corrupt scheme that takes from
working people and hands it to billionaires. They know I won't stop.

Corporate PACs can't stand me. I've never taken a dime from them. Not in
my last campaign, not now, not ever. They know they can't buy me. So
they'd rather I not exist.

AIPAC can't stand me. I'm one of the only major Senate candidates in the
country who has called for an end to sending U.S. taxpayer dollars to fund
a genocide. They're already spending millions of dollars to stop campaigns
like mine. That tells you everything about who I'm fighting for — and who
I'm not.

I didn't choose these enemies. They chose me because I refuse to play the
game the way they want it played.

Some politicians keep their heads down. They solely focus on pleasing
their megadonors and always take the corporate-approved stance. That’s why
nothing ever changes.

That's not me, and frankly, the fact that these forces are already lining
up against our campaign tells me we're doing something right.

But it also means we're going to need real grassroots support to fight
back. AIPAC won’t hesitate to funnel millions into Michigan to target our
campaign. Corporate PACs don't play small. And MAGA Republicans want this
Senate seat badly.

The only way we match that energy is with people like you,
Peter.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260308-1-ak.RPONjD&amount=10&refcode=em20260308-1803&t=1004&akid=1808%2E251025%2EnSO8CR ]If you've been waiting for a candidate who won't bow to the machine —
who will walk into the U.S. Senate and actually fight — I'd ask you to
consider donating today:

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260308-1-ak.RPONjD&amount=10&refcode=em20260308-1803&t=1023&akid=1808%2E251025%2EnSO8CR ]Donate $10 ››

We've got the right enemies. Now, let's make sure we've got the resources
to beat them.

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

On this International Women's Day, Derek, we celebrate the trailblazers and icons who paved the way for women in STEM, in the military, and beyond.
As a woman, mother, and third-generation veteran, Chrissy knows that any kind of progress starts with the health of women and girls and their families. Why? **Because when women and girls are healthy, have access to education, and have good opportunities, it leads to a more peaceful world.**

But on this day, it's not lost on us just how far back the Trump administration and his far-right allies have pushed us in recent years, attacking everything from voting rights to reproductive freedom.
**There's so much on the line this election year, Derek – and now more than ever, it's critical to protect the seats of Democratic leaders who are leading the fight for women. **

name: Team Swalwell
subject: Our chances of winning

name: Team Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: 44 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
A quick breakdown of Virginia’s redistricting amendment.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260308-285&t=1&akid=285%2E12592%2EpfPxGP)
Hey, early voting on this redistricting amendment began THIS FRIDAY in Virginia.
**That means there are just 44 days until April 21.**
Across the country, politicians are attempting to lock in congressional control before voters even head to the polls. New maps in Texas could add up to five Republican seats, and other MAGA Republican-controlled states are following suit at Trump’s direction.
_Here in Virginia, we can disrupt MAGA’s strategy._
**On April 21, voters will decide whether to approve new congressional maps that will preserve fair elections and allow Virginian voters’ voices to be heard.**
_We won’t be able to do that without a fully-funded campaign to educate voters before misinformation and disinformation fills the airwaves._
[**Will you help us keep voters informed in the days ahead?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260308_2.4r1FLo&amount=3&refcode=20260308-285&t=2&akid=285%2E12592%2EpfPxGP)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260308_2.4r1FLo&amount=3&refcode=20260308-285&t=21&akid=285%2E12592%2EpfPxGP)**
With early voting officially underway, we are entering the most critical stretch of this campaign. Every mail piece, every digital ad, every voter contact between now and April 21 could determine whether Virginia levels the playing field or allows Trump’s allies to keep stacking it.
We don’t have the luxury of waiting,
Team Virginians for Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=22&refcode2=285_12592_pfPxGP&akid=285%2E12592%2EpfPxGP)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=23&akid=285%2E12592%2EpfPxGP)
