name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: I took a leap of faith
body:
This is one of the most important lessons I’ve learned.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
I learned one of the most important lessons of my life on the floor of the Texas House — more specifically, the lesson came the moment I chose to _walk off of it._
In 2021, the GOP was ramming through an extreme anti-voter bill. I felt something rising in me that I couldn’t ignore. I knew staying put meant letting Texans lose their freedom to vote.
**So I took a leap of faith.**
I stood up, texted other legislators:
_“A leap of faith only works if you take it.”_
Together, we ran out the clock and stopped a bill designed to silence Texas voters. That quorum break protected Sunday morning voting — a sacred tradition in Black churches — and blocked a provision that would have allowed partisan judges to overturn election results without evidence. And we earned that victory together.
So I’ll repeat that to you today:
**A leap of faith only works if you take it.**
And when you do, others will leap with you.
**I’m taking another leap of faith with this campaign, Peter.**
Texas is on another precipice. Our schools are under attack, our freedoms are eroding, and right-wing corporate donors have more influence in the Governor’s Office than everyday Texans ever will unless we change course immediately.
If Texans take a leap of faith together next year, I know we can win this fight.
**[Can I count on you to donate $5 now to power my grassroots campaign?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260308_1_faith.cnoS2c&refcode=em20260308-718&amount=5&t=1&akid=718%2E299639%2Eac7539)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260308_1_faith.cnoS2c&amount=5&refcode=em20260308-718&t=20&akid=718%2E299639%2Eac7539)
_No te dejes._
— Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260308-1&t=21&refcode2=718_299639_ac7539&akid=718%2E299639%2Eac7539)

Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

name: Amanda Sherman Baity, EMILYs List
subject: It's time to vote Susan Collins out once and for all.
body:
Janet Mills has courage. Susan Collins has empty words and "concerns." |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922152/606383595/-1039259220?refcode=WUEFEO16_20260308_CollinsOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1057972&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFlMDZhMy0xODFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ciuItQfMqBPXEXc3CDpexMxW6lfyRrxDTxkpQQ7SgA4=) Hi Peter,

Susan Collins has spent nearly 30 years in Washington perfecting one thing: **looking "concerned" while enabling a far right agenda that hurts Maine.**

As Trump pushes the limits of his power, Mainers don't need a senator who waits to see which way the wind is blowing — they need someone with the backbone to stand up and stop him.

That's why it's so telling that when Congress has the chance to rein in Trump's reckless actions, Collins won't say where she stands — because she's always doing the same calculation: **count the votes first, then decide how to vote so she can claim independence without ever getting in the way of Trump's agenda.**

[**If you're ready to send Susan Collins packing and bring REAL leadership to Maine, donate now to help elect women like Gov. Janet Mills this November:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922153/606383596/-1894566299?refcode=WUEFEO16_20260308_CollinsOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1057972&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFlMDZhMy0xODFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ciuItQfMqBPXEXc3CDpexMxW6lfyRrxDTxkpQQ7SgA4=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922154/606383597/-1894566299?refcode=WUEFEO16_20260308_CollinsOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1057972&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFlMDZhMy0xODFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ciuItQfMqBPXEXc3CDpexMxW6lfyRrxDTxkpQQ7SgA4=)
---
Collins' refusal to stand up to Trump and his disastrous administration has had real consequences for Maine families:

* **Health Care:** Collins was a key, pivotal vote to advance the GOP tax bill that will force 61,000 Mainers to lose their health care and shut down rural Maine hospitals in order to pay for tax giveaways to billionaires.
* **Medicaid:** She has a decades-long record of voting to cut Medicaid and Medicare and has voted _over a dozen times_ to repeal or undermine the Affordable Care Act.
* **Supporting Dangerous Nominees:** Collins has doubled-down and offered "no regrets" on her votes to confirm controversial Trump officials and judicial nominees who are inflicting harm on Mainers, including Brett Kavanaugh, RFK Jr. and OMB Director Russ Vought.

Time and again, Susan Collins shows where her priorities lie: with Trump, the Republican Party, and GOP donors.

Maine cannot afford six more years of taking a backseat.

And that's exactly why **Governor Janet Mills** , backed by EMILYs List, is running to replace Collins: because Maine deserves a senator who will stand up to Trump — not bend the knee.

Janet has spent her career taking on powerful interests and winning. She’s not afraid to stand up to a loud bully in the White House. She’s a proven statewide winner, a tough, tested leader, and a fighter who knows that "seniority without backbone" is nothing but tenure.

If we’re going to flip Maine's Senate seat, we need someone who is ready to go toe-to-toe with Susan Collins and beat her.

[**Donate today to support EMILYs List women like Janet Mills who will take on Trump's Republican Party in 2026 — and win:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922155/606383598/-1894566299?refcode=WUEFEO16_20260308_CollinsOppoRS_PL&sourceid=1057972&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFlMDZhMy0xODFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ciuItQfMqBPXEXc3CDpexMxW6lfyRrxDTxkpQQ7SgA4=)

clean_body: Janet Mills has courage. Susan Collins has empty words and "concerns." | = Hi Peter, Susan Collins has spent nearly 30 years in Washington perfecting one thing: looking "concerned" while enabling a far right agenda that hurts Maine. As Trump pushes the limits of his power, Mainers don't need a senator who waits to see which way the wind is blowing — they need someone with the backbone to stand up and stop him. That's why it's so telling that when Congress has the chance to rein in Trump's reckless actions, Collins won't say where she stands — because she's always doing the same calculation: count the votes first, then decide how to vote so she can claim independence without ever getting in the way of Trump's agenda. = | = Collins' refusal to stand up to Trump and his disastrous administration has had real consequences for Maine families: Health Care: Collins was a key, pivotal vote to advance the GOP tax bill that will force 61,000 Mainers to lose their health care and shut down rural Maine hospitals in order to pay for tax giveaways to billionaires. Medicaid: She has a decades-long record of voting to cut Medicaid and Medicare and has voted over a dozen times to repeal or undermine the Affordable Care Act. Supporting Dangerous Nominees: Collins has doubled-down and offered "no regrets" on her votes to confirm controversial Trump officials and judicial nominees who are inflicting harm on Mainers, including Brett Kavanaugh, RFK Jr. and OMB Director Russ Vought. Time and again, Susan Collins shows where her priorities lie: with Trump, the Republican Party, and GOP donors. Maine cannot afford six more years of taking a backseat. And that's exactly why Governor Janet Mills** , backed by EMILYs List, is running to replace Collins: because Maine deserves a senator who will stand up to Trump — not bend the knee. Janet has spent her career taking on powerful interests and winning. She’s not afraid to stand up to a loud bully in the White House. She’s a proven statewide winner, a tough, tested leader, and a fighter who knows that "seniority without backbone" is nothing but tenure. If we’re going to flip Maine's Senate seat, we need someone who is ready to go toe-to-toe with Susan Collins and beat her. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Talk soon, Amanda Sherman Baity (she/her/hers) Chief Communications Officer, EMILYs List | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NPR: Supreme Court seems poised to further undercut the Voting Rights Act [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_SCOTUS_VRA.png]
The Supreme Court seems headed for another ruling that undercuts the landmark 1965 Voting Rights Act.
Once considered the jewel in the crown of the civil rights movement, the Voting Rights Act has been largely dismembered since 2013 by the increasingly conservative Supreme Court.
We want to hear from voters in your area about this news. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you think the Supreme Court should be "dismembering" the Voting Rights Act?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=030826_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=030826_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=030826_1&amount=20]

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Kristi Noem and my Opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101552?refcode=em20260308-10147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10147%2E614464%2ElsVNzv)
Here’s the truth, Peter: Donald Trump and Kristi Noem’s dangerous agenda is already taking place across the country, including in New Mexico — and it could go even further if we’re not careful.
**One of my opponents in this race is funded by a Kristi Noem donor.** That’s not random. That’s how this extremist agenda takes hold — through outside money and candidates who are willing to open the door to it. **Extremists see New Mexico as a top target** for their right-wing agenda. If we don’t act now, we risk losing New Mexico to MAGA extremism. **[That's why it's so critical that we protect the seat of every Democratic governor — including right here in New Mexico. Can you help us keep New Mexico blue by splitting $10 between Heartland Patriots and my campaign?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101553?refcode=em20260308-10147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=10147%2E614464%2ElsVNzv)**
When Trump and his administration abuse their power and come after our rights, Democratic leaders are the last line of defense. That’s how we stop the worst of Kristi Noem’s agenda from taking root. And let’s be clear about what that agenda actually looks like:
1. Deploying undertrained ICE agents to cities across the nation, tearing families apart and targeting Black and brown communities.

2. Stoking violence at every turn, causing people to live in fear across the country, including right here in New Mexico.

3. Putting families at risk by holding up over a billion dollars in FEMA funding. She is withholding critical funds that allow people across the country, including right here in New Mexico, to recover from and prepare for natural disasters.

If Donald Trump and Kristi Noem want to bring their dangerous, extremist agenda here, they will have to get through us. **That’s what it means to be the last line of defense.**
That’s exactly why it matters who funds your campaign — because I’m not backed by the people pushing this extremist agenda. I’m backed by New Mexicans — everyday, working people like you. Peter, I've spent my entire career fighting for working families, and I'm not afraid to be a brick wall against Trump and his administration. As governor of New Mexico, I will move our state towards a future where everyone can thrive.
**[So please, will you split a $10 contribution between Heartland Patriots and my campaign right now? We need your grassroots support now more than ever.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101553?refcode=em20260308-10147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=10147%2E614464%2ElsVNzv)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101553?refcode=em20260308-10147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=10147%2E614464%2ElsVNzv) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101553?refcode=em20260308-10147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=10147%2E614464%2ElsVNzv) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101553?refcode=em20260308-10147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=10147%2E614464%2ElsVNzv) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101553?refcode=em20260308-10147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=10147%2E614464%2ElsVNzv) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101553?refcode=em20260308-10147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=10147%2E614464%2ElsVNzv) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101553?refcode=em20260308-10147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=10147%2E614464%2ElsVNzv) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101552?refcode=em20260308-10147&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10147%2E614464%2ElsVNzv)

| Peter,

We are less than **1 month** away from our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year. I want to be clear with you about where we stand and what we are up against. Here are 3 things you need to know:

1\. Trump and House Republicans are on the offensive. They are using their narrow majority to push a brutal anti-immigrant, anti-worker, anti-freedom agenda.

2\. I’m leading the fight to flip the House. As Chair of BOLD PAC, I’m helping elect diverse, progressive Democrats who will stop the MAGA agenda and deliver for working families.

3\. Grassroots power is how we win. While GOP megadonors pour money into battlegrounds, we are building a people-powered movement that can out-organize and outvote them, but only if we hit our goals.

Friend,

Dr. Jasmeet Bains is running for Congress. Here’s three things we think you should know about her:
1. **Jasmeet is the daughter of two first-generation immigrants.** Her father worked as a mechanic and her mother worked odd jobs.
2. **She’s a lifelong resident of CA-22.** Jasmeet was raised here, trained as a doctor here, and continued to stay and serve in this district as a physician, choosing to focus on rural areas that needed health care access.
3. **Jasmeet never planned to run for Congress.** She’s not a career politician. She is — and always will be — a doctor, first and foremost.

[If you’re ready to elect a representative for CA-22 who knows this district, who will always stand up for healthcare, and who will always fight for our communities, please chip in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922538/606385103/-4170759?amount=25&refcode=jbfc_20260308_emdf_e1_t0_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGViMDA3YmItMWExYi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZgRy8KjNEm8FGI82uYrqN_7JCwCoabnOifJUz2epEzg=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ******[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922541/606385104/-4170759?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=jbfc_20260308_emdf_e1_t0_ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGViMDA3YmItMWExYi1mMTExLWE2OWEtMDAwZDNhMWYwYTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZgRy8KjNEm8FGI82uYrqN_7JCwCoabnOifJUz2epEzg=)******

clean_body: | = Friend, Dr. Jasmeet Bains is running for Congress. Here’s three things we think you should know about her: 1. Jasmeet is the daughter of two first-generation immigrants. Her father worked as a mechanic and her mother worked odd jobs. 2. She’s a lifelong resident of CA-22. Jasmeet was raised here, trained as a doctor here, and continued to stay and serve in this district as a physician, choosing to focus on rural areas that needed health care access. 3. Jasmeet never planned to run for Congress. She’s not a career politician. body:
This International Women’s Day, we must recommit to fighting for a truly equal America
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922601/606385230/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0YjAwN2JiLTFhMWItZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTFmMGE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=llEsOXvJOjGB_-l2ALqoBJ1e9IIT3dIIIbMIGt9Less=&emci=2c1f2d71-a719-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=94b007bb-1a1b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, This International Women’s Day, as we call attention to the struggle for equal rights and equal justice for women worldwide, we also need to take a hard look at the war on women’s voting rights here in America. We are in a precarious moment for our country’s democracy. Anti-democracy forces at the highest levels of our government are trying to stop our progress and take us back to a time when women and marginalized communities had fewer rights than they do now. Republicans in the House have passed the so-called “SAVE America Act,” a bill that could pose enormous hurdles for up to 69 million women and LGBTQ+ people who have changed their last names. **Peter, that's 75 percent of the women registered to vote in the U.S. This is voter suppression in broad daylight. ** **We can’t overstate the threat this legislation poses to the voting rights of women, LGBTQ+ people, people of color, and _all_ Americans. Republicans are willing to do anything to cling to power. We won’t let them. [Can you rush a donation to help us fight back against the SAVE Act and all other efforts to silence the will of the people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922602/606385231/-1096702678?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_IntlWomensDay_email_20260308-NDRC-Tier1-IntlWomensDay_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260308-NDRC-Tier1-IntlWomensDay_&utm_campaign=IntlWomensDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0YjAwN2JiLTFhMWItZjExMS1hNjlhLTAwMGQzYTFmMGE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=llEsOXvJOjGB_-l2ALqoBJ1e9IIT3dIIIbMIGt9Less=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The truth is, polls show that the vast majority of women do not approve of MAGA policies — or Trump's bullying — and have been moving even further away from the Republican Party in recent years. The GOP is trying to hold on to power by any means necessary ahead of the November elections. This is a clear attempt to reduce the power of voters who don’t like them.

clean_body: This International Women’s Day, we must recommit to fighting for a truly equal America | Peter, This International Women’s Day, as we call attention to the struggle for equal rights and equal justice for women worldwide, we also need to take a hard look at the war on women’s voting rights here in America. We are in a precarious moment for our country’s democracy. Anti-democracy forces at the highest levels of our government are trying to stop our progress and take us back to a time when women and marginalized communities had fewer rights than they do now. Republicans in the House have passed the so-called “SAVE America Act,” a bill that could pose enormous hurdles for up to 69 million women and LGBTQ+ people who have changed their last names. Peter, that's 75 percent of the women registered to vote in the U.S. This is voter suppression in broad daylight. We can’t overstate the threat this legislation poses to the voting rights of women, LGBTQ+ people, people of color, and all Americans. Republicans are willing to do anything to cling to power. We won’t let them. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Let’s be clear: This is extreme, even by Republican standards. So why are they still pushing this unpopular legislation? The truth is, polls show that the vast majority of women do not approve of MAGA policies — or Trump's bullying — and have been moving even further away from the Republican Party in recent years. The GOP is trying to hold on to power by any means necessary ahead of the November elections. This is a clear attempt to reduce the power of voters who don’t like them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The NDRC = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior.
Whether it's...

* Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory
* Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement
* Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities

It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING.
_But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place._
Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact.
After seeing that, I knew I had to step in.

clean_body: way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior. Whether it's... Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING. But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place. Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact. After seeing that, I knew I had to step in. Do you reckon you could be one of those Conservatives? we all step up and work together I think we'll be able to keep these Democrats at bay and continue to deliver wins for good, hard workin' Americans. But I can 't do it without you, Peter. Thanks for hearing me out, John N. name: Seth for Massachusetts
subject: Who’s feeling this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
Not the ultra-wealthy.

| |
---
Hey there, We’re facing a warmer week this week, but for the last month, Massachusetts has been devastated by the coldest and toughest winter we’ve had in a decade. For a lot of families, this means exorbitant heating bills are due this month. That pressure is exactly why Seth is running on affordability as a priority. Housing, healthcare, and education are human rights. There are two Americas today – one for the wealthy and well-connected, and one for everyone else. In an economy where President Trump’s policies have made his billionaire friends even wealthier, tens of thousands of Massachusetts families are struggling to make rent, are about to lose their health care coverage, and are having to turn down their thermostats to save cash. That’s wrong, and it’s un-American. This quarter is going to define the strength of this campaign. If we’re going to take on corporate loopholes, push for lower costs, and actually deliver for working families, we need the resources to do it. **[If you’re in a position to contribute, we’d be honored to have your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922791/606385770/2090747700?refcode=260308_sfm_stretch_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWZiMTUwYS0xYzFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ChDDBV31OOGEziOmhg0JHw6O2oYpUcBsUQ1bTPk54fE=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922798/606385777/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=260308_sfm_stretch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWZiMTUwYS0xYzFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ChDDBV31OOGEziOmhg0JHw6O2oYpUcBsUQ1bTPk54fE=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126922799/606385778/1375639745?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=260308_sfm_stretch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWZiMTUwYS0xYzFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ChDDBV31OOGEziOmhg0JHw6O2oYpUcBsUQ1bTPk54fE=)

clean_body: Not the ultra-wealthy. | | Hey there, We’re facing a warmer week this week, but for the last month, Massachusetts has been devastated by the coldest and toughest winter we’ve had in a decade. For a lot of families, this means exorbitant heating bills are due this month. That pressure is exactly why Seth is running on affordability as a priority. Housing, healthcare, and education are human rights. There are two Americas today – one for the wealthy and well-connected, and one for everyone else. In an economy where President Trump’s policies have made his billionaire friends even wealthier, tens of thousands of Massachusetts families are struggling to make rent, are about to lose their health care coverage, and are having to turn down their thermostats to save cash. That’s wrong, and it’s un-American. This quarter is going to define the strength of this campaign. If we’re going to take on corporate loopholes, push for lower costs, and actually deliver for working families, we need the resources to do it. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. We’re serious about lowering costs. And we’re building a campaign strong enough to do it. — Seth for Massachusetts | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a Marine and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. Seth’s two young daughters, Emmy and Caroline, remind him every day why new leadership and urgent action can’t wait any longer. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to: Seth for Massachusetts - PO Box 2013, Salem, MA, 01970 Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Seth for Massachusetts PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Team Moore
subject: Leadership has never been more important
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1240%2E1086043%2EpJmLkb)
Peter, there’s no denying it: The Trump administration’s reckless policies are hurting _everyone._
Costs are skyrocketing, jobs are being cut, and we are at risk of another conflict that sends American troops into combat.
Right now, leadership has never been more important. Governors have never been more important. And Democratic governors are standing up.
**State by state, leaders like Wes Moore are proving that there’s another way forward: one where we leave no one behind.**
Democratic governors are fighting back and making progress on affordability, public safety, education, and more. And as the only organization dedicated to getting them elected nationwide, the Democratic Governors’ Association relies on our support to continue this fight.
**[Peter, will you chip in to the DGA today? With your support, we can elect (and reelect) Democratic leaders across the country to fight for real progress.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260308-1.2EMaPN&refcode=em-20260308-1&t=2&akid=1240%2E1086043%2EpJmLkb)**

Thank you,
Team Moore

From the bottom of my heart, thank you. |
Peter,

From the bottom of my heart: THANK YOU.

Because of your steadfast support and your belief in our vision, we have officially won the primary election. It is an honor to be your nominee, but I need you to know that the toughest part of this journey is just beginning.

I have written a special, personal note just for you regarding our upcoming battle against Roy Cooper and why President Trump is counting on this team specifically.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/119007/images/mel%20website%20pic.jpg]
The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee just endorsed my opponent in the primary — months before voters even get a say.
I'm Mel Tull, and I'm not backing down.
I'm a business lawyer and community leader who's spent decades serving Virginia, not climbing the political ladder in DC. I've built businesses, led non-profits, and served as Treasurer of the Henrico Democratic Committee, doing the work of actually building our local party.
And now DC insiders are trying to tell Democratic voters who their nominee should be before a single ballot is cast.
Here's what makes me furious. The DCCC should be spending its time fighting Republicans and taking on Trump — not overriding the will of Democratic voters. You'd think they would have learned this lesson by now.
Regardless of what the big-wig consultants are saying, we’re forging ahead with our ambitious plan to FLIP this district.
My campaign is built on grassroots supporters who are tired of the establishment picking winners and losers. People who want real leadership, not another anointed candidate who owes their career to DC insiders.
I don't need DC elites. I need grassroots donors like you on my side. Chip in $25, $50, or $100 right now and let's show the establishment that Virginia voters pick their own candidates. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
MAKE A GRASSROOTS DONATION TODAY! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melltull4congress]
Virginia voters deserve a choice. Let's give them one.
Mel Tull
Candidate for Congress (VA-01)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Judge Chris Taylor's general election is less than one month away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260308-1175&t=1&akid=1202%2E294397%2EIJQDiX)
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260308_1_ak.a9xm12&amount=10&refcode=em20260308-1175&t=3&akid=1202%2E294397%2EIJQDiX)
Hi there,
I’m reaching out today because Judge Chris Taylor’s general election is less than one month away, and we can’t afford to leave anything to chance.
[**Before I say more, will you join me in supporting her campaign by chipping in $10 now?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260308_1_ak.a9xm12&amount=10&refcode=em20260308-1175&t=4&akid=1202%2E294397%2EIJQDiX)
You’ve seen how competitive these races are.
Last year, the Wisconsin Supreme Court majority was nearly flipped by right-wing special interests and billionaires like Elon Musk trying to buy a seat on the bench.
Now, they’re eyeing up Judge Chris Taylor’s race, and we’re expecting them to spend _big_ once again to try and install someone who will put their extreme agenda ahead of our rights.
That’s why I’m all in for Chris.
From her years as a public servant to her work on the bench, she’s spent her whole career standing up for people and protecting our freedoms. She’s fair. She’s tough. And she’s exactly the kind of justice we need on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
**But this race won’t be won on values alone. It’s going to take a strong, people-powered movement to fight back — and that's where you can make an impact.**
[**Can you chip in $10 to fuel Judge Chris Taylor's campaign as we head into the final stretch?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260308_1_ak.a9xm12&amount=10&refcode=em20260308-1175&t=5&akid=1202%2E294397%2EIJQDiX)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260308_1_ak.a9xm12&amount=10&refcode=em20260308-1175&t=24&akid=1202%2E294397%2EIJQDiX)**
Thanks for being in this fight with us.
— Tammy

clean_body: Hi there, I’m reaching out today because Judge Chris Taylor’s general election is less than one month away, and we can’t afford to leave anything to chance. You’ve seen how competitive these races are. Last year, the Wisconsin Supreme Court majority was nearly flipped by right-wing special interests and billionaires like Elon Musk trying to buy a seat on the bench. Now, they’re eyeing up Judge Chris Taylor’s race, and we’re expecting them to spend big once again to try and install someone who will put their extreme agenda ahead of our rights. That’s why I’m all in for Chris. From her years as a public servant to her work on the bench, she’s spent her whole career standing up for people and protecting our freedoms. She’s fair. She’s tough. And she’s exactly the kind of justice we need on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. But this race won’t be won on values alone. It’s going to take a strong, people-powered movement to fight back — and that's where you can make an impact. Thanks for being in this fight with us. — Tammy

name: James Carville
subject: Pete Hegseth’s massive mistake:

body:

Last year, Pete Hegseth shamelessly removed Nancy Lacore from her position as Chief of Navy Reserve.
She was a three-star vice admiral with thirty-five years of service and thousands of sailors under her command, but they just showed her to the door for NO REASON.
That tells you everything you need to know about Republicans’ hare-brained leadership. Experience and integrity don’t matter if you don’t fall in line.
But everyday folks are tired of this chaos. They’re exhausted by the noise. And they’re FED UP with Republican leaders who prioritize pageantry over delivering real results.
Luckily, Nancy’s running for Congress to restore honor, integrity, and commitment.
She’s the leader we deserve – we NEED – in South Carolina’s First District. And if you’re serious about flipping the House and restoring integrity in Congress, will you split $25 to support Nancy’s campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
DONATE NOW TO HELP NANCY FLIP THIS SEAT! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
Pete Hegseth made a massive mistake in removing Nancy Lacore.
And it’s going to backfire – BIG TIME.
Because SC-01 will be one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the country this cycle. This race could easily decide control of Congress.
Luckily, Nancy isn’t the type to back down from a challenge.
She has the grit, discipline, and credibility to not only win this race but deliver for South Carolina.
And Republicans are going to throw serious money into this race for that reason. That’s why grassroots support matters so much. The stakes couldn’t be higher.
So, I’ll ask again: will you split a donation of $25, $50, or whatever you can spare between Resist Reclaim Rebuild and Nancy’s campaign to help them flip this must-win seat and help take back the House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
CHIP IN TO DEFEAT PETE HEGSETH'S ROTTEN SCHEME! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
They tried to push her out. Let’s send her to Congress instead.
– James Carville

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/64915a26-b212-4ddf-8944-3394bfb83754?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

[Pledge your support](https://substack..AAPfhFUZUKevPpDizYvVdVk9piiJpLAlglP1QFanbDQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=190310237)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=190310237&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkwMzEwMjM3LCJpYXQiOjE3NzI5OTc1NjIsImV4cCI6MTc3NTU4OTU2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.bj4Gn3VW_p75qq6Lp698cFSdSFIhnmr9I0NwGrDFe4Y)

Spring has arrived in Connecticut. Flowers are blooming, birds are returning, and communities are beginning to shake off the long winter.

But in Hartford, critics say something else is happening: the legislature appears to be leaping over the public hearing process while advancing major policy changes affecting healthcare, homeowners, and local control.

Several proposals moving this legislative session have raised concerns among parents and property owners across the state and across so many other areas of public concern.

**Vaccine Policy Debates**

A number of healthcare proposals involve vaccination policies, public health authority, and medical decision-making.

Supporters say these policies are necessary to protect public health and ensure high vaccination rates.

Opponents argue they could expand state authority over decisions traditionally made by families and physicians, particularly when it comes to school requirements and medical consent.

Parents are focused on vaccines and other medical issues as to who ultimately controls medical decisions affecting their children.
The concern is that these vaccine mandates and schedules will be expanded well beyond school age children to adults.
**These bills are HB5044 and SB450**

**Housing and Homeowner Mandates**

At the same time, several housing bills are drawing attention from homeowners and local officials concerned about statewide mandates overriding local zoning.

One of the most discussed proposals is HB5507, which addresses Accessory Dwelling Units (ADUs) and could limit enforcement of certain deed restrictions.

Critics argue this could affect HOA covenants, neighborhood planning agreements, and local development decisions.

Other proposals could alter zoning review processes, historic district oversight, and municipal infrastructure reporting requirements.

Supporters say these measures are intended to increase housing availability and streamline development.

Opponents say they risk eroding local planning authority and community input.

**Leaders Raising Concerns**

Some lawmakers have urged caution and transparency as these debates move forward.

**[State Rep. Tracy Marra](https://substack.com/redirect/1b5ab41a-734f-4f53-9e0a-1a0d86a7d723?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** has been one of the strongest voices warning against sweeping statewide mandates that override local decision-making.

**Marra** has argued that issues affecting housing density, infrastructure, and community planning should involve direct participation from municipalities and residents, not top-down mandates from Hartford.

_She has emphasized that major policy shifts deserve full public debate and transparency before being enacted._

Another voice in the conversation is **Sen. Ryan Fazio** , who has advocated for greater government transparency and accountability as the legislature considers major policy changes.

**The Bigger Question**

At the heart of the debate is a broader question facing Connecticut:

How should the state balance public policy goals with local control, parental authority, and community input?

Spring is often a season of renewal and fresh beginnings.

But for many residents watching the legislative session unfold, the concern is whether Hartford is moving too quickly on policies that affect families and neighborhoods across Connecticut.

If so, this spring may be the time for citizens to step forward -- because when government appears ready to jump ahead, the public must jump in and make their voices heard.

**📣 What Can You Do?**

If you are actually concerned about vaccine mandates, housing policies, or the legislative process in Hartford, here are several ways you can take action and encourage your friends and neighbors to do the same:

**1 ️⃣ Testify at Public Hearings**

Public testimony becomes part of the official legislative record and helps lawmakers understand public concerns.

You can:

• Speak during hearings (in person or online)
• Submit written testimony to legislative committees

Visit the Connecticut General Assembly website to participate at - [https://cga.ct.gov/](https://substack.com/redirect/4462fdec-673d-4f0b-88c3-dfedf88b714b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**2 ️⃣ Contact Your Legislators**

Your state senator and state representative represent you.

Let them know:

• Your views on vaccine mandates
• Your concerns about housing and zoning policies
• Whether you support or oppose specific bills

Legislators pay attention when constituents reach out.

**3 ️⃣ Inform Your Community**

Many residents are unaware of what is happening during the legislative session.

You can help by:

• Sharing information with neighbors and community groups and sharing this article
• Posting updates on social media
• Discussing the issues in local civic organizations

Public awareness drives accountability.

**4 ️⃣ Stay Engaged**

Legislation can move quickly during the session.

Stay informed by:

• Following committee agendas
• Tracking bills on the Connecticut General Assembly website
[https://cga.ct.gov/](https://substack.com/redirect/4462fdec-673d-4f0b-88c3-dfedf88b714b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
• Participating in public discussions about state policy

Active citizens help ensure government remains responsive.

**The Bottom Line**

Spring may be arriving across Connecticut, but the legislative session is moving fast.

For residents who care about healthcare policy, parental rights, local zoning, and public transparency, this may be the moment to step forward.

Because if Hartford appears ready to leap ahead this spring, the public may need to jump in and make sure their voices are heard.

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: My Grandfather’s Wisconsin Experience
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
Back in the day...
| Hi, After serving in World War II, my grandfather returned to Milwaukee and got a job at A.O. Smith. He walked out over 30 years later with a comfortable retirement that allowed him to continue to support his family and travel with me. That’s not a reality anymore as wealthy out-of-state corporations have shipped jobs overseas. Today, the Wisconsin I grew up in is unrecognizable. The American dream is simply out of reach for too many of us, and it’s not an accident how this happened. For years, the Washington way of politics has delivered record profits for billionaires and large corporations... while everyday people can hardly afford their healthcare or groceries. This is a clear indictment of our economy — career politicians have been catering to their wealthy special interests instead of working families. **It’s time we fully fund our schools and cut taxes for the middle class.** Wisconsinites deserve leaders who will fight for a bold future and innovative solutions. Having served as a State Assemblymember and Lieutenant Governor, I’m ready to step up to the plate as governor. [But this race is a toss-up, with Republicans closing in on huge dark money checks so they can maintain the status quo – can I count on your support to help us fight back?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-mar26.Ye988L&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_030826_B1_Personal&t=2&akid=5908%2E196590%2EwBVg31) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=mb-em-fr-mar26.5CO-cQ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_030826_B1_Personal&t=3&akid=5908%2E196590%2EwBVg31)

It’s deeply unfair that so many working families have played by the rules their whole lives but are still struggling to get ahead.
Our farmers are being priced out of the market because of erratic trade policy coming out of Washington.
And our young people are facing record debts for their education, while new job opportunities are drying up.
We can tackle these challenges together with bold, innovative policies that meet this moment — but I’ll need your help to do it. subject: Democrats Are SCARED of Our Ground Game!

| | Patriot,
---
Let me be straight with you: **Democrats are terrified of us right now.**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8256502/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2Jfc2ZtY19ici12dGdfYnJfMjAyNjAzMDgv/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDg/LbmNsYmdCU2FEWA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI1OTlfd3Ix/gaa3MaQ/s5jb61cc1d2)
Our ground game is working. Early primary wins for Turning Point PAC-endorsed candidates prove it, real conservatives advancing because our ballot chasers, voter registration teams, and precinct warriors are out there every day, delivering results in the districts that matter most.
They see it. They know we're building the biggest grassroots army in history. And they're scared.
**That's why they're turning to sabotage and dirty tricks:**

* Blasting DNC texts warning people away from our voter registration drives in key states.

* Coordinating attacks funded by international sources that despise Trump and everything we stand for.

* Pushing vote-center schemes, same-day registration without ID, and other changes that open the door to fraud and undermine our clean, citizen-only turnout efforts.

This isn't a coincidence. This is panic. They can't beat us at the ballot box when we play fair, so they're trying to rig the game before we get there.
**[We can't let them succeed.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8256502/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2Jfc2ZtY19ici12dGdfYnJfMjAyNjAzMDgv/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDg/LbmNsYmdCU2FEWA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI1OTlfd3Ix/gaa3MaQ/s5jb61cc1d2)**
Our ballot chasers and volunteers are ready to WIN this year: Chasing more votes, registering more conservatives, and locking in America First majorities. But we need your help to scale up, counter their dirty plays, and take this fight to the next level.
**[Your support right now funds the ground game that exposes their schemes and delivers victories.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8256502/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2Jfc2ZtY19ici12dGdfYnJfMjAyNjAzMDgv/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDg/LbmNsYmdCU2FEWA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI1OTlfd3Ix/gaa3MaQ/s5jb61cc1d2)**

Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
| | **_Paid for by Turning Point PAC_**

name: Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
The Left is cashing in on their years-long scheme to throw an 81-year-old man in prison for the rest of his days!
The Left is cashing in on their years-long scheme to throw an 81 year-old man in prison for the rest of his days!
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10397633/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZEdnQU1HVktyRA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAzMDg/LbmNsZXpCU3lSNA/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTR3FQaGxLcGdscw/gaa3Mjg/s9k0b54618b)

| Patriot,
---
In one of the most violent jails in America, the Democrats’ Deep State goons had me unjustly **BOOKED** as # 2313757.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---
[BOOKING # 2313757](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

My “crimes?”
---
_\- Defending my good friend and a true patriot, President Donald J. Trump
\- Refusing to turn away from what I knew (and has since been _PROVEN_) to be RIGHT and TRUE
\- And exposing the Deep State _
---
Make no mistake, the Democrats had every intention of throwing me in a prison cell as an innocent man for the rest of my life.
---
And just like President Trump, with patriots like you at my side, we’ve fought their sham charges tooth and nail and PROVED we would _**never surrender**_.
---
But even now – __three_ _years_ _later__ – the Left is _still_ hellbent on jailing me for life.
---
**A vengeful Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
Make no mistake, these vindictive radicals are cashing in on what they see as their **_LAST_ _SHOT_** to **JAIL** an 81 year-old man for the rest of his years!
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, so believe me when I say that I’m reaching out today because _YOU_ are my last hope – my Hail Mary play to defeat these bogus charges.
---
**The Democrats have already STRIPPED me of my law licenses, pushed me to the point of BANKRUPTCY, and will not stop until they see me finished!**
---
They know full well that the kind of legal defense it will take to beat these phony charges has to be the best of the best...
---
_...And they also know that it won’t come cheap._
---
_**Why else do you think they worked so hard to force me to bankruptcy?**_
---
There’s just no way around it... My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to defeat these charges and WIN this trial is patriots like _YOU_.
---
**That’s why I’ve officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Democrats' vindictive attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**
---
_And now, I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to maximize our ability to FIGHT BACK._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Defense Trust to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Defense Trust
---

---
Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Haley Stevens
subject: The women who paved the way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan
body:
On Michigan leaders, my mom, and the shoulders I stand on today.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.cx5SXlTs_RelOPBH2ElR5QEXQzCX4cfKs0ra-VwQXms?) for more
---
# [The women who paved the way](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=190032846&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkwMDMyODQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3NzI5OTg0NjYsImV4cCI6MTc3NTU5MDQ2NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XgcO3cbn0DTx1jcHDShVvmBQmuEpYmKLOCWHyf_Aw9U)
### On Michigan leaders, my mom, and the shoulders I stand on today.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Mar 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..m4paWZHrEwqqA7VMed37QCi6FrbQsgAdK3jMumRCQgc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/the-women-who-paved-the-way?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

**Today is International Women 's Day, and I've been thinking about the Michigan women who helped shape the person I am today.**
I feel incredibly lucky to live and work in a state with so many extraordinary women in leadership. These are women who stepped up, spoke out, and fought for their communities - even when the path wasn't easy.
Here's the truth: **Michigan women have been leading the way for a long time.**
Back in 1918, women in Michigan won the right to vote - two years before the 19th Amendment was ratified nationwide.
That tells you everything you need to know about this state. **It 's the Michigan way.**
Those are the shoulders I stand on today.
I think about leaders like**Sen. Debbie Stabenow** , who has spent decades fighting for Michigan's families, farmers, and workers.
I think about **Gov. Gretchen Whitmer** , whose grit and determination have helped lead our state through some of its toughest moments.
I think about**Mayor Mary Sheffield** , who recently made history as the first woman elected as mayor of Detroit.
And I think about **Sen. Elissa Slotkin** , who has never backed down from standing up for Michigan and always putting country before politics.
These women have helped define what leadership looks like in our state.
**And on a more personal level, I think about my mom.**
She and my dad ran a small business here in Michigan. I grew up watching her work long hours, raise a family, and show up for our community day after day.
She's an artist, my friend, and still one of my biggest inspirations.
When I look at the women who paved the way for my generation - here in Michigan and across the country - I'm filled with gratitude.
**But I 'm also reminded that progress never happens by accident. Every step forward happened because someone fought for it.**
Someone spoke up. Someone ran for office. Someone refused to accept that things had to stay the way they were.
Now it's our turn to keep that work going.
That's one of the reasons I decided to run for the United States Senate.
Because leadership matters. Who sits at the table matters. **And it 's up to us to make sure the next generation of women sees a future for themselves in public service.**
Today, on International Women's Day, I'm committed to making sure that path is even stronger for the women who come next.
If you believe in that work - in building a future where more women step into leadership and continue shaping the future of Michigan - I'd be grateful for your support today.
**[Truly, any contribution will help power this grassroots campaign and keep Michigan blue.](https://substack.com/redirect/c13b41eb-1aa4-4878-b855-6f0b9fcbeda9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/c13b41eb-1aa4-4878-b855-6f0b9fcbeda9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With gratitude,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/c13b41eb-1aa4-4878-b855-6f0b9fcbeda9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Alex Kelloff
subject: The one thing Jeff Hurd & I have in common
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-ak [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-ak]
Hey everyone —
This might surprise you, but Jeff Hurd and I actually have one thing in common: President Trump doesn’t want either of us to win this seat.
But for very different reasons.
Trump doesn’t want Jeff Hurd to win because he wasn’t loyal enough. When Hurd briefly broke ranks to vote against Trump’s disastrous tariffs and sided with Colorado families instead of party leadership, Trump pulled his endorsement to punish him.
Trump doesn’t want me to win because he knows I’ll be loyal to you — not billionaire donors, not party bosses, and certainly not Mar-a-Lago. I’m not running to serve the president, I’m running to serve Western and Southern Coloradans.
If you’re ready for independent leadership that actually fights for our freedoms, defends rural healthcare, protects our public lands, and puts CO-03 first, I need you with me. Pitch in today to help send a message that Coloradans can’t be bullied or bought. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2603-q1-ak]

clean_body: [] Hey everyone — This might surprise you, but Jeff Hurd and I actually have one thing in common: President Trump doesn’t want either of us to win this seat. But for very different reasons. Trump doesn’t want Jeff Hurd to win because he wasn’t loyal enough. When Hurd briefly broke ranks to vote against Trump’s disastrous tariffs and sided with Colorado families instead of party leadership, Trump pulled his endorsement to punish him. Trump doesn’t want me to win because he knows I’ll be loyal to you — not billionaire donors, not party bosses, and certainly not Mar-a-Lago. I’m not running to serve the president, I’m running to serve Western and Southern Coloradans. If you’re ready for independent leadership that actually fights for our freedoms, defends rural healthcare, protects our public lands, and puts CO-03 first, I need you with me. Pitch in today to help send a message that Coloradans can’t be bullied or bought. name: Team Jayapal
subject: Elon Musk’s secret web of companies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Elon Musk is using a secret network of 90 companies to mask his influence and pay for everything. We’re learning how to stop it.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260308-5984-footer&t=1&akid=5984%2E420207%2Eep1CRP)
Peter,
A new investigation from _the New York Times_ has just confirmed what we’ve known for a long time: Billionaires like Elon Musk are using a secret web of companies to mask their influence on democracy.
**In Texas alone, Musk has built a network of at least 90 companies, many of which are funding his political activism.**
This isn’t just about a luxury condo or a private jet. It’s about a billionaire avoiding public scrutiny while he buys his way into power.
[**If you’re ready to fight corruption, donate $3 to support the work Pramila is doing to build the resistance both inside and outside of Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260308.a21HXz&refcode=em20260308-5984&amount=3&t=2&akid=5984%2E420207%2Eep1CRP)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260308.a21HXz&amount=3&refcode=em20260308-5984&t=3&akid=5984%2E420207%2Eep1CRP)**
A _New York Times_ investigation revealed that Musk has used these companies to:
* **Disguise spending** covering up nearly $80 million in services for his America PAC

* **Amass land** using at least 12 different private entities – with names like "Three Little Pigs LLC" and "Gapped Bass LLC" – to buy up over 1,000 acres of land

* **Avoid transparency** , since private LLCs aren't subject to the same disclosure requirements as political committees

Musk is a textbook example of how the ultra-wealthy use corporations to shield themselves against any consequences as they work to dismantle our democracy.
We cannot allow one unelected billionaire to have so much influence over our government with next to no oversight. That’s why Pramila introduced the “Defund the Oligarchs, Fund the People” resolution, demanding Congress move with urgency to tax the rich and reinvest in the needs of working people.
[**Peter, if you’re ready to stand up against the billionaire takeover, will you contribute $3 to support Pramila’s work for the progressive movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260308.a21HXz&refcode=em20260308-5984&amount=3&t=4&akid=5984%2E420207%2Eep1CRP)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260308.a21HXz&amount=3&refcode=em20260308-5984&t=23&akid=5984%2E420207%2Eep1CRP)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260308-5984-footer&t=24&refcode2=5984_420207_ep1CRP&akid=5984%2E420207%2Eep1CRP)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

**If Republicans want to set the precedent that Presidents must testify — then let’s apply it to everyone.**
They’ve opened the door.
**Now we’re demanding that Donald Trump come before the House Oversight Committee and answer questions under oath.**
For years, we’ve heard the same line: no one is above the law. But accountability can’t be selective. It can’t depend on party. And it can’t stop when the questions get uncomfortable.
**Trump appears alongside Jeffrey Epstein and Ghislaine Maxwell more than almost anyone else in the public record.** That fact alone demands scrutiny. The American people deserve answers — not deflection, not outrage theatrics, not partisan spin.
But pushing for real oversight against powerful interests takes resources — and it takes public pressure.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126925122/606393338/-1589908082?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.03.08_Paid-Leave_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzcxYWU0Ny0yODFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUd7hm_okgHHyT6SMG0huGXfc-A1QZNPkyEgte-_sgo=&emci=d2a22f2d-bd18-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=f771ae47-281b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=7659029) Folks, this is unacceptable. **Nearly 27 million U.S. workers do not have access to paid sick leave. **

[**_That’s why I’ve introduced the Healthy Families Act, legislation that would guarantee access to paid sick leave for every American. I need 100 supporters from Ohio to sign our petition demanding that the Senate support Universal Paid Sick Leave. Will you sign now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126925123/606393340/-1589908082?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.03.08_Paid-Leave_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzcxYWU0Ny0yODFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUd7hm_okgHHyT6SMG0huGXfc-A1QZNPkyEgte-_sgo=&emci=d2a22f2d-bd18-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=f771ae47-281b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=7659029) | | [ ADD MY NAME: I SUPPORT UNIVERSAL PAID SICK LEAVE >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126925125/606393341/-1589908082?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.03.08_Paid-Leave_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzcxYWU0Ny0yODFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUd7hm_okgHHyT6SMG0huGXfc-A1QZNPkyEgte-_sgo=&emci=d2a22f2d-bd18-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=f771ae47-281b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=7659029)

That means that millions of Americans who are recovering from an illness, have a sick child or family member, or are seeking preventative care, are forced to make an impossible choice: protect their health or their paycheck.

No one should risk losing income just to take care of themselves or someone they love. That’s why I’m introducing the Healthy Families Act, a bill that would guarantee access to paid sick time off.

Republicans are refusing to support any bill that would help our working-class families, so we need to put pressure on every GOP Senator to pass this common-sense bill.

[**_I still need 100 supporters from Ohio to sign our petition demanding the Senate support Universal Paid Sick Leave. Will you sign now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126925126/606393342/-1589908082?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.03.08_Paid-Leave_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzcxYWU0Ny0yODFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UUd7hm_okgHHyT6SMG0huGXfc-A1QZNPkyEgte-_sgo=&emci=d2a22f2d-bd18-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&emdi=f771ae47-281b-f111-a69a-000d3a1f0a97&ceid=7659029)

name: Team Emerge
subject: The states leading on women’s representation all share this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVEMR/1/81321/images/emergeemailheader.jpeg]
Friends,
This Women’s History Month, we’re taking a moment to reflect on the progress women have made in politics—and the role Emerge is playing in moving that progress forward.
Today, 2,480 women serve in state legislatures nationwide—about 32% of all lawmakers. That’s real progress, but we’re still far from equal representation. And none of that progress happened by accident. It’s the result of intentional work—recruiting women, training them, and supporting them every step of the way.
You can see that impact most clearly in the states leading the country.
In Colorado , New Mexico, and Nevada —the three states with the highest levels of women’s representation—women now hold 50% or more of legislative seats. And Emerge women are a big part of that story. Our alums aren’t just showing up—they’re leading, governing, and shaping what’s possible.
That’s what Emerge is all about. We’re not just training candidates—we’re changing who holds power.
And we’re just getting started.
Looking ahead to 2026, hundreds of Emerge women are already on the ballot in key races across the country—many of which will decide legislative majorities and shape policy for years to come.
The progress we’re celebrating this month is the result of long-term investment. And what happens next depends on what we do right now.
If we want to see more women in power, we have to keep building—and keep winning.
Will you invest in Emerge today to help recruit, train, and elect the next generation of women leaders?
CONTRIBUTE NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emerge-2026-email?refcode=3-8]
Because when Emerge women run, they win—and they change what leadership looks like.
With gratitude,
Team Emerge

Peter,

I've got to come clean. The Left hasn't been hiding in the closet anymore. They're closing in on FULL-BLOWN COMMUNISM at this point.

Last year, they elected at least two communists in HUGE ELECTIONS. Zohran Mamdani in NYC could be the first ever Radical Islamic Communist in power and Abigail Spanberger in Virginia gave an anti-American and pro-communist response to President Trump's SOTU speech.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

[ stdin# ]Jocelyn Benson for Governor
A new poll
shows our campaign is ahead by three points in the race for governor.

The truth is, we always knew this race was going to be close. Races in
battleground states like Michigan always are.

My opponents are both being funded by billionaire donors, and if we want
to stay in the lead, we need to keep reaching voters with the truth about
what’s at stake.

I have a proven track record of winning in Michigan, but the work to get
volunteers on the ground, ads on the air, and literature in mailboxes all
takes real resources.

That’s why we’ve launched our biggest fundraising goal yet for this month.

name: Tobias Read
subject: We might have won this round. But there are more fights ahead.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260308em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260308em]
The legal fight over President Trump’s attempt to deploy National Guard troops into Portland — over the objections of Oregon leaders — is officially over.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260308em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260308em]
Let’s be clear about what this means: A federal judge found that the president’s justification for sending troops into our city was unfounded.
She said it violated federal law and the Constitution. And when the case went up on appeal, the federal government dropped it — because they knew they were going to lose.
That is a win for Oregon, the rule of law, and constitutional limits on federal power. And it is proof that when Oregon stands up, we can stop overreach.
But we can’t give up the fight yet. Now more than ever before, we need to continue holding President Trump’s feet to the flames to ensure that this would-be dictator’s plans never succeed. Can I count on you to step up with $10 or more right now to help us keep up the fight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260308em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260308em]
As Secretary of State, my responsibility is not just to run secure elections — it’s to defend the constitutional structure that makes those elections meaningful.
But defending Oregon’s democratic institutions requires vigilance, resources, and the ability to respond immediately if lines are crossed again.
So please understand: While we might have won this round, we cannot assume it’s the last fight we’ll have with this lawless administration.
If you believe Oregon should never be treated as a testing ground for unchecked federal power, I’m asking you to step up. Please contribute today to help us stay prepared, protect Oregon’s democratic institutions, and ensure that when overreach comes, we are ready to meet it. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260308em]
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: Powered by Love, fueled by you.
body:
We asked, you answered. Here’s how we move forward. | | | Last year, the government set aside a staggering $85 billion for ICE. **$85 BILLION****, Peter.** Imagine how our country could transform if this money were invested in our neighborhoods, healthcare, housing, schools, and parks, rather than used to separate families. **We asked our members what they would build with those resources, and the visions for our future were powerful:**
* "A safe place for everyone.”
* “Subsidized childcare, free higher ed, regulations to limit capitalist greed, money for childcare workers and domestic laborers and farm workers!”
* "I want those resources invested into parks, public libraries, and affordable housing."
* **And for many, the answer was simple:** _"Literally anything else."_

While the government continues to fund hate, fear, and separation, we’re choosing love and connection. As of right now, **128 people have already committed to organizing events** as part of our **Powered by Love Letter Writing** campaign. These organizers are gathering friends and family to write letters to our immigrant neighbors in detention, reminding them that they’re seen, heard, and never alone. [**We have the vision. We have 128 organizers ready to lead. Now, we need the resources to keep this fight going. Will you donate $20 or anything you can today to help us fight for a future where our billions are invested in our people, not in deportation and
