clean_body: We asked, you answered. Here’s how we move forward. | | | Last year, the government set aside a staggering $85 billion for ICE. $85 BILLION, Peter. Imagine how our country could transform if this money were invested in our neighborhoods, healthcare, housing, schools, and parks, rather than used to separate families. We asked our members what they would build with those resources, and the visions for our future were powerful: "A safe place for everyone.” “Subsidized childcare, free higher ed, regulations to limit capitalist greed, money for childcare workers and domestic laborers and farm workers!” "I want those resources invested into parks, public libraries, and affordable housing." And for many, the answer was simple: "Literally anything else." While the government continues to fund hate, fear, and separation, we’re choosing love and connection. As of right now, 128 people have already committed to organizing events as part of our Powered by Love Letter Writing campaign. These organizers are gathering friends and family to write letters to our immigrant neighbors in detention, reminding them that they’re seen, heard, and never alone. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Every dollar helps us provide the tools, training, and support our organizers need to turn these visions into a reality. Let’s build a world that is truly Powered by Love. Thank you, Matias, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Here’s something you should see...

When you work with a team full of some of the best traders in the business, it doesn’t take long before someone uncovers something so simple... so repeatable... and so effective, it forces me to stop what I’m doing and pay attention.

That’s exactly what happened when Thomas Wood showed me the [Opening Bell Trade](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=a550755fd5ce4f5eb04e575548874889&_e=hwVgmKgxQq4p1gMvw5Vjjcoqx5YYC2sdY41dK-UTtgECj6sCBxplr-dEzpaDKguQp836p5AezHtX1kzF0zpXG4tIqrxuJ62Ng_NCUsMmJqIvE0Wy6FY-AYdYRsS4LawUe2aNYFiMeIfHdwm_itdBmSYLTCGnWWmyYzM8MBftRouA853VeEoQnRqXScog3W-p-yYOUOUX4J8h1eMQAWvtOh7LanaKrmsjexl1OzchaAIadI39fGzejcMGHEwOEXxxHl4jT5kOzf909Eia81EKvLhN4CUkWF86N72pjy3UjXrGg24z7ibSHrwqJ-QGRHUkCRt7xLcfsB1e6ZpZt2bE7fm5t8GcZMZ-yeLBn0qVkxSnmEk2GfET0eBM758Je9twWSnD33JqU97xawalBKrSwd7Jc-uyBRAkkA_jXtJYgCeZtat3pxtbOl06KBk1M7sTe0rYXdohpPQQ0UveftiC1JnjyB8Ea0zEwxx3q7Ykn66xb4CFf6-OftLVDtpc5QuzJ9KJa-Vrvn-DxF7pCN4uYoYt75lcR7oN-mw4MI2-C6LOjvEHa99q8XkW-xak2JJi5wQVqEFzOd6ZKSwilZGzpHbaVUEsWosbHAsUwiALVz4cVKdIkiK9IatOO6DkIr1F) he’s been using to pull triple‐digit wins out of the market before most investors have even poured their second cup of coffee.

I’m talking about real trades that have delivered gains like:

113% on GOOGL
240% on META
70% on CAG
37% on MCD
139% on GLD

And here’s the part most people will never believe until they see it for themselves:

It’s one setup.
One pattern.
One repeatable moment that appears almost every morning.

By 10 AM, he’s done.

clean_body: When you work with a team full of some of the best traders in the business, it doesn’t take long before someone uncovers something so simple... so repeatable... and so effective, it forces me to stop what I’m doing and pay attention.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Here’s something you should see... * * *
Mexico grabbed the world's attention once again after an operation was carried out to capture Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, also known as El Mencho. He was a high-profile target for the United States and Mexico since he was the leader of the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, one of the largest and most violent groups in Mexico.
According to official reports, Mencho died from his wounds while being transferred to Mexico City. It did not take long before territory controlled by CJNG was thrown into chaos with sicarios setting fires and attacking Mexican military and law enforcement. From Puerto Vallarta all the way up to the U.S.-Mexico border, violent clashes and acts of arson were carried out by CJNG gunmen.
The most recent time such a violent reaction took place was the "Culiacanazo," when the Sinaloa Cartel mobilized and fought with the Mexican military in Culiacan after one of El Chapo's sons was arrested in 2023. Since he was still alive, the Sinaloa Cartel threatened even greater violence unless he was released. Then-President Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador ordered the release of Ovidio Guzman.
CJNG lost such leverage with the death of El Mencho. The best they could do was create chaos and kill to take revenge. While the Mexican government has mostly restored order to the affected areas, there are still ongoing battles. The question remains if there will be another big show of power from CJNG once they regroup.
_**A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**_

Dear Reader,
NASA is going back to the moon... And they're trying to wriggle out of a deal with SpaceX to help them get there.
Elon Musk is hitting back HARD... and he has the ultimate trump card. He's been granted full access to NASA's files... Which means he knows everything... including **[NASA's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/009f3e96-0911-426c-99b9-4196ceabd8da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
Of all the conspiracies surrounding the Apollo moon landing missions... **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/009f3e96-0911-426c-99b9-4196ceabd8da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** may be the most shocking.
They've kept it a secret for decades... But you can finally get the full truth by **[clicking here now](https://substack.com/redirect/009f3e96-0911-426c-99b9-4196ceabd8da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/009f3e96-0911-426c-99b9-4196ceabd8da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. They want to keep **[this secret](https://substack.com/redirect/009f3e96-0911-426c-99b9-4196ceabd8da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** buried... so there's no telling what they'll do to stop **[this video](https://substack.com/redirect/009f3e96-0911-426c-99b9-4196ceabd8da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Watch it now while it's still available.
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
While the Mexican government was able to successfully remove El Mencho from the board, thanks in part to American intelligence, the country will now have to deal with a significant power vacuum within one of the largest cartels. This has been a common problem whenever Mexico does a takedown of a top leader: factions within a cartel start to fight each other to consolidate their power or their rivals move in to take advantage of the group's weakened state.
So now areas that typically saw almost no major acts of violence, because the cartel was in total control of the region, are the site of new battlegrounds. For example, two major factions within the Sinaloa Cartel have been fighting each other for months after Ismael "El Mayo" Zambada-Garcia was flown to the United States to be arrested in an elaborate ruse.
Even if the targeted cartel eventually disintegrates, another takes its places and carries on business as usual.
Mexican cartels and the territory they hold are hard to keep track of. Factions and alliances can shift as often as the seasons change. Leaders come and go, for one reason or another, and it seems like there is no end in sight. As long as Americans buy highly-addictive drugs from criminal groups in Mexico, who are more than happy to supply them, on and on it will continue.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Their end goal with mail-in voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Trump’s order is the culmination of years of attacks on absentee ballots and vote-by-mail. In the months before the 2020 election, Trump repeatedly spread disinformation and conspiracy theories about the legitimacy of mail-in ballots as he campaigned for reelection. With MAGA angling for total control, Trump wants to end their use forever.
Fuel our work with $35 or more right now to help defend the use of mail-in ballots across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=030826_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: With New Order, Trump Tries to Kill Off Vote By Mail [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=030826_2&amount=25]
We're going to keep hammering this home, Team, because the mainstream media continues to ignore this executive order and how it will change our elections forever.
President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order has sent lawmakers, election officials, and voting rights advocates into a frenzy. One provision focuses on a goal that for years has been a borderline obsession for MAGA: Cracking down on voting by mail .
For background: After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day.
So of course, this order directs Attorney General Pam Bondi to “ take all necessary action ” against any states that count absentee or mail-in ballots received after Election Day.
This order makes it clear that the MAGA crew will do anything they can to codify their power permanently and silence the will of the people by suppressing and eliminating the votes we cast.
We've got to keep fighting and work to protect our elections and our fundamental right to vote. Step up with $35 or whatever you can today and help us defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=030826_2&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=030826_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=030826_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=030826_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=030826_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=030826_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=030826_2&amount=35]
We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections . Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.
Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure , mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. It's been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.
Our partners at VoteAmerica said it best: “ There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access, reject ballots without postmarks, or refuse to count ballots that arrive after Election Day. If the administration moves forward with these proposals, they will effectively disenfranchise older voters, rural voters, and military voters. ”
Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Will you chip in $35 or whatever you can to fight their unending desire for control and protect mail-in voting? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=030826_2&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=030826_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=030826_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

Step up with $35 or whatever you can today and help us defend vote by mail across the country >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections . Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail. Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure , mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. It's been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic. Our partners at VoteAmerica said it best: “ There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access, reject ballots without postmarks, or refuse to count ballots that arrive after Election Day. If the administration moves forward with these proposals, they will effectively disenfranchise older voters, rural voters, and military voters. ” Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Will you chip in $35 or whatever you can to fight their unending desire for control and protect mail-in voting? >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: True the Vote
subject: LegiTrack is live! | Your walkthough and invitation to join!
body:
Pray. Serve. Vote.
| | | March 08, 2026 | [**Read Online**](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/8kux2dwlvquoh2dpoe0fkhkgq737kb3hkx9g5/e0hph7h76rqx0ga8/aHR0cHM6Ly9ja2FyY2hpdmUuY29tL2IvOGt1cWhvaDJkcG9lMGYzbjY2bW5xZmtncTczN2R1M2hreDlnNQ==) |
---
Hi Friend —
In case you missed it, [**LegiTrack**](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/8kux2dwlvquoh2dpoe0fkhkgq737kb3hkx9g5/7qh7h8h9qnwgo2hz/aHR0cHM6Ly9sZWdpdHJhY2sub3Jn)**is live**! We built this web app as a bill-tracking tool to empower freedom-minded citizens to engage with and influence election integrity through the legislative process.
If you haven't checked it out yet, here's what you can expect to see:
---
### Legislation Counter
**Legislation can move fast or, like the SAVE Act, it can stagnate — either way, you need to know.** Since our initial v1 update, hundreds of additional bills have been introduced — and new ones appear almost every day. This snapshot offers a quick look at how many election-related bills LegiTrack is tracking, how many legislatures are currently in session, and how many tracked bills have already passed:

---
### Learn
The legislative process is confusing. If legislative processes feel overwhelming, the Learn module can be a great place to dive in. LegiTrack is filled with resources to help you understand the process and engage with confidence. Under [**Learn**](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/8kux2dwlvquoh2dpoe0fkhkgq737kb3hkx9g5/owhkhqhwpqgzr2av/aHR0cHM6Ly9sZWdpdHJhY2sub3JnL2xlYXJuLw==), you’ll find a collection of LegiTrack-specific toolkits to guide you step by step:
|
---
| **Bill basics:** Step-by-step guides designed to help you use LegiTrack effectively — from understanding bill movement to knowing when and how citizens can engage in the legislative process.
* * *
**TTV resources you already know (and more!):** Trusted TTV materials paired with new toolkits designed to help you take action, stay engaged, and grow confident in your efforts — inside and outside session.
* * *
**Foundational good-to-knows:** Essential background on federal election law, voter registration frameworks, and constitutional principles that shape how elections are governed across the states.
### Bill Tracker 101
Behind the [**login**](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/8kux2dwlvquoh2dpoe0fkhkgq737kb3hkx9g5/p8heh9h4mqgvzpuq/aHR0cHM6Ly9sZWdpdHJhY2sub3JnL3NpZ24tdXAv) is the full bill tracker. Filter by state, federal (US), and/or bill stage:

---
Hover over any bill for a brief description of its content to help you decide if you want to explore more:

---
For every bill, you can select **Learn More** :

---
This is where you will find full details on every Bill 👉 Title, Summary, Latest Action and History, and the Full Bill Text*:
_*Note: Full Bill Text comes directly from the legislature. Since bill numbers may be reused in new sessions, we recommend accessing the source through LegiTrack to ensure accuracy._
---
### Only the Start...
As you explore LegiTrack, remember that this is just the beginning. The platform will continue to grow as new legislation is introduced and additional tools and resources are added.
**And, we're bringing back the weekly Lunch and Learns to talk LegiTrack, Elections, and Voters' Rights! Dates will be announced soon!**
We encourage you to take some time to explore the tracker, review the learning resources, and familiarize yourself with how legislation moves in your state. And as always, [your feedback](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/8kux2dwlvquoh2dpoe0fkhkgq737kb3hkx9g5/x0hph6heoq9gwmf5/aHR0cHM6Ly90cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmcvY29udGFjdA==) helps make LegiTrack stronger for everyone. If you have questions, ideas, or notice something that could be improved, please don’t hesitate to reach out.
Being an advocate for election integrity is not an easy path, but it is imperative that we walk it now, together, with an eye towards the future. Stay the course. We are right beside you.
[](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/8kux2dwlvquoh2dpoe0fkhkgq737kb3hkx9g5/p8heh9h4mqgvzpuq/aHR0cHM6Ly9sZWdpdHJhY2sub3JnL3NpZ24tdXAv)_Click here to create your LegiTrack login!_
---
More soon! Keep the faith! Never quit! Ephesians 6 FTW!
Ever Onward!
| |
---
P.S. [If you’re able to support our work with a donation, please consider doing so](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/8kux2dwlvquoh2dpoe0fkhkgq737kb3hkx9g5/6qheh8hlz9nq7qbo/dHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3JnL2RvbmF0ZQ==). We are building tools and apps, hosting trainings, continuing the fight in the courts, and expanding our team to meet the moment. Every contribution helps move the work forward.

[Support the Mission](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/8kux2dwlvquoh2dpoe0fkhkgq737kb3hkx9g5/6qheh8hlz9nq7qbo/dHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3JnL2RvbmF0ZQ==)
---
**truethevote.org/donate**
| [](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.)[](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.)[](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.)[](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.) |
---
Update your [email preferences](https://preferences.kit-mail3.com/8kux2dwlvquoh2dpoe0fkhkgq737kb3hkx9g5) or unsubscribe [here](https://de717de0.unsubscribe.kit-mail3.com/8kux2dwlvquoh2dpoe0fkhkgq737kb3hkx9g5)

The legislative process is confusing. If legislative processes feel overwhelming, the Learn module can be a great place to dive in. LegiTrack is filled with resources to help you understand the process and engage with confidence. Under [**Learn**](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/zlu3pn52dgtnhk6re9vsphwg89q2ei6h728pl/p8heh9h4mqxkgzaq/aHR0cHM6Ly9sZWdpdHJhY2sub3JnL2xlYXJuLw==), you’ll find a collection of LegiTrack-specific toolkits to guide you step by step:
|
---
| **Bill basics:** Step-by-step guides designed to help you use LegiTrack effectively — from understanding bill movement to knowing when and how citizens can engage in the legislative process.
* * *
**TTV resources you already know (and more!):** Trusted TTV materials paired with new toolkits designed to help you take action, stay engaged, and grow confident in your efforts — inside and outside session.
* * *
**Foundational good-to-knows:** Essential background on federal election law, voter registration frameworks, and constitutional principles that shape how elections are governed across the states.
### Bill Tracker 101
Behind the [**login**](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/zlu3pn52dgtnhk6re9vsphwg89q2ei6h728pl/x0hph6heoq389eb5/aHR0cHM6Ly9sZWdpdHJhY2sub3JnL3NpZ24tdXAv) is the full bill tracker. Filter by state, federal (US), and/or bill stage:

---
Hover over any bill for a brief description of its content to help you decide if you want to explore more:

---
For every bill, you can select **Learn More** :

---
This is where you will find full details on every Bill 👉 Title, Summary, Latest Action and History, and the Full Bill Text*:
_*Note: Full Bill Text comes directly from the legislature. Since bill numbers may be reused in new sessions, we recommend accessing the source through LegiTrack to ensure accuracy._
---
### Only the Start...
As you explore LegiTrack, remember that this is just the beginning. The platform will continue to grow as new legislation is introduced and additional tools and resources are added.
**And, we're bringing back the weekly Lunch and Learns to talk LegiTrack, Elections, and Voters' Rights! Dates will be announced soon!**
We encourage you to take some time to explore the tracker, review the learning resources, and familiarize yourself with how legislation moves in your state. And as always, [your feedback](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/zlu3pn52dgtnhk6re9vsphwg89q2ei6h728pl/dpheh0hevp5z88hm/aHR0cHM6Ly90cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmcvY29udGFjdA==) helps make LegiTrack stronger for everyone. If you have questions, ideas, or notice something that could be improved, please don’t hesitate to reach out.
Being an advocate for election integrity is not an easy path, but it is imperative that we walk it now, together, with an eye towards the future. Stay the course. We are right beside you.
[](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/zlu3pn52dgtnhk6re9vsphwg89q2ei6h728pl/x0hph6heoq389eb5/aHR0cHM6Ly9sZWdpdHJhY2sub3JnL3NpZ24tdXAv)_Click here to create your LegiTrack login!_
---
More soon! Keep the faith! Never quit! Ephesians 6 FTW!
Ever Onward!
| |
---
P.S. [If you’re able to support our work with a donation, please consider doing so](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/zlu3pn52dgtnhk6re9vsphwg89q2ei6h728pl/e0hph7h76r49q4c8/dHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3JnL2RvbmF0ZQ==). We are building tools and apps, hosting trainings, continuing the fight in the courts, and expanding our team to meet the moment. Every contribution helps move the work forward.

[Support the Mission](https://de717de0.click.kit-mail3.com/zlu3pn52dgtnhk6re9vsphwg89q2ei6h728pl/e0hph7h76r49q4c8/dHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3JnL2RvbmF0ZQ==)
---

---
Update your [email preferences](https://preferences.kit-mail3.com/zlu3pn52dgtnhk6re9vsphwg89q2ei6h728pl) or unsubscribe [here](https://de717de0.unsubscribe.kit-mail3.com/zlu3pn52dgtnhk6re9vsphwg89q2ei6h728pl)

name: James Talarico
subject: Humbled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
The past few days have been a whirlwind. I’m humbled by the faith and trust you and the people of Texas put in me. I do not take the responsibility of leading this ticket in November lightly.
But I wanted to pause for a moment and tell you more about my decision to run for the U.S. Senate.
Before I was a politician, I was a public school teacher at a Title 1 middle school on the west side of San Antonio. Every day, my students struggled heroically to overcome poverty and systems designed to hold them back.
Growing up, I saw that same fight in my mother — a preacher’s daughter from Laredo who left home at 19. She moved up to Austin and met my birth father, whose drinking problem sometimes led to violence.
One night, he became abusive again, but that night, my mother’s love rose to meet it. She packed all our stuff into her little Ford Escort and took me to the hotel where she worked. The manager let us stay in one of the rooms until we found a small apartment of our own in East Austin.
Like my students, my mom was a fighter. And she passed that fighting spirit along to me.
I first ran for the Texas House in 2018 to fight for working people like my mom and my students. It was a race no one thought we could win, but together we flipped a district Donald Trump had won just two years earlier.
As a state legislator, I’ve led the fight against the billionaire mega-donors who have rigged the system against working Texans. And I’m the only member of the Texas Legislature who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money.
Now, as those same billionaire mega-donors take over the federal government, we need more fighters in Washington who will take power back for working people.
But they are going to spend limitless sums with dark money groups and super PACs to take me down.
**[If you care about this country, I’m asking you to contribute $5 to help us prepare for the fight ahead. It is going to require all of us to play a role to take back our state and our country.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-general-launch.jRB70q&refcode=em260308-1-ak&t=1&akid=492%2E1347274%2Esm51IT)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-general-launch.B1wSpG&refcode=em260308-1-ak&t=20&akid=492%2E1347274%2Esm51IT)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/505?c0=jt-em-general-launch.TWNADZ&refcode=em260308-1-ak&t=21&akid=492%2E1347274%2Esm51IT)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/498?c0=jt-em-general-launch.NcefoT&refcode=em260308-1-ak&t=22&akid=492%2E1347274%2Esm51IT)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/499?c0=jt-em-general-launch.1YLfZW&refcode=em260308-1-ak&t=23&akid=492%2E1347274%2Esm51IT)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/500?c0=jt-em-general-launch.oz57a9&refcode=em260308-1-ak&t=24&akid=492%2E1347274%2Esm51IT)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-general-launch.QhzC7g&refcode=em260308-1-ak&t=25&akid=492%2E1347274%2Esm51IT)**
---
****
Thank you for being by my side in this fight.
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=26&akid=492%2E1347274%2Esm51IT) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=27&refcode2=492_1347274_sm51IT&akid=492%2E1347274%2Esm51IT)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=492%2E1347274%2Esm51IT).

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hey Peter, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: **[Can you rush $5 to my reelection campaign today?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260308-2-f&t=1&akid=1797%2E5691347%2ETibu4g)
I am asking because winning this year is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule.
And I am the _only_ Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won.
That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in the midterms. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me.
**_There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.**_
So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, **for all of us.**
**[If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260308-2-f&t=2&akid=1797%2E5691347%2ETibu4g)
The campaign will be brutal.
_But this team wins the hardest battles._
We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible.
Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority.
And we will win again — with your help.
**[Please: send $5 to my reelection campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260308-2-f&t=3&akid=1797%2E5691347%2ETibu4g)
With gratitude,
Senator Jon Ossoff
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-mar26.B6mAX1&refcode=em260308-2-f&t=4&akid=1797%2E5691347%2ETibu4g)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=5&akid=1797%2E5691347%2ETibu4g) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1797%2E5691347%2ETibu4g) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

clean_body: I had to activate Operation Epic Fury. Will you stand STRONG with me? | | | | For many years, Iran wanted to bring DEATH to AMERICA. That’s why I had no other choice. __ In a strong and necessary move to protect our country, I launched Operation Epic Fury, a powerful military strike to stop Iran’s nuclear threat before they could put America and our allies in danger. This operation has been greatly successful. We even took out the corrupt Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. That’s what peace through strength looks like. Will you stand STRONG with me as I protect our country? Right now, I’m asking everyone who approves of Operation Epic Fury to rally behind me with incredible messages of support. Your words mean the world to me. With you by my side, we will make America safer, greater, and more powerful than anyone’s ever seen! Sincerely, President Donald J. Peter, April Street here. I wanted to reach out and wish you a happy International Women’s Day!

I have seen firsthand how much this campaign and this work are powered by the women around us. From organizing for Women for Street events to the volunteers, supporters, and community leaders who show up every day, this movement would not be possible without you.

Happy International Women’s Day,

April Street

name: Working Families Party
subject: You're paying to power ChatGPT and Claude.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Across the country, people are opening their electric bills and asking the same question: _Why am I paying more when I’m using the same amount of power?_ At the Working Families Party, we organize around the real challenges working people face — like the rising costs that make it harder to stay afloat, care for our families, and remain rooted in our communities. Right now, one issue keeps coming up everywhere: **the explosive growth of AI data centers and the damage they’re doing to where we live. 1** Massive data centers are driving up electricity demand — and utility companies are passing those costs directly onto us. At the same time, some communities are dealing with:
* Industrial-scale water use draining already scarce local supply2
* Rising carbon pollution3
* Constant industrial noise4 and loss of land zoned for homes or farms5

**Which is why we’re organizing to push back against harmful AI data center expansion — and recruiting people who want to step up in their communities.****[Fill out our form to tell us how you’d like to get involved.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJzELDOvtVMlln665R2fyNmfc3gGDtgIWHko_t0a8VsNJOlyqjr0jh8HbG-qJr6s-cwrQrLRhkBNpBeH5WUX3ybQC5r7oDyISGYET7iJt3-ZiQD-4zBT2zEvX-sJmYeAoUMI0BAvypH4wC0V7a9QT3BiRcGqPaZVvXLbVjeStWD31iG70um-u-Hk-CRwETO3U6VgpO8CVUpqFSFgZAEehWNE9EyRBsNjk7-drAOahHCpfvhpH-DcLZchJ4kjDnsODeSoxTaDL7ko0QPhJovpq-tNKz1BJseSYLSnJs95Qk9nDQV59VTWSvYfwevZrsAOz0/4or/bH3kIrkGSDeXTzzLnvZYCg/h0/h001.3AUPSWtOPLRf0QPToKK42hrQTUmhLbwylMv_yvD40cs)** If you’re thinking about running for local office to hold Big Tech accountable, we want to hear from you. And if you’re not planning to run, you can still play a critical role by helping recruit candidates, organizing locally, and supporting leaders who will stand up for working families. **[Sign up](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJzELDOvtVMlln665R2fyNmfc3gGDtgIWHko_t0a8VsNJOlyqjr0jh8HbG-qJr6s-cwrQrLRhkBNpBeH5WUX3ybQC5r7oDyISGYET7iJt3-ZiQD-4zBT2zEvX-sJmYeAoWxeCr3wOp4zQckfrSrq-J4SQq67qrXqIqHcbuPq0PadU6Oial4FN-cEFR__zIWPe0eU0qggVdIx5-vaGOXB9gUUKUoPpay63jytcfm0qLfhtckfFhknfLYJBOnyTARu3WNE1LBvTvcG7T_QK-kKqOXd_eduXElsk8ImG5xNHFAELK5je7ttWHtZKkGLgPFZTU/4or/bH3kIrkGSDeXTzzLnvZYCg/h1/h001.Zhzi-0HBobX0kFR9d8MtZbiUdjGaRZCq0hwlrt_ekUc)** **[And if you’re able, chip in to support the Working Families Party’s work organizing communities and building the power we need to take on Big Tech.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T91sBxyHchuf8mHLhig6pCS6eukDgWkVBMS0E8jsgCih7xuBsLg5m0BKfpoSwjW3QUlM_H3wpX4S7q5wUcfPykv01hZoF-G09r4jaSFggfE8vXWnj_W8ZUVMGgKbF6FhU617BiHRMO_a0oRtdkoLYcHkeYFyyVYhu0KHlIWxTIuBrtz6TtSOoytmT7AvCiV_-Vn9YvnJ5m3BPtFHhXhmDl72pAiVbV5eE06fbK7325vhIPhB6C6RG2bTs4uwqZfFcVxV-VX53qGDaRc6OX9l-cGG1pUXLpIjBda4GSDLXrlJ-3iPJI2y1VWUpDnjMAa6hEcBdmE3rES43hvLrsiCVzCRLTBbPzGEItUVfrw1TMbMK3n9Kek65LEeyudYIFixfI/4or/bH3kIrkGSDeXTzzLnvZYCg/h2/h001.CkeeGQKg8OSpXwvNZ3Wsk8pElssGSYAnz8vTsqGehqM)** **[Donate](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T91sBxyHchuf8mHLhig6pCS6eukDgWkVBMS0E8jsgCih7xuBsLg5m0BKfpoSwjW3QUNlLzeIx37FvaNp4Z0B7SpM7CHdOtEk_A4OfulyXHTjoG_TdAFT-6d44-rqw83z6JaTB8MqLWLo_EDd4H60YWF390P979dhLX6VQ9U_ooh7MPGTNSoCcSn3cYmWPGQ3haMCxw_FBP7Kkfvhj230lVFSrTYfHo1r5bSUGSRfZW4zW5diqNZwYZ_azodIuEmT9ueIJAZDukcAgqrHG2mMjx9LEBAr4HnyjhCbrZxG7zmxaELULdSmctLt7QmZgO6Nz4Krvvq9iMBSXkY_bVk9wXghC0NBdYp8pqU6YNQVnvRgiOyqjL0ziLta4uLxhER3o5/4or/bH3kIrkGSDeXTzzLnvZYCg/h3/h001.ANZaQ10VW63ktqjHkf3JIU8CTm1z748pLJCop78ay5E)** Here’s what’s happening, Peter: **AI data centers are using staggering amounts of electricity — sometimes more than an entire city. 6** These facilities aren’t just powering chatbots anymore. Governments and militaries are starting to rely on them too. **Reports say the U.S. military used Anthropic’s Claude AI during last week's attack on Iran — and continues to use it. 7** As AI use expands across industries and governments, the massive data centers behind it will require _even more_ power. And when demand for electricity surges faster than the supply can keep up, prices rise. Utility companies respond by _proposing_ billions of dollars in new power plants to serve Big Tech.8 So who ends up paying for it? **We do.** Even if your household isn’t using more energy, your bill still goes up — while utility companies are guaranteed profits and tech giants get exactly what they want. And the problem is only going to get worse. Bloomberg reports that data center electricity demand is expected to **double by 2035** , reaching nearly **9% of all U.S. power use. 9** In just the next two years, AI data centers are projected to create pollution equal to **300 billion miles of driving. 10** Meanwhile, the richest corporations in the world walk away with the profits — and working families are left paying more for electricity, water, and clean air. **That’s not acceptable.** But the only way to win is by building power in our communities — organizing locally and electing leaders who understand what’s at stake. **[If you’re interested in running for office or helping recruit leaders in your community, fill out our form and we’ll be in touch with next steps.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJzELDOvtVMlln665R2fyNmfc3gGDtgIWHko_t0a8VsNJOlyqjr0jh8HbG-qJr6s-cwrQrLRhkBNpBeH5WUX3ybQC5r7oDyISGYET7iJt3-ZiQD-4zBT2zEvX-sJmYeAoXGDyY48KxLsv49VG8m32WSURv0Bq9o4hXjozjYbagRu74fEUT_vcMRjI3q1hidqIsL65kl32EVkN8tb4HWzkHT9e2PNLvCFXerjLZJq7v7tiJBTaOcbaz3qbK2dKFZyA9WMJCSbVCDYGWAg6-fTF5tqtVsyIrZGF8XY6_yN5G-pwiWNglniS46FMh9KFKTuGE/4or/bH3kIrkGSDeXTzzLnvZYCg/h4/h001.f80SKl9yjlrYPHv236F8sEFTggd3QTH1WPwQqgWrozw)** clean_body: | | | Peter, Across the country, people are opening their electric bills and asking the same question: Why am I paying more when I’m using the same amount of power? At the Working Families Party, we organize around the real challenges working people face — like the rising costs that make it harder to stay afloat, care for our families, and remain rooted in our communities. Right now, one issue keeps coming up everywhere: the explosive growth of AI data centers and the damage they’re doing to where we live. 1 Massive data centers are driving up electricity demand — and utility companies are passing those costs directly onto us. At the same time, some communities are dealing with: Industrial-scale water use draining already scarce local supply2 Rising carbon pollution3 Constant industrial noise4 and loss of land zoned for homes or farms5 Which is why we’re organizing to push back against harmful AI data center expansion — and recruiting people who want to step up in their communities.** If you’re thinking about running for local office to hold Big Tech accountable, we want to hear from you. And if you’re not planning to run, you can still play a critical role by helping recruit candidates, organizing locally, and supporting leaders who will stand up for working families. Here’s what’s happening, Peter: AI data centers are using staggering amounts of electricity — sometimes more than an entire city. 6 These facilities aren’t just powering chatbots anymore. Governments and militaries are starting to rely on them too. Reports say the U.S. military used Anthropic’s Claude AI during last week's attack on Iran — and continues to use it. 7 As AI use expands across industries and governments, the massive data centers behind it will require even more power. And when demand for electricity surges faster than the supply can keep up, prices rise. Utility companies respond by proposing billions of dollars in new power plants to serve Big Tech.8 So who ends up paying for it? We do. Even if your household isn’t using more energy, your bill still goes up — while utility companies are guaranteed profits and tech giants get exactly what they want. And the problem is only going to get worse. Bloomberg reports that data center electricity demand is expected to double by 2035 , reaching nearly 9% of all U.S. power use. 9 In just the next two years, AI data centers are projected to create pollution equal to 300 billion miles of driving. 10 Meanwhile, the richest corporations in the world walk away with the profits — and working families are left paying more for electricity, water, and clean air. That’s not acceptable. But the only way to win is by building power in our communities — organizing locally and electing leaders who understand what’s at stake. ** In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , CNBC, November 26, 2025. 2\. , Bloomberg, May 8, 2025. 3\. , AP News, January 13, 2026. 4\. , BBC, October 25, 2025. 5\. , Inside Climate News, October 26, 2025. 6\. , CNBC, November 14, 2025. 7\. , CBS News , March 3, 2026. 8\. , The Texas Tribune, January 26, 2026. 9\. bloomberg.com/graphics/2025-ai-data-centers-electricity-prices/?linkid=16&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-data-centers-are-raising-your-electric-bills&emailreferrer=email3134156&emailsubject=youre-paying-to-power-chatgpt-and-claude&&, Bloomberg , September 29, 2025. 10\. , MIT Technology Review, May 20, 2025. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. # [Legal marijuana, the truth behind the lies by Vincent Cavaleri](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=189497818&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg5NDk3ODE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NzMwMDc0NjEsImV4cCI6MTc3NTU5OTQ2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0._jL1cGhK0y1DS86pnBjOYfPpbaG3HZcD2iWieo7tfbo)
### Legal doesn't always mean harmless--especially when the "side effects" come with a price tag and a punchline.
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| Mar 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=189497818&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg5NDk3ODE4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzAwNzQ2MSwiZXhwIjoxNzc1NTk5NDYxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNjcyOTU4OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.A9Aq42MKtzIkZQ4rhoWb72mxQv--nPAxy61TigiFALo&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/heartlandjournal/p/legal-marijuana-the-truth-behind?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c8d630a0-dd22-4762-adb8-be0385adb2b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
> > > When California legalized marijuana in 1996 for medicinal purposes, it had every intention to push the legalization to the limits of easy and accessible public availability. Many states have joined the ranks of legal dope under the guise of a medical need. There are now roughly 30 states that have since legalized marijuana to some degree or another.
>>> [Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.nb9Y315D-K7qyGE3axRavmbWUVC_XFhhaIE-HMn9aYo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=189497818)
>>> Today marijuana is easier to access and more potent than ever, and a higher percentage of people who use are heavy users, compared to people who drink alcohol or smoke cigarettes. Despite the widespread usage, there is little public awareness, and even denial, of the facts and the dangers.
>
> Politicians and lobbyists have stated that decriminalizing marijuana will reduce crime, while the opposite has occurred. They have also stated underage teens will have a more difficult time obtaining the drug, and that too is false. Crime rates, DUI's and traffic accident have all risen in states that have legalized the drug for recreational and medicinal use, not to mention minors in possession of the drug. Some states have even hypothesized that marijuana use will decrease the use of opioid overdoses, because "people will choose marijuana over opioids and painkillers". Another reckless and dangerous assumption that has proven untrue. Opioid overdoses and deaths have steadily risen in all these states that have adopted legal marijuana.
>
> As a matter of fact, making pot legal has had several additional and unreported impacts in the community. Since the legalization it has driven the cost of weed down and potency up. This has now created a quasi-competition for the "drug dollar" in all communities. Methamphetamine and heroin costs are down sharply to compete with legal pot in all these states. This is another unreported phenomenon that is germane to this issue.
>
> Studies in Europe are starting to emerge and force the conversation outward. In America most if not all medical information for teens or adolescents are strictly confidential, so gathering information and research is often difficult. This leads to delays in reporting and potential solutions. Emergency rooms are now reporting vast increases in what's called cannabis use disorders or psychosis. Some of these disorders and psychoses are permanent and, in some cases, leading to suicides.
>
> The Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders (DSM-IV-TR) has now come out with an entire section dedicated to cannabis use disorders. The National Institute of Health reports that, along with the doubling of marijuana use nationwide, related disorders have nearly doubled as well. The effects range from anxiety, addiction, violent vomiting, violent schizophrenia, permanent psychosis and suicide. Clinics are popping up in Europe directly dealing with cannabis related psychosis and disorders. The increase in cases is worldwide and quite alarming.
>
> Besides smoking the now potent pot, people can purchase food products, like cookies, brownies, Rice Krispy treats, chocolate, lollipops, gummi bears to ingest. Every imaginable and ingestible possibility is available for consumption. It's easy to see why our young people are falling victim so easily to the epidemic. This has become a multi-billion-dollar industry that won't go away too soon. Too many vested interests including local governments. This legislator is incredibly proud that the City of Mill Creek continues its moratorium on marijuana stores and sales within city limits.
>
> Thank you and God bless
>
> Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer

body:
pictures attached 📎

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126927490/606401033/-1473932214?refcode=logo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDU3MjMyOS0zYTFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COGjHJAL49DzRWA34Oi0_vZ0YmwD1Jt3Oc0jvdfTFzo=) Howdy, folks! The election year is ramping up, and our team is running full steam ahead to meet with Coloradans and talk about the future of our country. **Meeting with folks like you one-on-one is my favorite part of the job, and nothing gives me more hope for our great state.** **_[I’ll tell you where I’ve been in a moment _(and share a few photos!),_ but if you’re short on time, can I count on you to pitch in a couple bucks to my campaign? Every little bit helps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126927491/606401034/1664162816?refcode=email_030826_onthetrail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDU3MjMyOS0zYTFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COGjHJAL49DzRWA34Oi0_vZ0YmwD1Jt3Oc0jvdfTFzo=)_** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126927492/606401035/1664162816?refcode=email_030826_onthetrail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDU3MjMyOS0zYTFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COGjHJAL49DzRWA34Oi0_vZ0YmwD1Jt3Oc0jvdfTFzo=)
---
We made our way to Colorado Springs to enjoy some beers and meet with Coloradans who are fed up with Trump and his attacks on science, health care, and our public lands.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126927493/606401036/1664162816?refcode=email_030826_onthetrail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDU3MjMyOS0zYTFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COGjHJAL49DzRWA34Oi0_vZ0YmwD1Jt3Oc0jvdfTFzo=)
We stopped in Pueblo, where I grabbed a beer with some folks and talked shop about our nation’s path forward.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126927494/606401037/1664162816?refcode=email_030826_onthetrail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDU3MjMyOS0zYTFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COGjHJAL49DzRWA34Oi0_vZ0YmwD1Jt3Oc0jvdfTFzo=)
We took a trip to Fort Collins for happy hour, where we heard stories from those who are fired up and ready to defend this seat and fight Trump’s reckless agenda.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126927495/606401038/1664162816?refcode=email_030826_onthetrail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDU3MjMyOS0zYTFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COGjHJAL49DzRWA34Oi0_vZ0YmwD1Jt3Oc0jvdfTFzo=)
We stopped by CooperSmith’s — one of the breweries I helped start, and a classic example of true entrepreneurial energy — and ran into the current owner, Brandon Shaw.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126927496/606401039/1664162816?refcode=email_030826_onthetrail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDU3MjMyOS0zYTFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COGjHJAL49DzRWA34Oi0_vZ0YmwD1Jt3Oc0jvdfTFzo=)
Look, I only ran for office in the first place because I felt like the concerns of everyday Coloradans simply weren’t being heard. That’s why we’re working hard to show up, listen, and deliver for folks like you — and we’ve had great company along the way!
But everywhere I go, I hear the same thing: people are fed up with the broken promises of the Trump administration that are costing everyday Americans.
**We hear you. We’re doing everything we can to fight back and put working people first — and we need you with us._[Will you chip in now to help us keep Colorado blue and stand tall against MAGA’s attacks? Every bit helps in a must-win race like ours:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126927497/606401040/1664162816?refcode=email_030826_onthetrail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDU3MjMyOS0zYTFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COGjHJAL49DzRWA34Oi0_vZ0YmwD1Jt3Oc0jvdfTFzo=)_**

| | Hi Peter, it’s Rep. Zoe Lofgren with an urgent message. _Thanks to the Trump administration, our democracy is in serious danger._ Across the country, Donald Trump and his allies are implementing discriminatory practices, such as restrictive voter ID laws and voter roll purges, in an effort to block minority citizens from voting and maintain an uncontested hold on power. **That’s why I’m fighting in Congress to protect our voting rights by passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.** I served in the House alongside Representative Lewis for 25 years, and I’m proud to honor his legacy by championing this legislation, which would finally preserve the hard-fought protections of the Voting Rights Act. This groundbreaking bill would move us closer to ending voter discrimination by strengthening the federal government’s ability to protect voters: → It requires states with a history of discrimination to get approval before changing voting laws; → It increases transparency by mandating that election changes are announced no less than 180 days before an election; → It expands the federal government’s authority to send observers to protect voters in areas with a substantial risk of discrimination. **Peter, as the Trump administration ramps up its attacks on our democracy, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act is the solution we need to ensure free, fair elections.** _But we won’t be able to pass this bill without taking back the House._ **[I’m fighting to elect California Democrats, flip the House blue, and pass legislation that protects our democracy, like the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. But I rely on supporters like you to power my work. So if you believe in equal voting rights, can you chip in $5, $10, or anything you’re able to my campaign today? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126927836/606402196/-1463031945?amount=5&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-03-08_JLV_VTR_ES-43326_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTJhMzA4ZC0zYjFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEytfyBBsdjl_GpgqdQNdIU_BmpjuQO9MRiQMShErRw=)**

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: Happy International Women's Day!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/happy-international-womens-day?e=c338950e03)
---
| |
---
| |
# Happy International Women's Day!

This may be a bit long, but it is an issue I am familiar with....

Mao's slogan, “Women Hold Up Half the Sky” sounded great. It was great for Mao. It meant that the CCP got to re-define what a woman is. Let me explain.

Mao and the CCP made life miserable for Chinese women by allowing them to only work in state factories or on collective farms full-time, or no food rationing coupons. Free markets were abolished.

Mothers could no longer stay home to care for their children as they used to do because food rations were very meager. Infants were forced to be taken care of by grandparents or by state factory daycare, "paid" for by the workers (it wasn’t free.)

Mao attacked beauty; no makeup, or feminine clothes. Traditional Chinese silk dresses Qipao (旗袍) were banned (like in my photo below when I lived in Texas, 1989), as they were deemed to be too bourgeois.
Women could only have approved hair styles, wear unisex clothing, and were banned from dating. Women wishing to marry first had to seek permission from their work units. You can't imagine what kind of abuse that caused

After Mao was finished using his “Red Guards” in his Cultural Revolution, he sent them to the countryside for re-education - by the millions. Many urban girls were sexually abused and raped. Girls offered their bodies to powerful party bosses (local communist thugs actually) in exchange for permission to go back home.

In my neighborhood, a girl from my parents row-house that I knew came home from rural area mentally ill and deeply disturbed. She kept saying to her mother: "Ghost, ghost, mommy help me". It was frightening and heartbreaking. This sort of thing happened all over China – as depicted in the award winning (banned in China) 1998 movie: "Xiu Xiu: The Sent Down Girl."

Women were forced to live in a gender-less society and call each other Tongzhi (同志 - comrade.) I remember how I was criticized for how I dressed and how I had to cut my hair. Remember, these cultural changes were forced down from the top.

In today’s China, the CCP still use women for politics. From the old “one child” policy of forced abortions to today's “2 or 3 children” policy, they just can’t seem to leave women alone.

China celebrates International Women’s Day for show, women there are ruled by men. No woman sits (stands?) in the 24-member Politburo Standing Committee of the CCP, the most powerful governing body of China.

The well funded Chinese Women's Federation (CWF) is actually a governmental organization funded by the CCP. The CWF never advocates or protects women who are not well connected and approved by the CCP.

The Chinese version of “Me Too” movement is severely suppressed. For example, a well-known young lady that was raped by high level party official tried to speak out, but was quickly locked up in a mental institution for a few years to keep her quiet. Although she is now released, she remains under surveillance and off-limits to the press.

Today the Democrat party claims they are for women’s rights, however all but two of the Congressional Democrats, including my opponent Maggie Goodlander, voted against a bill to keep men out of women’s sports. Does anyone actually understand why they do this?

Democrat party radicals ignore real biological differences, thus taking away girls’ opportunity to compete in their sports, risking their safety, and losing their privacy in locker rooms and bathrooms.

To me, because it is obvious that Women and Men are different, I can't help but believe that the real purpose of Democrat party radicals is to destroy American traditions, culture, family, and social norms, creating a permanent dependency class voting block.

_I signed the pledge_ with Independent Women to stand with women, to protect women's sports and their private spaces. I have advocated to seek justice for the victims of the Epstein horror and support congressional transparency rules forcing exposure of sexual misconduct by officials.

We must stand up to defend women and our daughters!

Please donate to my campaign at
[https://www.lilytangwilliams.com/congress/donate/](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=48da7215a8&e=c338950e03)

You can also order my memes, coffee mugs and T-shirts at
_[https://lilytangwilliams-shop.fourthwall.com](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=c6aa201436&e=c338950e03)_

name: Deb Haaland
subject: anything?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?refcode=jtk397-fr-nd&t=1&akid=7975%2E400544%2EtsQlDE)
---
Hi, friend, it's Deb with an urgent question:
** _
[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to donate ANY amount to my campaign before midnight to help me win the New Mexico governor's race?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5903?refcode=jtk397-fr-nd&t=2&akid=7975%2E400544%2EtsQlDE)_**
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5903?refcode=jtk397-fr-nd&t=3&akid=7975%2E400544%2EtsQlDE)
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5903?refcode=jtk397-fr-nd&t=4&akid=7975%2E400544%2EtsQlDE)
---
What if I told you that the most important financial deadline of this race so far is just WEEKS away, and our campaign is operating with fewer resources than needed to compete in one of the largest states in the country? **And now,** market betting shows this race narrowing for the first time ever, and our opponents are seizing on it as a green light to pour even more money into New Mexico.
What if I told you that there are now five Republicans running to flip New Mexico and several of them are using their own wealth to try to buy this race and bring an extreme agenda into our state, making it clear that we'll need a surge of grassroots support to stay ahead?
What if I told you that, now more than ever, Democratic governors are essential to serve as a backstop when the federal government abuses its resources and undermines civil liberties?
**Friend, I know we've got what it takes to win — but I can only get there if committed grassroots supporters like you help me reach every single goal from now through Election Day, including this one.**
**With time running out, I have to ask:_[Will you step up with a donation of $5, or anything at all, to help me reach my $15,000 midnight goal, win in New Mexico, and keep our state blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5903?refcode=jtk397-fr-nd&t=5&akid=7975%2E400544%2EtsQlDE)_**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5914?refcode=jtk397-fr-nd&t=6&akid=7975%2E400544%2EtsQlDE)

Be fierce,

Deb

name: RoyCooper.com
subject: Coffee?
body:
Roy wishes he could meet with each and every member of this team for a cup of coffee to hear from you directly.
| | | | |
---
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6827?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=6&akid=713%2E124072%2E-ClrwY)
Peter,
Roy has spent his career working to make life better for everyday North Carolinians, and throughout the years, he’s had countless conversations with people like you.
Right now, there’s a fundamental disconnect between what most folks want – good schools, good jobs and safety and security for their families – and the chaos and dysfunction coming out of Washington, DC. **We have to change that.**
**Roy wishes he could meet with each and every member of this team for a cup of coffee to hear from you directly. But since that’s not possible, sharing your input in our new priorities survey is the next best thing.**
**[Will you let Roy know what issues matter most to you in this election? He’s relying on your critical insights to flip this seat, take back the Senate and ensure our government is truly powered by the people.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6827?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=7&akid=713%2E124072%2E-ClrwY)**
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6827?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&t=8&akid=713%2E124072%2E-ClrwY)

Thank you,

Team Cooper
| |
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Team Kelly
subject: 375 Carrier Landings
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark Kelly has successfully landed on an aircraft carrier 375 times. That's not easy.
#

Mark Kelly has successfully landed on an aircraft carrier 375 times.
That's not easy.
First off, the landing area of an aircraft carrier is only a few hundred feet in length. That’s about 1/40th the length of a runway at a military airbase. But what makes this even more complicated is that your runway is moving through the water.
It moves to the right because of the angled deck, and bobs up and down like a cork, and rocks left and right in the ocean. It’s challenging during the day and often feels impossible at night.
Naval aviators have to do this in all kinds of conditions — rain, snow, fog, and during combat when the ship is often blacked out so it can’t be found by the enemy.
He did that 375 times, and every time any naval aviator does this, he or she is risking their life for their country. And then he launched on a rocket ship and into space four times in a spacecraft that is more complicated and more difficult to operate than any other machine ever built by humans.
But never — EVER — did Mark do that alone. Not in the Navy, not at NASA, and not now. At every step of the way Mark has been lucky to have a team behind him. Strong, committed, dependable people who had his back no matter what.
That’s what Mark needs today.
[**Please, make a donation so Mark can continue leading the fight against Trump and his Administration.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-mar26.Zy8qu0&refcode=em260308-1-90&t=1&akid=6386%2E6688874%2EFcedXZ)

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: “You better win”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
It’s on us to make them proud on Election Day

Hey there, it's Josh Shapiro — with a quick story for you. When I first ran for Governor back in 2022, my wife, Lori, would put her finger to my chest and tell me “You better win” every morning on my way out of the house. And Derek, she’s not the only one. Every family, every child, every teacher, and every worker is counting on this campaign right now. They’ve placed their faith in all of us to protect their freedoms, invest in their futures, and win this enormously important election on November 3rd. It’s on _us_ to make them proud on Election Day — because so much is on the line. [_**Please, will you chip in today to power our campaign throughout this uncertain, historic election year?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/126928095/606402971/1751931448?refcode=email_030826_winrs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWMzYjdiZi0zZjFiLWYxMTEtYTY5YS0wMDBkM2ExZjBhOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4FT-vNRDTzVAzo9u5QOWcAlG0Mpp1lYU5gI7znXd1bk=) We cannot become complacent, Derek. Just sixteen months ago, Trump won Pennsylvania. It was a painful, disappointing night for so many of us. **Now, I’m determined to make sure history doesn’t repeat itself.** [_**Derek, there is no donation too small for our campaign. Team,
