name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Hegseth is doing something that puts our troops in danger for no good reason
body:
And.... she's gone.
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Hegseth:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a356b77-8aca-4e4b-976e-de7c7f8cf051/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)["When You're a Dick, It Puts Our Troops in Danger. Don't Be a Dick"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56844e85-2b55-41c9-8fca-628e58a4c837/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Quick links: [Go to action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78ffb2c9-dd1c-46d5-8ce3-2774bc881da0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | [Discuss](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7102f825-7c0b-4c91-99ff-3c97ca5ea2ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | [See other actions)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d5efd76-e6c8-45b4-9020-71401af6dd89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te38e8d23-3d3e-4da2-9dfc-c7f9adea1632/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ .**[Add your name, and tell him to stop being such a dick](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0fcb213f-458b-41e1-a448-877c99dfc940/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T310f17c4-aa49-4d99-95f1-2fbde632d74a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Pete Hegseth may be the least qualified Secretary of Defense ever. So he's tried to may up for it by being a dick -- yelling a lot, shouting juvenile taunts like a schoolyard bully, and making death threats against entire nations. If he were still just a regular dick on Fox News, that would be bad enough. But when he does it as the person overseeing America's armed force, it creates big problems. It makes it much easier for our enemies to rally support. Which really pisses off our allies. And nations who are on the fence. And all kinds of people who could help us, but don't like dicks. [**So please join us telling Hegseth: "Don't Put Our Troops in Danger By Being a Dick."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81e9bab2-9d63-4dad-8e6f-40899191e3e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This makes the job harder for our troops, who now have to be on guard against a much wider range of potential adversaries. And making the job harder means that more of them will get killed, or suffer horriffic injuries. This is why military defense leaders who actually know what they're doing have long followed Teddy Roosevelt's admonition to "Speak softly and carry a bick stick." Not "scream loudly and be a big dick." [**So please join us telling Hegseth: "Don't Put Our Troops in Danger By Being a Dick."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b5cc3b0-7ea6-4dda-84d9-db32ac7e3dfa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

Peter, happy International Women’s Day! Today (and everyday), I strive to honor the women who raised me, because their strength and sacrifice is why I’m here today.

My abuela, mom, and aunt fled Cuba in the 1960s with no money, and without knowing English. My abuela worked multiple factory jobs just to give her kids a chance at the American Dream.

Their strength and determination to build a life from nothing is what inspired me for Congress in the first place.

I know my grandma would’ve been so proud of what we’ve been able to achieve, because she knew the importance of having someone with our voice representing us. **It’s her legacy I’m carrying forward when I walk onto the House floor.**

Unfortunately, every single day, the system works against women like the ones who raised me. I’ll always fight to uplift their voices in Congress, but I need your support to keep me here.

**[**_I didn’t make it this far on my own, Peter. So please, can you keep our movement strong and fuel our campaign with a donation so I can keep fighting for my loved ones, and for yours? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/pz2-83rDaLVk0oqRQ-OtfQ~~/AAPPABA~/OS_glItQjQjtUzCP2onrrv4ZjeaVeNcZSCtid-mvdykTU_egBZQwLSi1qrvXA-hxo77omBjjxvPnhEli1n16macWJX6V83pud_cMNRchHwm47eHptaRe7f0-CKJJ6V4-CBi7TddD-j99NsFp8giq9zI3uCjHxn9MIawpkIQRF57bv8ENhWbgsLEBRZvplY4KcA-aQiUrvkIT5dyQi4bIKUvhNPXgiCyKY43lPGyOGRI-sBX5zk4rblZJbhbpkfUWLAeuZpptOtmInZmjertE6Crx_pLsYCles7oKrLZqzXMcEMgvIbesCcPbWtVInJrrDwrLHaFm-PVh1Hs1JkBx8w~~)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/p-mQ2-JAkDcSPavflGd7xQ~~/AAPPABA~/9gSZXY7OeizocAKrBWaMYLWWwyryu-wnoNyANNjdHjYZRvo88lH6v0N7mkkwJwmOHvoepJXA2M8gIm9-sT80RgFHs3M2LZFG8CkYwRoadOdZWoJPQjn374gc0wOHw2GCFWCp15WvLNF2cXzrKjV5ZGnTDL0zcLmOjIPvjnZ6Nc7dTYtlA8IQGNrdmydEZ0gAslF0PWRZYjW-PsFjwhpFny77AuNBExPsGzPElVwfB6HSK_O-kQYmqa1ZKwJpSNbSZmlcoCkLYuYY5rKVcKsemj0qv3WW0aUSViuzT-RtgjQ02yh97thNmy2U_2SKU_rGMasR6xQ_qQLIXMmz5GeY8p2R7D62pDaZX_0iDvIAUwY~)

| | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---

"After a very public feud with President Trump, he apologized before dropping $10 MILLION to support the GOP" \--right in time for midterms. But the question remains: "is it enough for YOU to forgive him?" This isn't about money or words. It's about trust. Don't let this moment pass. "Tell us whether or not Elon Musk earns your trust>>" Paid for by Elect Common Sense. 11 Convent Road #25, Convent Station, NJ 07961 |

name: The Democrats
subject: Can we make one more request?
body:
---
Derek, We’ve reached out several times asking for your support to help Democrats win big in the midterms, but so far, we haven’t been able to break through. We’ve sent messages from candidates like Jon Ossoff, Amy Klobuchar, and Sherrod Brown. We’ve explained how we’ll invest your contribution to help Democrats win. If you can’t afford a contribution today, we completely understand. We hope you’ll just archive this email and keep in mind that your involvement — and ultimately, your vote — are what matters most. But, if you can afford to make a contribution, we hope you’ll give us a chance to make one more request: Trump and his allies have a massive cash advantage. They have hundreds of millions of dollars more than we do, money they will spend running attack ad after attack ad in the coming months. They’re hoping that we’re all too exhausted to fight back. **We have to prove them wrong.** And the truth is that we cannot reach the voters we’ll need to contact without many more people stepping up to make their first donation of 2026. That’s why we’re reaching out to you, Derek. If everyone who gets this email donated to the DNC today, we’d have the resources to help Democratic candidates break through the noise while expanding our voter outreach efforts. But not everyone gives, so we’re reaching out to you directly. Democrats nationwide are counting on you. [**Please make your first contribution to the Democratic National Committee today, and we’ll put your donation to work immediately to reach the voters who will decide the outcome of November’s midterms.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260308_6316_fr&refcode2=6316_22930333_MvLbo6&akid=6316%2E22930333%2EMvLbo6) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260308_6316_fr&refcode2=6316_22930333_MvLbo6&akid=6316%2E22930333%2EMvLbo6)**

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Something BIG just happened in NH, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101556?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7)
Peter, it’s Governor JB Pritzker.
I’m emailing you today about New Hampshire’s Senate race because this is serious: **Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, jumped in to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red.**
**[Before I go any further, I have to ask: Will you split $15 or more between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to keep New Hampshire blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101556?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7)**
_Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a chance at taking back a majority in the Senate._ That’s why this race is being targeted by GOP super PACs and Republicans across the country.
The NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the Senate — said they’re “all-in” on John Sununu. And polling shows: This race is a _statistical dead heat_ between Chris Pappas and John Sununu.
This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and we have to be ready to fight back.
Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he’s seen tough campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a race like this. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter.
**[If you’re with me and ready to send Chris Pappas to the Senate, will you split $15 between Chris’s campaign and State Democrats Committee today to help him defend New Hampshire’s seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101556?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101557?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101557?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101557?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101557?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101557?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101557?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101556?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7)
---
I know Chris is the type of leader we need in the Senate — **[so thank you for supporting his campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/101556?refcode=em20260308-10149&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=10149%2E614464%2E5-e0N7)**
